name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’ve pulled our ads to save money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We don’t currently have the money to run TV ads. We’re being outraised and outspent by the Democrats. |
---

Fellow American - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with just 81 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Fellow American, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b8c963d7df324304b80f63a4bbc73a3d&_e=0U2XvWcAc8NcIX8OWs5dX7s-jhKxkoVw9mTz_ppObre_lftG6k1TLdYxtF1IJ3T4-DRJhFNMWDTclINAlx624ENzxfXBMmoi3OXnacva9-oXof6LoQr2csIyKCyMpQK-ME7iEEO0qXbTsdFZorRz1tgUEs5_KjRNE7O8PyhoKf8kcHabzkXZwSzuOdzkNbcYWi-3AO6E6TtT6R_6KDJ8r2J8zDmJoDTdJc5hdkA9cNpvT1sDQQzGC7iCNQ_ouXUnjf8Sl3ZTfceVEYzs42x-A2H91VmW44jdsS-t7XhtiwcNbAW0_ylamRJd1o4KDELYq_YkcmzWQwZ6VcCC0sdQ6LKBEcHW8y24wiZf8q2FXAe6-f-ly-rtw_mWk3wQeQjtPsMusAca4ifeAQ8b55XWtAVQpEU7ItqmAije6ZiU7VKdzxrGdbfCsf3HjYumB8G6o84crT5MBvhvU4DF2YkJFaPSM0k9Cl63O8CzTgfNmG2j20l7WjT8yxOxz8-kqoEF)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=1)
---
### August 19, 2022
Friend -- We have a REPUBLICAN TICKET! We hope you all were able to make your voices heard by voting in last week’s Republican Primary for statewide offices. Now, the real work begins! It will be all hands on deck from now until November. If you’re able to volunteer, join us on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=2). \- Team WisGOP | On August 9, Republican voters across Wisconsin made their voices heard in the partisan primary, where they elected great leaders to carry the party banner into November. Congratulations to the following primary winners:
* Ron Johnson for U.S. Senate
* Tim Michels for Governor
* Roger Roth for Lieutenant Governor
* Eric Toney for Attorney General
* Amy Loudenbeck for Secretary of State
* John Leiber for State Treasurer

The state party also hosted a unity tour across the state, where Michels, Roth, and down-ballot candidates joined state party officials and grassroots leaders at county party offices across the state to encourage all Wisconsinites to help us launch the Red Wave in November. We’re excited to work with these great conservatives as we come together to re-elect Ron Johnson, defeat Tony Evers and Josh Kaul, and return real leadership to Madison. Read more about the unity tour **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0Xrs94vYl-6qOrUK2WUbb8Ko_43Bom79cgk3TF3Bnflk58jFi0TjcK4fFPHRzYKaAw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=3)**.

| | Last week, fringe-left candidate Mandela Barnes was officially declared the Democrat nominee for U.S. Senate – less than two weeks after Democrats decided to abandon the will of the voters and pressure other candidates to drop out. Surprisingly, Democrats declared Barnes the most electable candidate after his stances on abolishing ICE, defunding the police, ending cash bail, and imposing the Green New Deal were known to voters – a testament to the overall unimpressive options available to Democrats. That’s why the WisGOP unveiled [**MandelaBarnesForSenate.com**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=C61ykwWqrzwjJLKXMLwWUDBimYIQVCF0l8wMK5HFkW4emdb2wyuwwxXGiBJBoQet&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=4) , where voters can read the truth about BS Barnes’ record – from his extreme views on crime to his wasteful spending proposals that will prompt even more inflation. Give the website a look [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=C61ykwWqrzwjJLKXMLwWUDBimYIQVCF0l8wMK5HFkW4emdb2wyuwwxXGiBJBoQet&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=5). Last week, the Legislature filed in Waukesha County Circuit Court to intervene in the current case _(White v. WEC)_ seeking to stop WEC-issued guidance on ballot curing – leveraging the full weight of the Legislature to shut down WEC’s defiant and flagrant abuse of the law. Read about their intervention in Empower Wisconsin [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwC80RLENPsfpnbSffvASA-TyboxQ1FEjqAWy8sTGWz9jFyhckO-9h4E-aV_FG42c__FtvZaDxrcLtjh8Lf64ADE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=6).

---|---|---

### **In Case You Missed It...**
### _[**GOP Grassroots Join WisGOP Unity Tour**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0WF7AY0ZrTZPZIalzVPbnDco8lfJHqiLn1i2QzgzZSGoc-mQxlmP8gdyNuR4QXPQog&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=9)_
In case you missed it, this week Tim Michels and Roger Roth embarked on a unity tour across Wisconsin – joining grassroots leaders, state party officials, and candidates for local and state offices in county party headquarters throughout the state. From Monroe, to La Crosse, to Minocqua, to Green Bay, to Racine, Republicans are fired up and ready to defeat Tony Evers and send conservatives to Madison this fall.
### _[**Wisconsin Dems’ Failed Crime Policies Leads to Crisis for Milwaukee Police Department**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0TvjWvhNWJpFj67YCW1-p0MUqP_Bn0npDYd-FwLKVhdrzvUaEzUcNTUFw5MP6w-28Ur-TNnoJhMoVQuEXpVuPMn7PT7WtXBmoF33eZ0dElSUVWBj7tawxAKVldLxcgGSnw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=10)_
Democrats’ soft-on-crime policies and “defund the police” rhetoric are having horrific implications on the safety of our law enforcement officers. Earlier this month, two Milwaukee detectives were attacked by a suspect after requesting backup. Unfortunately, these types of incidents are occurring all too often because of rising crime and an increase in unfilled positions in the Milwaukee Police Department.
### _[**The Reviews Are In: Dem Nominee Mandela Barnes Is Less Than Impressive**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0cv1407Ne5qIGWtyi6nsYJjBPqTlNb2_pcl-XuybnTslYLzLSZHjjuPFZEH-Xwn_aPr2hGue39G0NsE3AnKds3790upyy4QntPSgXpmWBgfg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=11)_
The first reviews of Mandela Barnes as the Democrat nominee for U.S. Senate are now in, and let’s just say they are less than impressive. Since Barnes secured his nomination, national outlets are weighing in, and the resounding takeaway? Barnes is just too liberal for Wisconsin.
### **Worth the Read**
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouNBHja3sfdY8_xeAgIvnS9ThzmLeGLiXOSASLZ15cXx0fW_ikH005t_ExGLq9_TKc347MsBA8iel-lh85KC3Gm03BUm3HarYoVdZVSofVZ6Xg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=12) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=a9lVzACUQtvW78T1Y1IgXSTAWhYy73r-ZfSkFnsT9TGXshAu-dBINn_7XltNuZOgZzFVOKGyfPmEUieLMMbEnWrWzAOGW0oiDEMsYDoFb4LLdF13EEYV8U4KxQlvzP6-&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=13) | | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=a9lVzACUQtvW78T1Y1IgXSTAWhYy73r-ZfSkFnsT9TGD1wsfHFsuzjC4J4Bb8SuA5X0UfQ3l7i8E9JAEfNgyFJjTyFKBpDj30Gu1COf_rn7CeGpYtHFB9Q2di8JdKmZp&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=14) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwCsz4Ac328M_JlXlL9iTeTZ02n5k-po1iVpf-rW3LJfAMX7FZfHX2Hh0X1ef4IQdMKL0Z-ggMyxxS04b6Jkpde4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_8_19_22_v1&n=15)

subject: Your invitation for this Thursday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Keith Swank (R)
body:
Join us this Thursday the 25th at the Olympic Flight Museum | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/45c2af3c4412/re-thank-you-15885763?e=d32193ab14)
---
|
---
| | | **Celebrate Our Primary Win**
Join us this Thursday evening the 25th from 6-8pm at the Olympic Flight Museum for our Win the 10th Fundraiser. We finished almost 30 points ahead of our closest competition in the primary. Now we're on to the general to face Marilyn Strickland and the future of our country is hanging in the balance. We can no longer afford to cede ground politically just because a race is difficult. We've got a tough road ahead but it isn't impossible. Republican Kim Wyman actually got over 57 percent in the 10th CD in 2020. Chip in and donate online right now if you can't make it Thursday. I can't wait to see you there.

---
| [DONATE](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=282f53db1b&e=d32193ab14 "Anedot Donate Link")
---
| **In Freedom, **

**Keith R. Swank |[KeithSwank.com](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=9c41f4eb49&e=d32193ab14 "https://keithswank.com/about.html")
Police Captain | U.S. Army Infantry Veteran | GOP Candidate for Congress **

---
| [DONATE](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=84c05d8ded&e=d32193ab14 "DONATE")
---
| | **ABOUT: Keith Swank is a U.S. Army Airborne Infantry veteran and Seattle Police Captain sought after for his expertise as an instructor in crisis intervention and de-escalation. He served as Night Duty Commander and Commander of the Metro Special Response Section (S.W.A.T. Team, Harbor Patrol, Canine Unit and Arson/Bomb Squad). In the U.S. Army he served in a long range reconnaissance unit and graduated from Ranger School, Airborne School, High Altitude Low Opening (HALO) and Infantry Training. Swank is a graduate of the University of Washington where he attained a degree in psychology. He is officially endorsed by the Pierce County and Thurston County Republican Party, SEAL PAC, and the Washington State Farm Bureau, and many more.**

| [ ](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=16b722a5f5&e=d32193ab14 "https://keithswank.com/about.html")

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter, we had to make a tough call.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---

Peter - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with less than 90 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Peter, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044150:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call.

[** Help Fund Our TV Ads
Chip in $25 Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044151:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r)
While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. **In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond.**

**[If you want us to flip the Georgia Senate seat from BLUE to RED and help Republicans win back the Senate majority, then I need you to give as generously as you can right this instant.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044150:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r)**

I'm asking you, Peter, please help us get back on the air ASAP. **[Chip in anything you can today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044150:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044150:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. **[I hope you'll consider my request by chipping in $25 RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044150:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r)** We really could use your help.

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044150:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044152:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044153:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044154:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61044155:6_ToRCVNM:m:1:3334294963:63D9771B453C0172FDA5D00F506E43A6:r)

name: End GOP Gerrymandering
subject: The Hill Op-Ed: “To preserve women’s reproductive rights, end gerrymandering”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
If there’s one thing we learned from the recent election in Kansas, it’s that the GOP’s extreme abortion bans don’t represent the will of the voters.
|
---

---
| **“To preserve women’s reproductive rights, end gerrymandering”** “Given that abortion laws will now be set by state lawmakers, gerrymandering will have a direct impact on which party controls state legislatures and the direction for abortion laws in the future.” _\- The Hill_
---
[PITCH IN TO HELP THE NDRC DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49481576/362333372/1479146301?amount=20&refcode=20220819.3r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlOGU4N2Q4LTJiMjAtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ifCVZlZicIAKrsAq0h3gBCpNMMu80eJvDlvFH16uqY8=)
Friend,

If there’s one thing we learned from the recent election in Kansas, it’s that the GOP’s extreme abortion bans _don’t_ represent the will of the voters.

But thanks to years of manipulating the maps, **the most extreme voices in the room** have been able to seize control of the GOP. When far-right candidates no longer have to worry about credible challengers in a general election, it creates an incentive to become as extreme as possible in order to win their Republican primary.

Think about all the issues that an overwhelming majority of voters agree on: The right to make our own reproductive choices and our own choices about who to marry, the right to live free from the fear of constant gun violence, and more. Progress on each of these issues has been stymied thanks to far-right politicians in gerrymandered districts who don’t represent a majority of voters.

That’s why it’s critical that we keep up our work to defend voting rights and end GOP gerrymandering once and for all. Because when we have fair maps and fair elections, **the will of the majority will finally be heard** — and we’ll be able to make progress on the issues that matter most.

We’ve made a lot of progress on this front since the NDRC launched in 2017, but with one of the most important midterm elections in our lifetimes coming up this November, we’ve still got work to do. And we’re counting on support from people like you to help us do it.

clean_body: If there’s one thing we learned from the recent election in Kansas, it’s that the GOP’s extreme abortion bans don’t represent the will of the voters. | | “To preserve women’s reproductive rights, end gerrymandering” “Given that abortion laws will now be set by state lawmakers, gerrymandering will have a direct impact on which party controls state legislatures and the direction for abortion laws in the future.” \- The Hill = Friend, If there’s one thing we learned from the recent election in Kansas, it’s that the GOP’s extreme abortion bans don’t represent the will of the voters. But thanks to years of manipulating the maps, the most extreme voices in the room have been able to seize control of the GOP. When far-right candidates no longer have to worry about credible challengers in a general election, it creates an incentive to become as extreme as possible in order to win their Republican primary. Think about all the issues that an overwhelming majority of voters agree on: The right to make our own reproductive choices and our own choices about who to marry, the right to live free from the fear of constant gun violence, and more. Progress on each of these issues has been stymied thanks to far-right politicians in gerrymandered districts who don’t represent a majority of voters. That’s why it’s critical that we keep up our work to defend voting rights and end GOP gerrymandering once and for all. Because when we have fair maps and fair elections, the will of the majority will finally be heard — and we’ll be able to make progress on the issues that matter most. We’ve made a lot of progress on this front since the NDRC launched in 2017, but with one of the most important midterm elections in our lifetimes coming up this November, we’ve still got work to do. And we’re counting on support from people like you to help us do it. Friend, can we count on you to pitch in to the NDRC today to help us keep up our work to end gerrymandering, protect voting rights, and defend our democracy from far-right politicians who don’t represent the American people? name: Tom Fitton
subject: Trump Raid Update!
body: Judicial Watch Court Victory! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: COURT REJECTS BIDEN DOJ EFFORT TO KEEP TRUMP WARRANT AFFIDAVIT COMPLETELY SEALED [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27893&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2JpZGVuLXJhaWQtb24tdHJ1bXAtaG9tZS1pcy1hLXNjYW0tanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3BlY2lhbC1jb3VydC11cGRhdGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] We are aggressively fighting the Department of Justice to uncover _all_ the details of the unprecedented August 8, 2022, raid on the home of former President Trump. In a vindication of our efforts, Magistrate Judge Bruce Reinhart issued a decision [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27889&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3VzYS12LXNlYWxlZC1zZWFyY2gtd2FycmFudC1yZWRhY3Rpb25zLW9yZGVyLTA4MzMyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] that rejected the out-of-hand Justice Department’s brazen play to keep the whole document secret. The Biden administration’s unprecedented and abusive raid on Trump’s home has created a crisis in the rule of law that can only be alleviated with transparency and accountability. We’re thrilled that Americans will get more of both with today’s court decision, finding that at least some more information about this terrible raid should be released. Magistrate Reinhart had called for a hearing [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27894&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3VzYS12LXNlYWxlZC1zZWFyY2gtd2FycmFudC1oZWFyaW5nLXRyYW5zY3JpcHQtMDgzMzIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] in West Palm Beach, FL, at which James Moon of the Meland Budwick, P.A. law firm in Miami, argued on our behalf. After the hearing the court issued an order [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27889&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3VzYS12LXNlYWxlZC1zZWFyY2gtd2FycmFudC1yZWRhY3Rpb25zLW9yZGVyLTA4MzMyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] that stated: As I ruled from the bench at the conclusion of the hearing, I find that on the present record the Government has not met its burden of showing that the entire affidavit should remain sealed. It is ORDERED that by noon EST on Thursday, August 25, 2022, the Government shall file under seal its proposed redactions along with a legal memorandum setting forth the justification for the proposed redactions. The court also ordered the release of other documents [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27890&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3VzYS12LXNlYWxlZC1zZWFyY2gtd2FycmFudC1kb2N1bWVudHMtb3JkZXItMDgzMzIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] concerning the warrant. Here’s what led up to this decision. On August 9, we filed [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27830&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtZmlsZXMtbW90aW9uLXRvLXVuc2VhbC1mYmktc2VhcmNoLXdhcnJhbnQtdXNlZC10by1yYWlkLXByZXNpZGVudC10cnVtcHMtbWFyLWEtbGFnby1ob21lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] a motion asking the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Florida to unseal the search warrant materials used by the FBI to raid President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home in Florida (_U.S. v. Sealed Search Warrant_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27825&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p1ZGljaWFsLXdhdGNoLW1vdGlvbi10by11bnNlYWwtc2VhcmNoLXdhcnJhbnQtMDgzMzIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] (Case No. 9:22-mj-08332)). On August 11, the DOJ filed a motion [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27869&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtdXBkYXRlLW9uLXRydW1wLXdhcnJhbnQtbGVnYWwtZGV2ZWxvcG1lbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] offering to unseal certain warrant materials. On August 12, we filed [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27870&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXRydW1wLXdhcnJhbnQtcmVsZWFzZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] President Trump’s public statement with the court, in which he made it clear that he would not oppose the release of documents related to the raid. Later that day, the DOJ made a partial release [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27870&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXRydW1wLXdhcnJhbnQtcmVsZWFzZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] of the Trump raid warrant materials. Initially, the _Albany Times Union [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27835&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3RpbWVzLXVuaW9ucy1sZXR0ZXItbW90aW9uLXRvLXVuc2VhbC1hdWd1c3QtMjAyMi9dXz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw== and the _New York Times [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27836&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL255dHMtbW90aW9uLXRvLXVuc2VhbC1hdWd1c3QtMjAyMi0wODMzMi9dXz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw== joined us in filing for the unsealing of the warrant by filing an amicus letter and motion respectively. Other interests later joined in the effort. Magistrate Reinhart ordered [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27829&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY291cnRsaXN0ZW5lci5jb20vZG9ja2V0LzY0ODcyNDQxL3VuaXRlZC1zdGF0ZXMtdi1zZWFsZWQtc2VhcmNoLXdhcnJhbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] the Justice Department to respond by August 15 to our Motion to Unseal the warrant and supporting materials behind the FBI raid. In its filing [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27868&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Rvai1yZXNwb25zZS11bnNlYWwtd2FycmFudC0wODMzMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=], the Justice Department alleged that releasing the affidavit would “cause significant and irreparable damage” to its ongoing criminal investigation. On August 17, we submitted our reply [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27891&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYXNrcy1jb3VydC10by1yZWplY3QtYmlkZW4tZG9qLXJlcXVlc3QvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] to the DOJ’s effort [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27892&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tZG9qLW9wcG9zZXMtancvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] to keep under seal the affidavit used to justify the raid. The “criminal investigation” the Biden administration is covering up reeks of corruption and dishonesty – and is based on a reinvention of law about presidential records that is at odds with the U.S. Constitution, court rulings, federal statutes, and prior government legal positions and practice. No administration should be able to raid the home of a former president and putative presidential candidate based on ‘secret’ reasons. We’re pleased that our legal pressure forced the partial release of warrant materials. The U.S. Constitution and federal law give unreviewable authority to President Trump to take whatever records he wishes at the end of his presidency. The Biden administration’s dishonest depiction of personal records of President Trump it illicitly seized during the raid as “classified” is further demonstration that the raid was a brazen act of raw political abuse. The battle for transparency and accountable will continue and require much heavy lifting by your Judicial Watch legal team. If this current crisis doesn’t convince you of the need for Judicial Watch, I’m not sure what will! I encourage to join our cause and support our work directly here [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]. In the meantime, we will keep you abreast of breaking developments in the Biden administration’s attack on President Trump and the rule of law. WHISTLEBLOWER: HUNDREDS OF AFGHANS ON TERROR WATCHLIST RELEASED IN U.S. Our southern border isn’t our only security vulnerability. The Biden administration is also abdicating its duty to protect America when it comes to vetting so-called refugees from Afghanistan. According to a Defense Department whistleblower, political appointees in the national security bureaucracy are the problem. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27884&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWZnaGFucy1vbi10ZXJyb3Itd2F0Y2hsaXN0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]. Hundreds of unvetted Afghan refugees released in the United States by the Biden administration are on a Department of Defense (DOD) watchlist of suspected and known terrorists, according to a Pentagon whistleblower. The database is known as Biometrically Enabled Watchlist (BEWL), and it identifies individuals whose unique physical characteristics have been flagged by analysts to be national security threats. Some 324 Afghan evacuees who appear in the system were freed in the U.S., the DOD whistleblower says. The information has sparked outrage among some members of Congress who assert known suspected terrorists were let into the U.S. last year [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27895&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGF3bGV5LnNlbmF0ZS5nb3YvaGF3bGV5LWdyaWxscy13cmF5LXdoaXN0bGVibG93ZXItYWxsZWdhdGlvbnMtYmlkZW4tYWRtaW4tY3V0LWNvcm5lcnMtYWZnaGFuLXZldHRpbmc/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] “ after the administration’s botched withdrawal from Afghanistan.” At least two U.S. Senators are demanding and immediate investigation by the DOD Inspector General. In a letter [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=27896&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzLzEzODIwOC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] to the Pentagon watchdog, the lawmakers, Josh Hawley of Missouri and Ron Johnson of Wisconsin, write that the whistleblower’s information may show the Biden administration’s failure to vet those evacuated from Afghanistan was even worse than the public was led to believe. The whistleblower also alleges that political appointees at the National Security Council (NSC) and DOD instructed agency personnel to cut corners when processing evacuees in Afghanistan and at staging bases in Europe, the lawmakers write. Rather than administer fingerprint tests on all ten fingers, personnel were told to abbreviate tests to promote the rushed evacuation from Afghanistan. “Finally, it is alleged that personnel at the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) who work on vetting Afghan evacuees have been authorized to delete old biometric data, whenever they personally believed that such information is out of date,” the senators write. “This is a troubling development that could threaten national security and public safety.” The legislators want the DOD IG to investigate how many BEWL matches were generated by biometric submissions from Afghan evacuees, how many of those individuals were denied entry in the U.S., how many were admitted and how many are currently in the country. They also want to know the number of BEWL matches generated by evacuees after their arrival in the U.S. and what steps have been taken to identify, vet and deport the individuals who appeared on the watchlist or if the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has investigated any of them. The probe also needs to reveal if political appointees at the NSC or DOD instructed personnel to administer abbreviated fingerprint tests to Afghan evacuees, according to the senators, and under what conditions may agency personnel delete biometric information. They specifically want to know if any biometric information associated with Afghan evacuees been deleted. The disturbing security lapses exposed by the whistleblower come on the heels of a federal audit [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=26844&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tZWRpYS5kZWZlbnNlLmdvdi8yMDIyL0ZlYi8xNy8yMDAyOTQwODQxLy0xLy0xLzEvRE9ESUctMjIyLTA2NS5QREY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] confirming that dozens of Afghan refugees released in the U.S. were flagged by the Pentagon for “potentially significant security concerns.” In that probe the DOD IG found that the agency responsible for clearing the Afghans by conducting thorough background checks is not doing its job, creating serious national security issues, and undoubtedly threatening the safety of Americans. The agency is known as the National Counterterrorism Center (NCTC) and it functions under the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI). It was launched in the aftermath of the 2001 terrorist attacks by consolidating intel gathered by the FBI, Central Intelligence Agency (CIA), DHS, and the DOD. Besides missing the significant DOD security concerns of at least 50 refugees, the nation’s lead counterterrorism intelligence entity also failed to stop at least four dozen Afghans with “derogatory information” in their record, the watchdog found. Under the Biden administration’s Operation Allies Welcome (OAW), approximately 80,000 “displaced persons from Afghanistan” have been admitted into the country under a special immigrant visa (SIV) or humanitarian parole. The president directed the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to lead the chaotic plan to resettle the Afghans and the administration assured Americans the refugees would be thoroughly screened. That has not materialized and for months media reports have exposed crimes, including child molestation, assault and domestic violence committed by Afghans housed at military bases throughout the U.S. Until next week ... ### [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59851&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - clean_body: Judicial Watch Court Victory! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: COURT REJECTS BIDEN DOJ EFFORT TO KEEP TRUMP WARRANT AFFIDAVIT COMPLETELY SEALED [] We are aggressively fighting the Department of Justice to uncover all the details of the unprecedented August 8, 2022, raid on the home of former President Trump. In a vindication of our efforts, Magistrate Judge Bruce Reinhart issued a decision [==] that rejected the out-of-hand Justice Department’s brazen play to keep the whole document secret. The Biden administration’s unprecedented and abusive raid on Trump’s home has created a crisis in the rule of law that can only be alleviated with transparency and accountability. We’re thrilled that Americans will get more of both with today’s court decision, finding that at least some more information about this terrible raid should be released. Magistrate Reinhart had called for a hearing [] in West Palm Beach, FL, at which James Moon of the Meland Budwick, P.A. law firm in Miami, argued on our behalf. After the hearing the court issued an order [==] that stated: As I ruled from the bench at the conclusion of the hearing, I find that on the present record the Government has not met its burden of showing that the entire affidavit should remain sealed. It is ORDERED that by noon EST on Thursday, August 25, 2022, the Government shall file under seal its proposed redactions along with a legal memorandum setting forth the justification for the proposed redactions. The court also ordered the release of other documents [] concerning the warrant. Here’s what led up to this decision. On August 9, we filed [==] a motion asking the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Florida to unseal the search warrant materials used by the FBI to raid President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home in Florida (U.S. v. Sealed Search Warrant [] (Case No. 9:22-mj-08332)). On August 11, the DOJ filed a motion [==] offering to unseal certain warrant materials. On August 12, we filed [=] President Trump’s public statement with the court, in which he made it clear that he would not oppose the release of documents related to the raid. Later that day, the DOJ made a partial release [=] of the Trump raid warrant materials. Initially, the Albany Times Union [== and the New York Times [== joined us in filing for the unsealing of the warrant by filing an amicus letter and motion respectively. Other interests later joined in the effort. Magistrate Reinhart ordered [] the Justice Department to respond by August 15 to our Motion to Unseal the warrant and supporting materials behind the FBI raid. In its filing [=], the Justice Department alleged that releasing the affidavit would “cause significant and irreparable damage” to its ongoing criminal investigation. On August 17, we submitted our reply [] to the DOJ’s effort [] to keep under seal the affidavit used to justify the raid. The “criminal investigation” the Biden administration is covering up reeks of corruption and dishonesty – and is based on a reinvention of law about presidential records that is at odds with the U.S. Constitution, court rulings, federal statutes, and prior government legal positions and practice. No administration should be able to raid the home of a former president and putative presidential candidate based on ‘secret’ reasons. We’re pleased that our legal pressure forced the partial release of warrant materials. The U.S. Constitution and federal law give unreviewable authority to President Trump to take whatever records he wishes at the end of his presidency. The Biden administration’s dishonest depiction of personal records of President Trump it illicitly seized during the raid as “classified” is further demonstration that the raid was a brazen act of raw political abuse. The battle for transparency and accountable will continue and require much heavy lifting by your Judicial Watch legal team. If this current crisis doesn’t convince you of the need for Judicial Watch, I’m not sure what will! I encourage to join our cause and support our work directly here []. In the meantime, we will keep you abreast of breaking developments in the Biden administration’s attack on President Trump and the rule of law. WHISTLEBLOWER: HUNDREDS OF AFGHANS ON TERROR WATCHLIST RELEASED IN U.S. Our southern border isn’t our only security vulnerability. The Biden administration is also abdicating its duty to protect America when it comes to vetting so-called refugees from Afghanistan. According to a Defense Department whistleblower, political appointees in the national security bureaucracy are the problem. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [==]. Hundreds of unvetted Afghan refugees released in the United States by the Biden administration are on a Department of Defense (DOD) watchlist of suspected and known terrorists, according to a Pentagon whistleblower. The database is known as Biometrically Enabled Watchlist (BEWL), and it identifies individuals whose unique physical characteristics have been flagged by analysts to be national security threats. Some 324 Afghan evacuees who appear in the system were freed in the U.S., the DOD whistleblower says. The information has sparked outrage among some members of Congress who assert known suspected terrorists were let into the U.S. last year [=] “ after the administration’s botched withdrawal from Afghanistan.” At least two U.S. Senators are demanding and immediate investigation by the DOD Inspector General. In a letter [=] to the Pentagon watchdog, the lawmakers, Josh Hawley of Missouri and Ron Johnson of Wisconsin, write that the whistleblower’s information may show the Biden administration’s failure to vet those evacuated from Afghanistan was even worse than the public was led to believe. The whistleblower also alleges that political appointees at the National Security Council (NSC) and DOD instructed agency personnel to cut corners when processing evacuees in Afghanistan and at staging bases in Europe, the lawmakers write. Rather than administer fingerprint tests on all ten fingers, personnel were told to abbreviate tests to promote the rushed evacuation from Afghanistan. “Finally, it is alleged that personnel at the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) who work on vetting Afghan evacuees have been authorized to delete old biometric data, whenever they personally believed that such information is out of date,” the senators write. “This is a troubling development that could threaten national security and public safety.” The legislators want the DOD IG to investigate how many BEWL matches were generated by biometric submissions from Afghan evacuees, how many of those individuals were denied entry in the U.S., how many were admitted and how many are currently in the country. They also want to know the number of BEWL matches generated by evacuees after their arrival in the U.S. and what steps have been taken to identify, vet and deport the individuals who appeared on the watchlist or if the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has investigated any of them. The probe also needs to reveal if political appointees at the NSC or DOD instructed personnel to administer abbreviated fingerprint tests to Afghan evacuees, according to the senators, and under what conditions may agency personnel delete biometric information. They specifically want to know if any biometric information associated with Afghan evacuees been deleted. The disturbing security lapses exposed by the whistleblower come on the heels of a federal audit [=] confirming that dozens of Afghan refugees released in the U.S. were flagged by the Pentagon for “potentially significant security concerns.” In that probe the DOD IG found that the agency responsible for clearing the Afghans by conducting thorough background checks is not doing its job, creating serious national security issues, and undoubtedly threatening the safety of Americans. The agency is known as the National Counterterrorism Center (NCTC) and it functions under the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI). It was launched in the aftermath of the 2001 terrorist attacks by consolidating intel gathered by the FBI, Central Intelligence Agency (CIA), DHS, and the DOD. Besides missing the significant DOD security concerns of at least 50 refugees, the nation’s lead counterterrorism intelligence entity also failed to stop at least four dozen Afghans with “derogatory information” in their record, the watchdog found. Under the Biden administration’s Operation Allies Welcome (OAW), approximately 80,000 “displaced persons from Afghanistan” have been admitted into the country under a special immigrant visa (SIV) or humanitarian parole. The president directed the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to lead the chaotic plan to resettle the Afghans and the administration assured Americans the refugees would be thoroughly screened. That has not materialized and for months media reports have exposed crimes, including child molestation, assault and domestic violence committed by Afghans housed at military bases throughout the U.S. Until next week ... subject: Biden the Dictator

body:
The only thing missing was Muammar Gaddafi's sunglasses and cap on Joe Biden!

[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/61039312:6m5rjYVNo:m:1:3103520637:BBE73B700D96BF443560F8EEEF97F201:r "Quote") Peter, This was supposed to be a happy email. I was humbled that President Trump endorsed my re-election campaign and was eager to share the news with you. But then Biden decided to weaponize the FBI and go after President Trump, raiding his house in a COMPLETELY unwarranted fashion. In fact, the only thing missing was Muammar Gaddafi's sunglasses and cap on Joe Biden because he has turned America into a banana republic! Listen, if they can come after Trump, what's stopping them from coming after you? **I 'll tell you who - Me! I am demanding an IMMEDIATE investigation into this blatant abuse of FBI power to raid Trump's home.** More importantly - I'm demanding an investigation into Merrick Garland and whether his actions rise to an impeachable offense! **[Help me stop the Left's attempt to turn the USA into the Banana Republic of Bidenstan with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/61039312:6m5rjYVNo:m:1:3103520637:BBE73B700D96BF443560F8EEEF97F201:r "Help me stop the Left’s attempt to turn the USA into the
Banana Republic of Bidenstan with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** This shouldn't even be a partisan issue. We aren't some communist third-world country where the dictator uses government agencies to silence their political opponents. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/61039312:6m5rjYVNo:m:1:3103520637:BBE73B700D96BF443560F8EEEF97F201:r "Tweet")But that's EXACTLY what's happening. The FBI and DOJ are going after every one of the Left's political enemies. And they're getting more brazen with each act. Listen, it's not just President Trump they're going after. Just look at what happened to my friend and Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry. The FBI seized his cellphone as he was traveling with his children! No working with his attorney, no waiting until he was back home. No, they had to embarrass him and scare his poor children with the Goon Squad coming after their dad. We can't let this go on one minute longer! **[The only way this is going to stop is if you step up and help me continue my fight in Congress with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/61039312:6m5rjYVNo:m:1:3103520637:BBE73B700D96BF443560F8EEEF97F201:r "The only way this is going to stop is if you step up and help me
continue my fight in Congress with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today.")** Look, there's a reason why President Trump endorsed my campaign. He knows that I [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/61039312:6m5rjYVNo:m:1:3103520637:BBE73B700D96BF443560F8EEEF97F201:r "Headline")won't sit on the sidelines when there's a fight to be had. **And let me tell you, I 've got my boxing gloves on.** But I can only fight to protect Donald Trump and the other conservatives targeted by Biden's thuggery if you step up and help me win this November. Because as long as Nancy Pelosi sits in the Speaker's chair, the FBI and the DOJ will continue to harass and persecute conservatives like President Trump, Rep. Scott Perry, myself, and other America First members of Congress. And you're next! **[If you want to see our country restored back into one that cherishes freedom and liberty, then I need you all in with your contribution of $100, $500, or $1,000 today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/61039312:6m5rjYVNo:m:1:3103520637:BBE73B700D96BF443560F8EEEF97F201:r "If you want to see our country restored back into one that
cherishes freedom and liberty, then I need you all in with your contribution of $100, $500, or $1,000 today.")** Don't let President Trump be the last freely elected leader of this country. Waiting to get involved will just mean we're one step closer to Biden the Dictator. **[If you cherish democracy and want to save this republic, then donate today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/61039312:6m5rjYVNo:m:1:3103520637:BBE73B700D96BF443560F8EEEF97F201:r "If you cherish democracy and want to save
this republic, then donate today.")** For our freedom, Andy Biggs
Congressman, Arizona's 5th District

body:

|
# Outrage Over Survival Food
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages.Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis.It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore.Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies.That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.).Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food – it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Ljulig)**These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._w) when you get yours today.It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal:[**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._BB6NhCwg)**FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today.That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website.And you get...**FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again.**FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos.**FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order.But that's not all because you also get...**FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE.**FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit.**FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food.But we're still not done, because you also get...**FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal.But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get...**FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you.**[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**Isn't that great?The best part is...You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile.[**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan – with no interest!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock.**Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises.[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-ux2JhUQlc20fk-FJQ)First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you.Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value.That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years.**[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**You need to get 'er done today.Why?Because if you don't [**take action**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-WXyU_eX4Jg) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine."And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless.But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-waUvefNRNoLrqy7JA).When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit.**As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do.**[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-mqFTXlQ)**To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters| | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
**[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**

name: Marco
subject: I'm sorry 😞
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I just want to start off by saying - I'm so sorry.

I hate that I have to drop into your inbox like this, but I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you get to the end and still think your donation doesn't matter, then you may end up paying more at the pump, in the grocery store checkout, and on Tax Day.

Earlier this week, I fell $3,246 short of my Mid-Month goal. This is a disaster since a poll on Tuesday showed me LOSING to a former Trump Impeachment Manager. I can't stress this enough, but my race WILL decide whether or not Republicans take back control of our country. That means we have two options:
1. Let a Pelosi-Endorsed candidate continue to outraise us and outspend us on TV until she wins Florida and the Senate.
2. **We can start working like a team to stop the Democrats from running our country into the ground.**

I know you get a lot of these messages, but these are REAL goals and REAL deadlines we need to meet. _**[I'm humbly asking you to chip in to meet this critical extended deadline and join the team that gets America back on track.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61046773:JQZcsYVfN:m:1:3253819041:56B11096F15175B3A0B88C25AE30A87A:r "I'm humbly asking you to chip in $13 to meet this critical extended deadline and join the team that
gets America back on track.")**_
---
| | | [STAND WITH MARCO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61046773:JQZcsYVfN:m:1:3253819041:56B11096F15175B3A0B88C25AE30A87A:r "STAND WITH MARCO")
---
Do I need to remind you that just last week it was reported that my opponent raised more in one month than I was able to raise all of last quarter? **My opponent is gaining momentum and I desperately need your support.**
---
| | | [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61046773:JQZcsYVfN:m:1:3253819041:56B11096F15175B3A0B88C25AE30A87A:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM >>")
---
Please, I'm begging. **Don't look back and wish you did more.**

- Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |

* * *
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61046774:JQZcsYVfN:m:1:3253819041:56B11096F15175B3A0B88C25AE30A87A:r "POLLS TIED!") I'm not going to lie, this scares me. We are less than 100 days until the election and my far-Left opponent is raising millions of dollars and gaining ground in the polls.

I'm sick and tired of people saying that Florida isn't going to be a tight race, because clearly, it is. This poll is the latest proof that the Democrats' plan is working. Far-Left progressive groups are pouring in millions of dollars to try to win this Senate seat. The truth is, **I will lose if I don 't have your support.**

Please, I'm begging: **[Will you chip in right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61046774:JQZcsYVfN:m:1:3253819041:56B11096F15175B3A0B88C25AE30A87A:r "Will you chip in right now?")** | | [SEND IMMEDIATE HELP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61046774:JQZcsYVfN:m:1:3253819041:56B11096F15175B3A0B88C25AE30A87A:r "SEND IMMEDIATE
HELP")
---

body:
Prices are up 10% and climbing!
[](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-r/) Friend,Just went to the store to pick-up a FEW items for the family and was shocked at how much everything has gone up! I know our local grocery retailers hate to raise prices but with a surge in energy, shipping and packaging costs; they have no choice. [_**Inflation is taxation, that is why I need your help to stop these destructive policies. Can you chip-in now?**_](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-y/)**The buck stops with Biden. ** [HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE FOR INFLATION >>](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-j/) According to the Consumer Price Index (CPI) food prices have outpaced overall inflation, rising 10.4% compared to a year ago. The Democrats have had two years to fix our supply chain issues and have done nothing.[**🍞 up 10.8%**](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-t/)[**🍚 up 11.9% since June!**](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-d/)[**🐟 up 11%**](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-h/)[**🥩 up 8.2%**](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-k/)[**🐖 up 9%**](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-u/)[**🐔 up a whopping 17.3%**](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-o/)This is why it is important we elect conservative leaders **NOT** out of touch elites who can't understand the struggles Arkansas families face. While we are experiencing sticker shock at the grocery, Biden is telling us to eat cake.As your Lt. Governor I will continue to fight for policies that lower inflation, energy prices, taxes, and create an environment where businesses can thrive. [**_But I need YOU to help make this happen, can you make a donation today?_**](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-b/) For Arkansas,Leslie Rutledge Sent from my iPhone [DONATE NOW TO FIGHT BIDEN'S INFLATION](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-n/) [](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-p/)[](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-x/)[](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-m/) | [Unsubscribe](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-u-ncdle-iklydrtjlj-c/)

name: John Gomez  - Campaign Manager
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail 8/19
body:
Cincinnati FOP Endorsement, festivals, and more events in OH-01!
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 8/19/22
Good evening,Team Chabot has been working hard and traveling throughout the district. One of the biggest updates this week is that Congressman Chabot has been endorsed by the Cincinnati Fraternal Order of Police! Congressman Chabot has also been traveling to events throughout the district to spread the campaign's message of getting our country back on track!Read on for a full update from the trail! **_Congressman Chabot on the Trail_** _Non-Stop Door Knocking_ Congressman Chabot has been working tirelessly to bring the campaign's message directly to voters doors. This week, the Congressman personally knocked doors in Deer Park and Lebanon. The responses were positive; people are ready to get our country back on track and end the failed policies of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi! _Second Sundays on Main_ Last weekend, Congressman Chabot stopped by the Second Sunday on Main festival in Over-the-Rhine. We were happy to see so many folks out enjoying the event and the beautiful neighborhood! _The OFF Market_ Congressman Chabot also attended the OFF Market in Blue Ash this past weekend. It was a perfect day and wonderful to see so many folks supporting their community and local vendors! **_Congressman Chabot Endorsed by Cincinnati Fraternal Order of Police_** "I have always stood with the men and women of law enforcement and will continue to be a champion for our police, first responders and all those who serve to protect the public safety," said Congressman Steve Chabot. "I'm incredibly honored to receive this endorsement and look forward to continuing my service as a strong advocate for our men and women in blue and all first responders in Congress.""My record stands in clear contrast with that of my opponent who has chosen to side with the most radical elements of his party in an attempt to defund our local police," Chabot continued. "While Cincinnati faced rising homicides and violent crime, my opponent pushed a plan WLWT called 'the definition of defunding' the police."Learn more about Greg Landsman's plan to defund the police [HERE](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-y/). _This Week 's Blog - "Joe Biden Doesn't Care_ _"_ This week's blog post is about the one year anniversary of the debacle in Afghanistan and the situation that has unfolded since:_" Afghanistan has become just what we went into Afghanistan following September 11 to stop in the first place - a haven for terrorists. But Joe Biden doesn't care"_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-j/). Have a great weekend.Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-t/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-i/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-h/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-u/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-b/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tyutkukd-l-p) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. [Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyutkukd-961825B2-kujkulhluu-z) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-tyutkukd-kujkulhluu-v/)

Hello,
Fox News and my opponent Chuck Grassley are hot to paint me as “liberal.” They’re already calling me a radical socialist who is the most liberal person to ever run for office. (*eye roll*)
Bit of history: Iowa was one of the first states to open college for women, to elect women to public office, and admit female lawyers to the bar. We were the second state in the nation to allow interracial marriage and the first state to desegregate public schools. Iowa is home to America’s oldest mosque, and we were the third state to recognize same-sex marriage.
You would think the good Senator would recall these events... Perhaps Grassley has forgotten Iowa and who we are – or maybe he’s just once again playing partisan politics and courting the support of far-right fringe groups to try to win reelection.
**Iowa has always been a place of progressive values, and I am running against Chuck Grassley because it’s time to return our state to its roots of advocating equality and caring for one another.**
Chuck Grassley, his Super PAC buddies, and Fox News are already attacking me and even my military service. The polls show a close race, and if I defeat Grassley this November, Democrats are guaranteed to keep our Senate majority this November.
**I’m ready to fight back, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give me the tools to do it. We need to raise another $125,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and right now, we are falling dangerously short.**
[**I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, so I have only grassroots donors like you to turn to: Please, will you make a donation to my campaign right now – whatever amount you can afford before our midnight deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49483839/362339596/-42398318?refcode=em20220820am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTFiNzJhOC03ZjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vJ1c7a0wRpYoUbxUCGAcYzs5cdrpOYnkXuFOBR0Usjc=)

clean_body: Fox News and my opponent Chuck Grassley are hot to paint me as “liberal.” They’re already calling me a radical socialist who is the most liberal person to ever run for office. (eye roll) If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Hello, Fox News and my opponent Chuck Grassley are hot to paint me as “liberal.” They’re already calling me a radical socialist who is the most liberal person to ever run for office. (eye roll) Bit of history: Iowa was one of the first states to open college for women, to elect women to public office, and admit female lawyers to the bar. We were the second state in the nation to allow interracial marriage and the first state to desegregate public schools. Iowa is home to America’s oldest mosque, and we were the third state to recognize same-sex marriage. You would think the good Senator would recall these events... Perhaps Grassley has forgotten Iowa and who we are – or maybe he’s just once again playing partisan politics and courting the support of far-right fringe groups to try to win reelection. Iowa has always been a place of progressive values, and I am running against Chuck Grassley because it’s time to return our state to its roots of advocating equality and caring for one another. Chuck Grassley, his Super PAC buddies, and Fox News are already attacking me and even my military service. The polls show a close race, and if I defeat Grassley this November, Democrats are guaranteed to keep our Senate majority this November. I’m ready to fight back, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give me the tools to do it. We need to raise another $125,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and right now, we are falling dangerously short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m going to be called a lot of things by the Republicans between now and November. But with your help now, Chuck Grassley will be calling me to concede on Election Night. Thank you for everything you do, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2va0cgueob7k68cuuhad0h2ejlhbj4dtf8vp64o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ei3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfacb4c9i68p9kesrr6pphmlpr4srje5ij9orkcqpr2tlicuqjbctme9pbadr7m1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojecr4s1rmcphmcipm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm0p74sdge8p724no)

********I 'm at my wits' end, Friend. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.** If Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. **I have Trump 's endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zko3jepojs4s0lrv3tvf4gopjh9sq3915voscbfg_rp22sh2s8i66or0cjie6o74cjh2bs) The point is, Friend, I'm the toughest Republican running for office. If I can't beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I'm going to be blunt with you. [**If you chip in just $5 right now**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zipmn4rcndgl6gacn80b4442squtbivaj9p1gcn8_rp22sh2s8i66or0cjie6o74cjh2bs), I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Pelosi's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? [**DONATE TODAY**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z67h305t8ni25tlimaa92l1dnk2h6ejc8g76epag_rp22sh2s8i66or0cjie6o74cjh2bs) You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke [**DONATE TODAY**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6g9o4ll9uvkkob2ld3bdpknd6di7ll43bl6d3fo_rp22sh2s8i66or0cjie6o74cjh2bs)

name: Marco
subject: My opponent is gaining momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I just want to start off by saying - I'm so sorry.

I hate that I have to drop into your inbox like this, but I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you get to the end and still think your donation doesn't matter, then you may end up paying more at the pump, in the grocery store checkout, and on Tax Day.

Earlier this week, I fell $3,246 short of my Mid-Month goal. This is a disaster since a poll on Tuesday showed me LOSING to a former Trump Impeachment Manager. I can't stress this enough, but my race WILL decide whether or not Republicans take back control of our country. That means we have two options:
1. Let a Pelosi-Endorsed candidate continue to outraise us and outspend us on TV until she wins Florida and the Senate.
2. **We can start working like a team to stop the Democrats from running our country into the ground.**

I know you get a lot of these messages, but these are REAL goals and REAL deadlines we need to meet. _**[I'm humbly asking you to chip in to meet this critical extended deadline and join the team that gets America back on track.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61046776:6cPOTYVNI:m:1:3331421248:D3B1900F5A00388AB0CFA952850B64A3:r "I'm humbly asking you to chip in $13 to meet this critical extended deadline and join the team that
gets America back on track.")**_
