name: Nikki Fried
subject: It’s the final countdown
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Not asking for money

https://nikkifried.com/ [https://nikkifried.com/]
Peter,
First of all, I want to say thank you.
We just finished our final fundraising push before the August primary, and I can’t tell you how grateful I am for this team and for all the support you’ve given me over the past year.
We’ve built an incredible grassroots team. We’ve built up our momentum. And we’ve built a movement strong enough to beat Ron DeSantis this November.
Now, it’s time to win this thing.
Anything you can do to help us out in these last three days — whether it’s volunteering to help us get out the vote [https://www.mobilize.us/nffg/event/487680/] , joining me for a stop on our Something New bus tour [https://www.mobilize.us/nffg/] , or just letting your friends and family know how to make a plan to vote [https://makeaplantovote.com/] — will make a huge difference in our fight for a new, better path forward.
https://makeaplantovote.com/ [https://makeaplantovote.com/]
My entire life, I’ve stood up for what I believe in. I’ve fought for what’s right. And I’ve delivered real change for Florida families.
I’m ready to continue my fight for a woman’s right to choose, for common-sense gun safety, and for a lower cost of living for all Floridians as your next Governor. And with your help, I know we can get it done.
Thank you so much for standing with me in this fight. Let’s win this race!
— Nikki

Miami, FL 33143

name: Val Demings (Poll Update)
subject: I wanted to tell you this personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
I clearly have momentum on my side. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49495920/362387471/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220820_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmYzMmM2Zi05ODIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfT8WqtbAkdjtD0cKKZIYm5-oFYoN-YhEfP-7CAWSCs=&emci=649cac44-4e1d-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=72f32c6f-9820-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)
---
Friend – You're a key part of this movement, so I wanted you to be the first to know this: **For months, polls have shown me behind Marco Rubio – but after we outraised him nearly 3 to 1 last quarter, another brand-new poll released last week shows us TIED, 46-46!** This is the SECOND poll released within 1 week that shows me TIED in a race that could decide Senate control – and _I never could have made this incredible progress without supporters like you._ **Here's the problem:** Marco Rubio and Mitch McConnell just spent $500,000 on TV ads in key areas of Florida to take back the lead, and there's no doubt national Republican PACs will pour even more money into attack ads against me when they see this week's polls. I clearly have momentum on my side – but with the GOP running ads that misrepresent me and everything I stand for, I need to make serious investments in voter outreach immediately. **I need to raise $150,000 before midnight to counter GOP attacks. | | Peter, Our Republican opponent, Alek Skarlatos, is flooding the airwaves with a bevy of lies. He's lying about his support for the minimum wage. He's lying about his stances on the environment. He's going all in to hide his MAGA extremism from Oregonians. Worst of all, Peter? He's raising and spending more money than we are, and all that cash is allowing him to mislead voters about his positions on the critical issues. We're never going to have special interests backing us like Alek does, and frankly, we don't want their support. We're going to win this election the way Democrats have been winning for years: with an army of grassroots supporters like you. [**There's plenty of upcoming opportunities to get involved with our campaign. Click this link and get involved today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49496048/362388945/1117039676?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDczYjhjZS05ODIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibkUuzkKuUht_VaCLnodEOv9FDWKPrcWk7WDZeVZBKA=&emci=4d57436a-0f20-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1473b8ce-9820-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579) [Sign me up!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49496058/362388956/1279677572?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDczYjhjZS05ODIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibkUuzkKuUht_VaCLnodEOv9FDWKPrcWk7WDZeVZBKA=&emci=4d57436a-0f20-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1473b8ce-9820-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579) Our field team and our awesome volunteers have been out there all summer, pounding the pavement, ringing doorbells, making phone calls, sending texts, and spreading the word about why we need to elect Val Hoyle to Congress. We know what's at stake, Peter. Abortion rights are on the line. Workers' rights are on the line. Our environment is on the line. _Democracy itself is on the line_. **When we put in the work to turn out our voters, Democrats win.** Democrats took back the House in 2018 because we stood united against the authoritarian dangers of the Trump presidency. We stood together again in 2020, and took back the White House _and_ the Senate. In 2022, we can't afford to lose that momentum and go backwards. This district is critical to holding our Democratic majorities. clean_body: | | | | Peter, Our Republican opponent, Alek Skarlatos, is flooding the airwaves with a bevy of lies. He's lying about his support for the minimum wage. He's lying about his stances on the environment. He's going all in to hide his MAGA extremism from Oregonians. Worst of all, Peter? He's raising and spending more money than we are, and all that cash is allowing him to mislead voters about his positions on the critical issues. We're never going to have special interests backing us like Alek does, and frankly, we don't want their support. We're going to win this election the way Democrats have been winning for years: with an army of grassroots supporters like you. Our field team and our awesome volunteers have been out there all summer, pounding the pavement, ringing doorbells, making phone calls, sending texts, and spreading the word about why we need to elect Val Hoyle to Congress. We know what's at stake, Peter. Abortion rights are on the line. Workers' rights are on the line. Our environment is on the line. Democracy itself is on the line. When we put in the work to turn out our voters, Democrats win. Democrats took back the House in 2018 because we stood united against the authoritarian dangers of the Trump presidency. We stood together again in 2020, and took back the White House and the Senate. In 2022, we can't afford to lose that momentum and go backwards. This district is critical to holding our Democratic majorities. Fired Up; Ready to Go! | | **On Israel - directly from me**
---
| | Last week I had the honor of joining members of the **American Jewish Committee of Westchester-Fairfield** for a conversation about important issues and those of particular concern to the Jewish community. While the AJC is a non-partisan organization that does not endorse candidates, it’s an important conversation that you should tune in to, I hope you’ll take 45 minutes out of your day to listen. Combating antisemitism in all its forms, standing up to hatred, extremism and threats to democracy here and abroad cannot be “conditioned”. I stand with Israel and will vote to promote Israel’s security and full integration in the community of nations. You can watch the conversation here :

Team,

We’re gearing up for a new round of televised January 6 hearings that will start next month. So before they start, we want to know:

Will you thank the January 6 commission and demand Donald Trump and the Treason Caucus be held accountable?

YES! >> https://act.makechangewith.us/a/thank-the-jan6-commission-for-revealing-the-truth-mathis

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: less partisanship, more partnership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
I have been most grateful to learn about what it means to fully be a partner – in work, in love, and in life.
| | |
---
Peter, I have learned a lot in my adult life – how to raise a family, how to move forward in the wake of grief, how to dream big and pursue those dreams with everything I have, how to deliver for my community when it matters most.
**But I have been most grateful to learn about what it means to fully be a partner – in work, in love, and in life.**
I have been lucky enough to learn about being a partner from two amazing spouses. Before we lost my first husband to cancer, he and I stumbled through being newly weds to parents of six and everything in between with grace, love, and patience. There were times where I wasn’t sure my heart could open up that way again, but over the last seven years, my second husband, John, has once more shown me the strength, support, and purpose you can find in being a partner. **Hand in hand, we make hard choices, we celebrate life's very best moments, and we take on its biggest challenges together.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49496942/362392173/-1843232826?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk234-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODliNDA4Mi05OTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3otwqgVWXS3-uOwSN4gCtkf94CIasJVir-D62xx65Ms=)
These partnerships have taught me about finding joy, about coping with loss, and about pushing yourself to do what you never imagined would be possible. **They have shown me that at the root of partnership is the ability to sit down and really listen to each other, to truly empathize with and understand each other, and to care for each other with tenderness and compassion through everything life throws our way. **
These are the same skills that I learned to use as a nurse, a mother, and a children's volunteer. **You see, that's how you bridge divides, overcome adversity, and bring people together, even when everything else feels like it's falling apart – with an honest commitment to real partnership.**
And let me tell you, Washington sure could use more of that. It's time for leaders to choose empathy and compassion over extremism and greed. It's time to put aside political agendas and work _together_ for a better future.**It's time to cast aside partisanship and move forward together in partnership.**
I'm ready to be a partner to my colleagues in the Senate as we work hard to find solutions to big problems and overcome gridlock. I'm ready to be a partner to Missourians and give them a voice in Washington. And I'm ready to be your partner in this fight for progress – but I need you to be invested in this work too. **[That's why I have to ask: Please can you pitch in $5 or whatever you can spare to send this nurse's heart to Washington and bring decency, compassion, and grit to the Senate? Together, we can win leadership in Washington](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49496943/362392181/-1843232826?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk234-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODliNDA4Mi05OTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3otwqgVWXS3-uOwSN4gCtkf94CIasJVir-D62xx65Ms=).**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49496944/362392182/-1843232826?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk234-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODliNDA4Mi05OTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3otwqgVWXS3-uOwSN4gCtkf94CIasJVir-D62xx65Ms=)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49496945/362392183/-1843232826?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk234-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODliNDA4Mi05OTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3otwqgVWXS3-uOwSN4gCtkf94CIasJVir-D62xx65Ms=)

---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49496953/362392187/-1843232826?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk234-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODliNDA4Mi05OTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3otwqgVWXS3-uOwSN4gCtkf94CIasJVir-D62xx65Ms=)
---
I'm so grateful for your support, your commitment, and, of course, your partnership.

With so much gratitude,
Trudy
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5sNAQQN7RUy0KByOPWpWlQ2?unsubscribedata=%2F66KvqS8APShCppyKckdQGjurJ8M7q%2F75hyPWJg31sv5iPmpzXsOkLqk8aSS4rJ%2BK5eriC4JRQSdXqdO2GEN25rudaggYPUPqMzRTnwfGO36SDzPs2BMSBWZIVbsps1OLhsoNeDYn44GGfyexgMzC8wk4kUNXLjQ%2FthXUS1WBrUHdcKaoBkm5ZQ7%2FDlkQrw74ciK71%2FY0PPsv%2Bno%2BtCFsXeGDgiofORZWvVZ5v0QlCYJwmnCTkBDSLq9rXtbQezf73gZX9DlGmbwt7Tybx9YQsFRXh1A5coX7TC3JRmJSHFNRLtQN8gedWMexefg9pbwchxEJDK3l2i6pOJQDmPrw%2BQnhbePZ518L5IbuTuC5dw%2By%2FlzqvjRuI4YCQQKDT41RQ7StYQFakveqGiSjNJ6ajDpAfoTF%2FXmxgc%2BMqkqfs8%3D) Contributions to Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate are not tax deductible. | | 2022 | Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate

name: Kari Lake
subject: re: DeSantis said he’d send troops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Arizona
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047334:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r)
---
Peter, For too long, Republicans have stood on the sidelines while the Radical Left waged war on our values. We stayed quiet while they turned our schools into indoctrination centers. We did nothing while our border was left wide open for drugs and criminals to walk into our communities. We refused to fight back when they called us the most terrible names you've ever heard. **Then real, conservative leadership came along. THE NEW RIGHT, as I like to call it. I'm talking about leaders like President Donald Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis. ** **They're not afraid of the left. They're not afraid to fight back. And neither am I.** That's exactly the kind of attitude we need to SAVE AMERICA. That's why I'm bringing that same Trump and DeSantis BDE to Arizona.
---
**[SUPPORT KARI: SAVE AMERICA>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047335:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r)**
---
Make no mistake... my race for Governor of Arizona is the most critical race in the country. The reason is simple: the crisis at our state border is a crisis for every American. And we cannot afford to lose the battle for border security by electing another socialist in a border state. [**_I AGREE >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047334:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r) **I promise, on Day 1 --when I take my hand off the Bible after giving the Oath of Office--I will issue a Declaration of Invasion on our Southern Border and we stop people from illegally crossing.** When we see those cartel drones flying across the border, we're gonna shoot them down. I'm also going to blow up the drug tunnels... and I don't care if there's a Narco-Terrorist in there when we do it. And then we're going to finish what President Trump started and FINISH THE WALL. It's a vital security issue for Arizona, but it is about the security of our entire nation. Recently, I even spoke with Ron DeSantis, myself. **He agreed that if I'm in office, Florida will send National Guard troops to help secure our border.** Because that's what it takes to save our country right now. It takes transformative leadership.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047334:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r)
---
We've seen what Trump was able to accomplish for our nation. We've seen the great things Ron DeSantis has done in Florida. Now, it's time to see what we can do in Arizona. But Peter, I really need your support. Will you chip in today to secure a victory for the NEW RIGHT so we can SECURE OUR BORDER?
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $100 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047336:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $75 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047337:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $50 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047338:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $35 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047339:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047334:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r)
---
I know we've seen what the other side has to offer.
_And we 've seen what it means when we don't fight back._ **We must work together NOW to send the message that we are sick and tired of the political elite. We are ready to SAVE AMERICA. ** I know how important it is to fight. I'm up for it. I'm ready. I just need your support now to make sure I have the chance. **Thank you in advance for helping carry the NEW RIGHT over the finish line in Arizona in November.[https://secure.winred.com/kari-lake-for-arizona/action-shiraz-6650605](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047334:JMzPyYVNq:m:1:3331421248:0BB1D94E1C69FE0DDB03A68F46733AB6:r)** Sincerely,

subject: Important updates for you
body:
We're facing an uphill battle, Derek, and with these investments, our job just got harder.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49497043/362392664/-1072566757?refcode=jtk656-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDliNDA4Mi05OTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1O4t2R8Wcsl09yUff-wZ9ULm0GJgsoTXH7YIxRN4kG4=&emci=eca60f3b-4a1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=dd9b4082-9920-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek, we'd like to share a few important updates with you:
First, our Republican opponent was just added to the NRCC's Young Guns list. Then, Kevin McCarthy confirmed that he is hyper-focused on flipping Pennsylvania's 6th District.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49497044/362392667/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk656-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDliNDA4Mi05OTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1O4t2R8Wcsl09yUff-wZ9ULm0GJgsoTXH7YIxRN4kG4=)
So, as the GOP invests millions to take back the House, they are directing attention and resources to unseat Chrissy.

We're facing an uphill battle, Derek, and with these investments, our job just got harder.
As a mother, entrepreneur, and teacher, nobody is more prepared to advance the issues of importance to working families. In this year alone, Chrissy became a founding member of the New Democrat Coalition’s Inflation Working Group, and since going to Congress, she has returned $27 million to Berks and Chester County families.

On the other hand, too many Republicans have shown they are either unable or unwilling to advance legislation that benefits everyday Americans. In fact, just recently, the House passed the Inflation Reduction Act, which will lower the costs of health care, prescription drugs, and utilities, while also addressing climate change – and yet, not a single Republican voted for it!

That's why, with all signs indicating the GOP will pour millions into this race, we need to make sure we have the resources to fight back against their false attacks and spread our positive message of progress for working families.
This campaign is powered by folks like you who share Chrissy's vision that we can make Pennsylvania a better state for everyone. We need to get that message out on TV, in mailboxes, and more. **But all of that costs money, and we need your help.**
**[Please, Derek, will you donate $5 to defend PA-06 and the House from extremist Republicans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49497045/362392669/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk656-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDliNDA4Mi05OTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1O4t2R8Wcsl09yUff-wZ9ULm0GJgsoTXH7YIxRN4kG4=)**

name: Kari Lake
subject: Our border was left wide open for drugs and criminals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Arizona
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048205:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r)
---
Peter, For too long, Republicans have stood on the sidelines while the Radical Left waged war on our values. We stayed quiet while they turned our schools into indoctrination centers. We did nothing while our border was left wide open for drugs and criminals to walk into our communities. We refused to fight back when they called us the most terrible names you've ever heard. **Then real, conservative leadership came along. THE NEW RIGHT, as I like to call it. I'm talking about leaders like President Donald Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis. ** **They're not afraid of the left. They're not afraid to fight back. And neither am I.** That's exactly the kind of attitude we need to SAVE AMERICA. That's why I'm bringing that same Trump and DeSantis BDE to Arizona.
---
**[SUPPORT KARI: SAVE AMERICA>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048206:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r)**
---
Make no mistake... my race for Governor of Arizona is the most critical race in the country. The reason is simple: the crisis at our state border is a crisis for every American. And we cannot afford to lose the battle for border security by electing another socialist in a border state. [**_I AGREE >>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048205:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r) **I promise, on Day 1 --when I take my hand off the Bible after giving the Oath of Office--I will issue a Declaration of Invasion on our Southern Border and we stop people from illegally crossing.** When we see those cartel drones flying across the border, we're gonna shoot them down. I'm also going to blow up the drug tunnels... and I don't care if there's a Narco-Terrorist in there when we do it. And then we're going to finish what President Trump started and FINISH THE WALL. It's a vital security issue for Arizona, but it is about the security of our entire nation. Recently, I even spoke with Ron DeSantis, myself. **He agreed that if I'm in office, Florida will send National Guard troops to help secure our border.** Because that's what it takes to save our country right now. It takes transformative leadership.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048205:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r)
---
We've seen what Trump was able to accomplish for our nation. We've seen the great things Ron DeSantis has done in Florida. Now, it's time to see what we can do in Arizona. But Peter, I really need your support. Will you chip in today to secure a victory for the NEW RIGHT so we can SECURE OUR BORDER?
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $100 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048207:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $75 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048208:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $50 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048209:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $35 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048210:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048205:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r)
---
I know we've seen what the other side has to offer.
_And we 've seen what it means when we don't fight back._ **We must work together NOW to send the message that we are sick and tired of the political elite. We are ready to SAVE AMERICA. ** I know how important it is to fight. I'm up for it. I'm ready. I just need your support now to make sure I have the chance. **Thank you in advance for helping carry the NEW RIGHT over the finish line in Arizona in November.[https://secure.winred.com/kari-lake-for-arizona/action-shiraz-6650605](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048205:J-2sCYVNe:m:1:3334294963:B85EDB3EC9221886D81379FCFC1938AF:r)** Sincerely,

The Supreme Court’s overturning of _**Roe v. Wade**_ has put reproductive care on the ballot this November. The GOP is intent on banning abortions and limiting access to reproductive care, but I will always take a stand to protect the right to choose.

In Congress, I plan on fighting to codify _**Roe v. Wade**_ and protect healthcare access for all. No one should be able to stand in the way of our most basic rights and freedoms. If we want to have any chance of protecting our rights in the future, we need to make sure the House stays blue in November.

clean_body: I’m so proud to announce that I’ve been endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund and NARAL. | = | In times like these, we need to ensure that we’re electing leaders that will advocate for protecting reproductive rights. That’s why I’m so proud to announce that I’ve been endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund and NARAL.= | = The Supreme Court’s overturning of Roe v. Wade has put reproductive care on the ballot this November. The GOP is intent on banning abortions and limiting access to reproductive care, but I will always take a stand to protect the right to choose. In Congress, I plan on fighting to codify Roe v. Wade and protect healthcare access for all. No one should be able to stand in the way of our most basic rights and freedoms. If we want to have any chance of protecting our rights in the future, we need to make sure the House stays blue in November. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = In solidarity, Jevin * | | = Paid for by Friends of Jevin D. Hodge Friends of Jevin D. clean_body: | | | | Friend, Friends are honest with each other, so I’m going to shoot you straight.I’m worried that our top Republican supporters like you may have been sleepin’ on Wisconsin for far too long. I’m not pulling this out of thin air either, just look at the polls and how much Democrats are out-raising Republicans. We’re being chased like a sardine in a shark tank! Democrats are about to give us a whooping like no other because they’re lying through their teeth about Wisconsin being a safe Republican state WHEN ITS ACTUALLY ON THE ROPES! We need to put an end to their Left of Lenin nonsense, "Johnson1" | | | "Johnson2" Democrats want to put this race away before next Sunday. You know our basic rights to bear arms, to free speech, to low taxes, and all that? Well consider them gone for if the liberals have their way. Taking back the Senate Majority won’t be easy, but if everyone reading this email can generously spare just $5 , then I can promise you that we’ll be on the right track. "Johnson3" Thank you for your support, Senator John Kennedy | | | "footer image" A note from Ron Johnson: Friend, I just found out who my opponent will be... Democrats have promised to fundamentally destroy America and my opponent, who himself has said the Founding of America was “awful,” is no different. As a Tea Party patriot, grandpa, and businessman, I REFUSE to let radical leftists turn America into a Liberal wasteland. I am not willing to risk our country’s future. And I can promise you this: I will NEVER stop fighting for freedom. "Johnsonfooter"** | | "button" | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. Coming to you personally because this *is* personal for me.

The connections and powerful corporate donors many of my colleagues rely on weren’t available to me.

**And even if they were, I wouldn’t want them.**

With our campaign being funded by grassroots supporters like you, I am _only_ beholden to the people of this nation — which means I get to _wholeheartedly_ focus on this nation.

_That’s why this fight is so personal to me, Peter._ NY-15 deserves a representative that has no qualms about pushing for what’s right.

**But as we approach the final months before the election, we aren’t on track to hit our $20,000 goal.**

I know you know how important these goals are, Peter. If we fail to hit even one, it could set us back months in terms of reaching voters.

[**_So please: Before midnight tonight, will you split $5 or whatever you can afford between me and Shontel Brown to help me stay in Congress?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49499180/362398352/-1012064091?refcode=EM_FR_220820TorresSplitResend_SplitRT_RT_90DO_9_G_N_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTg0YjlmZS05YzIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tLXBOpUpft_ra3AAPpYl8hSqrkT3YJa-1fVWsRBa6lk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation between Ritchie Torres and Shontel Brown will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49499181/362398353/-1012064091?refcode=EM_FR_220820TorresSplitResend_SplitRT_RT_90DO_9_G_N_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTg0YjlmZS05YzIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tLXBOpUpft_ra3AAPpYl8hSqrkT3YJa-1fVWsRBa6lk=)**

name: Madison
subject: 72 hours left...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
FINAL COUNTDOWN
UNTIL THE RUNOFF
mailtimers.com [https://gifcdn.com/d1j60rjgb9h6cpj2d9h.gif]
Friend,
We have just 72 hours left until our August 23rd runoff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/msh] ! Thanks to contributions from supporters like you, we’ve traveled to all 77 counties and built strong coalitions in every community across Oklahoma.
Still, we only have hours left to reach voters! That means we need all hands on deck to reach our fundraising goals and ensure that we are able to respond to the relentless attack ads that James Lankford has prepared for us after our runoff.
CONTRIBUTE
We need help to knock on doors, travel across the state for meet and greets, and make sure we’re hearing from everyday Oklahomans from all walks of life [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/msh] ! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/msh] We are so close to being able to take on Lankford this November, but we’re not there yet: we need your help.
YOUR contributions will help us secure this victory! Can I count on your support? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/msh]
We need to finish this runoff in the strongest position possible? With your support, we can take action for all Oklahomans [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/msh] .
Let's get to work!
Madison
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93512/images/madison%20horn-crop.png]
VOTE ‘To Bring Logic Back to Politics’
Runoff Election: Tuesday, August 23rd
General Election: Tuesday, November 8th
To find out more about the elections, early voting, and voting by mail, visit the Oklahoma Election Board [https://oklahoma.gov/elections/voters.html?contactdata=s7uTodIeFl94VfTFGbas83z1CmxRBxkU9giiA%2BnAMM%2FUUx0v6kWX5YaS712%2F%2Fse5n8F8o%2FGLY426fuRtxMT4xMN6k9vgaOKwXdEzpEUxHo4%3D]
https://www.facebook.com/madisonhorn.ok/ [https://www.facebook.com/madisonhorn.ok/] https://twitter.com/madisonhornok [https://twitter.com/madisonhornok] https://www.instagram.com/madisonhorn.ok [https://www.instagram.com/madisonhorn.ok] https://www.linkedin.com/in/madison-horn-a16a9567/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/madison-horn-a16a9567/]

Oklahomans for Madison
PO Box 2601
Oklahoma City, OK 73101
United States

Madison [] VOTE ‘To Bring Logic Back to Politics’ Runoff Election: Tuesday, August 23rd General Election: Tuesday, November 8th To find out more about the elections, early voting, and voting by mail, visit the Oklahoma Election Board [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison Oklahomans for Madison PO Box 2601 Oklahoma City, OK 73101 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Kari Lake
subject: Secure our border ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Arizona
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047374:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r)
---
Peter, For too long, Republicans have stood on the sidelines while the Radical Left waged war on our values. We stayed quiet while they turned our schools into indoctrination centers. We did nothing while our border was left wide open for drugs and criminals to walk into our communities. We refused to fight back when they called us the most terrible names you've ever heard. **Then real, conservative leadership came along. THE NEW RIGHT, as I like to call it. I'm talking about leaders like President Donald Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis. ** **They're not afraid of the left. They're not afraid to fight back. And neither am I.** That's exactly the kind of attitude we need to SAVE AMERICA. That's why I'm bringing that same Trump and DeSantis BDE to Arizona.
---
**[SUPPORT KARI: SAVE AMERICA>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047375:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r)**
---
Make no mistake... my race for Governor of Arizona is the most critical race in the country. The reason is simple: the crisis at our state border is a crisis for every American. And we cannot afford to lose the battle for border security by electing another socialist in a border state. [**_I AGREE >>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047374:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r) **I promise, on Day 1 --when I take my hand off the Bible after giving the Oath of Office--I will issue a Declaration of Invasion on our Southern Border and we stop people from illegally crossing.** When we see those cartel drones flying across the border, we're gonna shoot them down. I'm also going to blow up the drug tunnels... and I don't care if there's a Narco-Terrorist in there when we do it. And then we're going to finish what President Trump started and FINISH THE WALL. It's a vital security issue for Arizona, but it is about the security of our entire nation. Recently, I even spoke with Ron DeSantis, myself. **He agreed that if I'm in office, Florida will send National Guard troops to help secure our border.** Because that's what it takes to save our country right now. It takes transformative leadership.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047374:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r)
---
We've seen what Trump was able to accomplish for our nation. We've seen the great things Ron DeSantis has done in Florida. Now, it's time to see what we can do in Arizona. But Peter, I really need your support. Will you chip in today to secure a victory for the NEW RIGHT so we can SECURE OUR BORDER?
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $100 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047376:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $75 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047377:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $50 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047378:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $35 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047379:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047374:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r)
---
I know we've seen what the other side has to offer.
_And we 've seen what it means when we don't fight back._ **We must work together NOW to send the message that we are sick and tired of the political elite. We are ready to SAVE AMERICA. ** I know how important it is to fight. I'm up for it. I'm ready. I just need your support now to make sure I have the chance. **Thank you in advance for helping carry the NEW RIGHT over the finish line in Arizona in November.[https://secure.winred.com/kari-lake-for-arizona/action-shiraz-6650605](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61047374:6dkwYYVN6:m:1:3317145305:276DCDD2914EF02335DD327BEBCB94C0:r)** Sincerely,

**Nevadans deserve the absolute best representation in Congress.** It’s why I ran in the first place and why I know that my extremist opponent doesn’t fit the bill to be our next representative.
We’ve always been a state where common sense has prevailed over rash decision making, and we’re better because of it.
In Congress, amidst one of the greatest water crises our country has faced, I led the charge to pass legislation that would revamp our state’s water security.
**It wasn’t partisanship or MAGA values that got this done – it was working across the aisle and voting in the best interests of every Nevadan that did.**
Our next representative in Nevada’s Third District needs to be someone who leads with a proven steady hand. I’m confident that my record shows that, but I know April Becker will put politics over people the first chance she has.
This election will determine the future of every value we hold close to us as Nevadans. _I’m running to preserve our rights, bolster our economy, and put Nevada first in all that I do – including the fight to bring the first Democratic presidential primary to our state._

Peter,

I have an urgent ask and I need your help _immediately_.

This is the last weekend before the Florida Primary Election, and we are running at full capacity to get out the vote.

name: =?utf-8?Q?JAMES=20JUDGE?=
subject: James Judge backs the blue and is supported by law enforcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Judge for Congress
body:
James Judge, the Republican front runner in Florida's 14th Congressional District is endorsed by Pinellas County Sheriff Bob Gualtieri, the Tampa PBA | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6f6a3cc62e4f/running-for-congress-in-my-hometown-13685368?e=00028e5542)
---
[](https://judgepr.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=cb05d63a23&e=00028e5542)
Good morning,While you slept last night, I went on a ride-along with Tampa Police Department’s men and women in uniform.The squad I was embedded with seized two pistols and an AK-47 out of the hands of criminals. Additionally, they confiscated $3,000 in counterfeit currency and removed a significant amount of drugs off of the streets of Tampa.Two suspects were arrested by the team I was with and booked into Orient Road Jail.We also responded to a complaint of criminal mischief and two different reports of shots fired, finding fired shell-casings and bullets on the ground. It’s hard to believe, but according to the officers, that was a slow night.Sadly, my opponent, Kathy Castor, co-sponsored legislation to defund police and has done what she can to make their jobs more difficult. When I get to Washington, I promise that I will have local law enforcement’s back. While I do believe we must balance the budget and we need less federal government, I will do absolutely everything I can to support our local men and women in law enforcement.Not only do I support law enforcement, but law enforcement is supporting me by endorsing my campaign. I’m honored to say that I am endorsed by the Tampa Police Benevolent Association, and I am also endorsed by Pinellas County Sheriff Bob Gualtieri.Please support law enforcement and vote for their choice this election. Vote James Judge for U.S. Congress in the Republican Primary, Tuesday, Aug. 23.Finally, if you’re interested in supporting Tampa Bay Area LEOs, I would encourage you to visit [TampaPBA.org](https://judgepr.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=7ae62a4a7f&e=00028e5542) or [suncoastpba.com](https://judgepr.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=438bb1db26&e=00028e5542) to see how you can help.
God Bless!\- James JudgeCandidate for U.S. Congress
**Endorsed by Law Enforcement** – Tampa Police Benevolent Association & Sheriff Bob Gualtieri
Tampa Bay Area Native
Small Business Owner
Coast Guard Veteran
Operation Iraqi Freedom & Operation Enduring Freedom
| [DONATE NOW](https://judgepr.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=1e71a40436&e=00028e5542)
---
[](https://judgepr.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=70f69d16fe&e=00028e5542)

name: Jeff Clark Trader

name: BobCasey.com
subject: The vote isn't enough. Women deserve economic and political power.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Will you join Bob in telling Senate Republicans to stop obstructing the Paycheck Fairness Act and make pay equity a reality? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49500710/362404142/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTE5MzczMS1hMTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-A_IrbcKmEuRETQye86colkoG0J91PkhAuhSX985iI4=&emci=3f4db1bb-df1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=19193731-a120-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

It's been 102 years since women secured the right to vote. States didn't just grant that right freely; women had to fight tooth and nail for it. They won, but the fight for equity still isn't over.

Now, more than a century later, the wage gap continues to deny women the chance to fully participate in our electoral system. When Pennsylvania women are paid just 79 cents for every dollar made by men for the same work, it's harder for them to afford childcare, stable housing, food, education, and free time to build civic and political power.

We must end the wage gap to ensure women have an equal voice in politics. Senator Casey co-sponsored the Paycheck Fairness Act in the Senate to hold employers accountable and make it harder for them to hide wage discrimination, but Republicans have continued to block it and hold women back.

[**For women to have political equity, we need pay equity. Will you join Bob in telling Senate Republicans to stop obstructing the Paycheck Fairness Act and make pay equity a reality? Add your name now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49500711/362404143/-1352435556?ms=em22_220820_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em22_220820_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em22_220820_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220820_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=zG%2BKSDIRP54b3DY%2FW2%2FlbtlPk71ye%2B4lx2qHTvsh1PCrbb6hDnI0zgW7BZda%2F7RwrlJuvaoIo9xegEDAZMvvVuFTXKG40tS1y4aKi0LLFoKZ78jGKFfAHfPXOZwiwHjoHSoRicMs%2BROUfZXhsuwqFCiE%2B%2BHi%2FX64dg%2F8%2F%2F81tY7cUO6nGai6jR7vbH6wxmrF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTE5MzczMS1hMTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-A_IrbcKmEuRETQye86colkoG0J91PkhAuhSX985iI4=&emci=3f4db1bb-df1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=19193731-a120-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)

clean_body: Will you join Bob in telling Senate Republicans to stop obstructing the Paycheck Fairness Act and make pay equity a reality? Peter, It's been 102 years since women secured the right to vote. States didn't just grant that right freely; women had to fight tooth and nail for it. They won, but the fight for equity still isn't over. Now, more than a century later, the wage gap continues to deny women the chance to fully participate in our electoral system. When Pennsylvania women are paid just 79 cents for every dollar made by men for the same work, it's harder for them to afford childcare, stable housing, food, education, and free time to build civic and political power. We must end the wage gap to ensure women have an equal voice in politics. Senator Casey co-sponsored the Paycheck Fairness Act in the Senate to hold employers accountable and make it harder for them to hide wage discrimination, but Republicans have continued to block it and hold women back. Pay discrimination of any kind is completely unacceptable. It deprives families of vital income that can be used to feed children, buy or rent a home, and make our communities stronger. But it's not simply an economic issue, nor does it affect all women equally. People of color face an even greater pay disparity, with Latinas making as little as 49 cents per dollar made by men. The wage gap denies women and people of color the opportunity to build power, organize, run for office, and have a say in political decisions that affect their lives. It's time to change that. Thank you, Team Casey | PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

name: Defend Voting Rights
subject: How SCOTUS could further gut the Voting Rights Act:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
In Merrill v. Caster, SCOTUS will consider whether Alabama should be allowed to proceed with a gerrymandered map that clearly dilutes the voting power of the state's Black communities
|
---

---
Friend, Here at the NDRC, we’re proud of the fact that this year’s congressional maps are, by and large, fairer than the maps from the last decade. But a big factor working in our favor has been the willingness of the courts to enforce **critical portions of the Voting Rights Act** that stop states from using election laws to discriminate against minority voters. But, Republicans are tired of playing by the rules. So rather than accepting the rulings of the courts and drawing maps that enable communities of color to elect candidates of their choice, **the GOP is asking the Supreme Court to change the rules to suit its anti-democratic agenda**. | [PITCH IN TO SUPPORT OUR COMPREHENSIVE STRATEGY TO DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49484309/362341018/-1420882025?amount=20&refcode=20220820.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzMWI3MmE4LTdmMjAtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B00VXw5cIapDH3IGVgPgWnvXk6QdH9_ZiYnLLNwMc3o=)
---

In _Merrill v. Caster_ , SCOTUS will consider whether Alabama should be allowed to proceed with a gerrymandered map that includes **just a single congressional district out of seven** that allows Black voters to elect a candidate of choice. With Black voters making up more than a fourth of Alabama’s population, these maps are clearly discriminatory — and two federal courts have agreed so far.
But with a far-right majority that’s proven time and time again it’s willing to disregard clearly established precedent, **we can’t count on SCOTUS to do the right thing**. The good news is the NDRC has a plan to defend our democracy that _doesn’t_ depend on the Supreme Court.
**As A.G. Holder has said, “The power to bring about this positive change rests in all our hands.”** That’s why we’re working on a comprehensive strategy to defend our democracy, including our support of pro-democracy candidates in battleground states across the country who are committed to defending the right to vote and bringing an end to GOP gerrymandering, no matter what the Supreme Court decides in this and other cases.
**But in order to do it, we need your help**. The voter protection and mobilization work we and our affiliates are doing across the country takes a tremendous amount of resources, and grassroots donations are a critical part of our efforts. And with the November elections drawing closer and closer, we’re counting on supporters like you to help us keep it up.
**The GOP has become too extreme and the stakes are too high to sit on the sidelines, friend. If you can, please pitch in today to help the NDRC keep up our work to defend voting rights and protect our democracy:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: In Merrill v. Caster, SCOTUS will consider whether Alabama should be allowed to proceed with a gerrymandered map that clearly dilutes the voting power of the state's Black communities | Friend, Here at the NDRC, we’re proud of the fact that this year’s congressional maps are, by and large, fairer than the maps from the last decade. But a big factor working in our favor has been the willingness of the courts to enforce critical portions of the Voting Rights Act that stop states from using election laws to discriminate against minority voters. But, Republicans are tired of playing by the rules. So rather than accepting the rulings of the courts and drawing maps that enable communities of color to elect candidates of their choice, the GOP is asking the Supreme Court to change the rules to suit its anti-democratic agenda. | = In Merrill v. Caster , SCOTUS will consider whether Alabama should be allowed to proceed with a gerrymandered map that includes just a single congressional district out of seven that allows Black voters to elect a candidate of choice. With Black voters making up more than a fourth of Alabama’s population, these maps are clearly discriminatory — and two federal courts have agreed so far. But with a far-right majority that’s proven time and time again it’s willing to disregard clearly established precedent, we can’t count on SCOTUS to do the right thing. The good news is the NDRC has a plan to defend our democracy that doesn’t depend on the Supreme Court. As A.G. Holder has said, “The power to bring about this positive change rests in all our hands.” That’s why we’re working on a comprehensive strategy to defend our democracy, including our support of pro-democracy candidates in battleground states across the country who are committed to defending the right to vote and bringing an end to GOP gerrymandering, no matter what the Supreme Court decides in this and other cases. But in order to do it, we need your help. The voter protection and mobilization work we and our affiliates are doing across the country takes a tremendous amount of resources, and grassroots donations are a critical part of our efforts. And with the November elections drawing closer and closer, we’re counting on supporters like you to help us keep it up. The GOP has become too extreme and the stakes are too high to sit on the sidelines, friend. If you can, please pitch in today to help the NDRC keep up our work to defend voting rights and protect our democracy: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = — Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. Peter, Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis campaigned with me yesterday.
You might not know from Gov. DeSantis’s incredible popularity and success today, but he won _very_ narrowly in 2018...
...because **he faced the same headwinds I face** : a hostile media, dead-set on **painting conservatives as “extremists”** and pushing a radical Democrat to victory.
Under Gov. DeSantis, **Florida has led the national fight to preserve liberty** ... but if _only_ _a few thousand votes_ had gone the other way in 2018, they’d be a **locked-down Far-Left socialist dystopia.**
That’s the choice voters face in Pennsylvania in 2022:**will we join Florida in embracing freedom and prosperity... or double-down on the failed policies of the Far-Left?**
Gov. DeSantis and I aren’t letting Pennsylvania go without a fight.
But we need you to help **amplify our efforts and make sure we reach EVERY voter** in the next few days, while the limelight’s on Pennsylvania.
[**Join the fight by pitching in any amount, big or small, to make the difference >>**](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxdkc1u3CAUhZ_G3tmCa4zxwou2o2yyatSqmRUiwNgo_FjYJJo8fcFxW6kSAnEOHD7u1ROmFI3jQADVamICjYjVZgIEgBggDBhh1o49MN33WkvcMQqsIkg7YWyrQprJHN5aGVy9TAg6rZXoB0owEkoAYbTDTJEXTG6EjrWdln1ft6r7UsFDHpuWKer23fioVQnJ2i0a7dXWhFtT4hsntj0a4UP2lOMqeB4c90ly6xvrgWvHD94B91X3EEtkNH6uussek66Apt1xp5VJLmsH-CluIUWps-il5cKt1tzupyXzVpjZZ7OUAg__OAqC2E3hsHe3GlmyRSGyOm3ciuTlci6k4OUHPwkZHv_EB79rv38-3URBfjD6yH69Zpt7a1Q2_hMXo3LdLi9XSB-4jpNa3421ZqND7sZ8dKM04fzFVA1fK4DjEsBRb7g-enFdfs4f35vX56fmecbFgm953u-r_nvujGjPSkE1XH4DVB2xKQ)

Doug

body:
Would you consider helping

Friend,

I know my team has sent a fair number of emails lately, so I wanted to take a moment to explain why these messages are so important - especially since we missed our fundraising deadline only months away from the general election.

Elections have consequences. Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer have imposed their dangerous liberal policies on the American people, and we are worse off because of it. This is your future if Democrats win again in November. They will win, if we don't act and lay the groundwork for victory now.

_**[If you don't have the time to read the whole email, I understand - but please consider chipping in $3 before signing off.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6sr1u2m5ldja73fi2078pofnmhs2hitenins730_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1i68oj2cjh2bs "If you don’t have the time to read the whole email, I understand – but please consider chipping in $3 before signing off.")**_

I know November seems like a lifetime away, but it will be here in the blink of an eye and will have massive consequences.

Here's the truth:

I am fully reliant on grassroots donations to fuel my campaign against them. YOU are the reason why I was governor of SC and UN Ambassador, and YOU are the reason I'm fighting for lower taxes, small business support, cutting back unnecessary federal spending, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations to come.

We are just FOUR SEATS away from flipping the majority in the House, retiring Pelosi, and stopping the Democrats' agenda in its tracks.

We are just ONE SEAT away from flipping the majority in the Senate, protecting the filibuster, and stopping Biden's reckless spending.

With these amazing primary victories, we have seen a path to victory that Republican candidates nationwide can follow. It's exciting to think about just how many blue districts can turn RED this year.

**_[Will you make a $3 donation before midnight to help us make up for missing our deadline? We'll invest it immediately to make sure voters hear the truth about conservatives so we can flip the House and the Senate.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3o6o2rhkjmo37dftrecmdrolmik56tg87batmko_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1i68oj2cjh2bs "Will you make a $3 donation before midnight to help us make up for missing our deadline? We’ll invest it immediately to make sure voters hear the truth about conservatives so we can flip the House and the Senate.")_**

My very best,

Nikki R. Haley

body:
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048347:6smTuYVsN:m:1:3317145305:5045FCAB6F027D6106CA6F253F219C71:r)**

Peter,
Time is short, so I'll be blunt. I rarely send messages like this, but this is important.

**We 've just learned George Soros is doubling down on his commitment to fund radical Left candidates for office. He's spending MILLIONS to advance the radical Left's agenda.**

subject: Are you ready for change?

body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/K80IoBtScUKMviWXAMvX8A2?unsubscribedata=1ISi5%2BvxsjPVoDaXkJJvVgu%2Bh0leezn8XKPetrADZah8NA2XIRvxGaDNceJ7KezT%2FDLeIaoSBuU7V05e%2Fdncfyd5QfmUjLrNS%2FmOkZgfQzo6Pe7eRNwPthf1L%2F59DrZSO2luAhtC%2Frviz%2B4WEiDoIncCIDcTFnArkRc5QG3QQmqFalm6AeNwOUMj6zRu97z2tQ0jUWhOMUrgmDhZgYlmIXVuSvKwZeicZDjp2ma2daAdQ57Jud2XxLQnaIBNAlFdpDn7UlAn3KENSRfUCE875ZjQyT9Ws7VpeRJCdNVBerdGTLz%2FCGFcrICT8STc6iUuFbBbBNlrDNLvIVhCCyFhtiadyUGmhaskMHTGjh16DP74%2F3yuKEStgXq4QmM1B6WpEZ5zvHCq2uA8W0YLKElWqnxh5i%2ByOwii7eCKp3owH6Q%3D)

| Hi there,

I’m following up with you regarding my team’s email from earlier this week — see below.

Unlike Moran, I don’t have special-interest cash to burn on disinformation ads or a ballot measure to strip us of our rights. I have just 11 days to reach my goal of raising $25,000 in August — and I’m still $7,300 away.

[**I rely on you and your grassroots support to get out the word about my pro-choice campaign for U.S. Senate. If you’re with me, click here to donate today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49502916/362411643/-963777892?amount=10&source=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220820_1_4&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDZiZWFiYS1hNTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRcaEPPL990B6eASA3nBAheQjuq_n0Q_grxUBqJKm3k=)
* * *
_Original Message from Team Holland:_

Team,

On August 2nd, Kansans turned out in record numbers to reject a constitutional amendment that would have opened the floodgates to a total abortion ban in our state.

You helped protect women's rights in Kansas, and now we need to do it across the nation in November. **[**It’s past time we elect someone to make reproductive healthcare the law of the land. We need to raise $25,000 in August for Mark’s race for Senate — can you chip in right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49502917/362411644/-963777892?amount=10&source=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220820_1_4&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDZiZWFiYS1hNTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRcaEPPL990B6eASA3nBAheQjuq_n0Q_grxUBqJKm3k=)
** | | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49502918/362411645/-963777892?amount=10&source=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220820_1_4&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDZiZWFiYS1hNTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRcaEPPL990B6eASA3nBAheQjuq_n0Q_grxUBqJKm3k=)**
---

Did you know Jerry Moran’s PAC donated $50,000 to the campaign behind the anti-abortion measure? But that’s not all: Moran ran his own ads trying to convince people to vote yes on the measure and overturn abortion access here in Kansas — it’s clear he is out of touch with voters.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49502919/362411646/-963777892?amount=10&source=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220820_1_4&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDZiZWFiYS1hNTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRcaEPPL990B6eASA3nBAheQjuq_n0Q_grxUBqJKm3k=)**
**** We cannot send Jerry Moran back to Washington to undo all the work we did at the polls on August 2nd. The only sure way to protect abortion care in Kansas is by expanding the Democratic majority in the Senate.

After Jerry Moran invested $50,000 into the anti-choice ballot measure, you stopped him. Now, we must vote him out before he tries to roll back our rights at the federal level.

Mark is running to be the 51st Democratic vote to protect access to abortion care here in Kansas and across the country. But we need to reach our monthly goal to do it:**[**Support Mark’s pro-choice campaign, click here to donate today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49502920/362411647/-963777892?amount=10&source=MH_EM_FR_3MO_220820_1_4&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDZiZWFiYS1hNTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRcaEPPL990B6eASA3nBAheQjuq_n0Q_grxUBqJKm3k=)**

Thank you for your continued support,

Team Holland

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

Mark is running to be the 51st Democratic vote to protect access to abortion care here in Kansas and across the country. But we need to reach our monthly goal to do it:= Thank you for your continued support, Team Holland | | | = Meet Mark: Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years. name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Will you help us launch our first flight of mailers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Asif Mahmood For Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49503022/362412256/1493062117?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjkyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDM3ZmVlNS1hNjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ch6nV1nHThbfp2GO5F6TfQOqn2zniZBzBkJ682cBTM=)
Friend,

With just 80 days until Election Day, our big focus is to quickly build my name recognition amongst Democrats, Independents, and even persuadable Republican voters across the 40th district.

Our Field Director Hanieh -- and the rest of our organizing team -- have been doing an excellent job getting the word out at events and on voters’ doorsteps. Now, it’s time for the next layer of our voter outreach: a robust communication plan that includes mailers, TV and digital ads, and even some radio segments. We start these programs very soon and need your help launching them.

**[Next week, thousands of our mail pieces will begin hitting mailboxes across the 40th. To fully fund this effort, we're aiming to raise $24,000 by midnight on Sunday for printing and postage costs. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Mississippi’s next generation – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132572?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear #VALUE!,

**Do you know someone that might be interested in taking part in the Mississippi Leadership Academy? **

This new initiative aims to nurture and prepare the next generation of leaders in our state. Starting in the fall, our program is designed to equip young leaders with the skills and knowledge necessary to be effective agents for change.

**If you know a student or young professional that might benefit by taking part, please let them know. **Applications are now open.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c3bedb3aaf&e=5703353baa)
---
| Confirmed participants so far include:
**Shad White, State Auditor**
**Hon Chip Pickering**
**Lynn Fitch, Attorney General**
**Matt Ridley, author**
**Daniel Hannan, author**
**Aaron Rice, Mississippi Justice Institute**
The program will explore some of the problems that our state faces, and consider what we might do to ensure that there is greater opportunity and prosperity in the future.

**With young people often exposed to negative ideas about America and our nation’s past, we will look at the Founding and the role that freedom has played in making America a success story we can be proud of.**

Participants in the program will meet one day a month for six months, starting in October and graduating in May. Those that graduate will receive recognition of their participation and their role in this future leadership program. For more details about the program, [click here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=38fbcc7b92&e=5703353baa)

Entirely unrelated to any of that, this week I was in Hattiesburg talking to this delightful group about the work of the Mississippi Center for Public Policy.
---
|
---
| Each month I speak at several similar events all around the state. If you are looking for a speaker, do please [get in touch here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f0fbad769e&e=5703353baa)

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=af36d5e2c9&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=51d22ea29e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=51d22ea29e).

Hello,
We have incredible news: **Lieutenant Colonel Alexander Vindman has endorsed Admiral Mike Franken to help him defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue!**
You know Lt. Col. Vindman from when he bravely testified to Congress during Trump’s first impeachment hearings after he overheard the infamous “perfect” phone call between Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. (The one where Trump tried to withhold military aid to Ukraine...)
Now he’s endorsed Mike Franken because “we need to elect Admiral Mike Franken to the U.S. Senate to protect democracy here at home and abroad." With over 36 years of service in the Navy, Mike Franken would be the most senior military person ever elected to the Senate.
**All the early polls show a close race, but Mike’s not taking any corporate PAC money. So if he’s going to fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and send Grassley packing this November, Mike’s counting on grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you join Lt. Col. body:
I wouldn’t be here writing to you today if my mom hadn’t had access to safe and legal abortion care. | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49503160/362412989/2097321191?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220813roe_michaela_actives_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZjZTc5OC1hODIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2VfgR9iXFHyYLJVixO0MWY29TVhVnDsHORx_T-opf2U=)

_Content warning: mentions of assault_ Friend, my mom was 15-years-old when she was sexually assaulted and became pregnant. Access to abortion saved her life. Fifteen years later my mom had completed her education, married, and was ready to start a family. That’s where I come in ❤️ I wouldn’t be here writing to you today if my mom hadn’t had access to safe and legal abortion care. I’m thankful that she had the opportunity to make her own choice, and that she is open to sharing her story with other young women like me so that we know _**our bodies and our futures are ours.**_ I’m extremely scared of what the future holds for the next 15-year old girl who becomes pregnant. With the Supreme Court decision, her rights are completely dependent on what state she lives in. Republicans in Congress have already put forward legislation that would ban abortion with no exceptions. **The GOP is now just 5 seats shy of getting the House Majority and having the votes to pass their nationwide abortion ban.** I’m managing Dr. Kermit’s campaign because I know from personal experience what’s at stake this November. I’m proud to be working for a pro-choice doctor, and excited that we have one of the best chances in the country at flipping a red seat blue in November. **[I’m asking you to join me in fighting for abortion rights, Dr. Kermit, and the Democratic Majority by donating today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49503161/362412990/2097321191?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220813roe_michaela_actives_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZjZTc5OC1hODIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2VfgR9iXFHyYLJVixO0MWY29TVhVnDsHORx_T-opf2U=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Republicans in Congress have already put forward legislation that would ban abortion with no exceptions. The GOP is now just 5 seats shy of getting the House Majority and having the votes to pass their nationwide abortion ban. I’m managing Dr. Kermit’s campaign because I know from personal experience what’s at stake this November. I’m proud to be working for a pro-choice doctor, and excited that we have one of the best chances in the country at flipping a red seat blue in November. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In solidarity, Michaela Campaign Manager, Kermit Jones for Congress | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Getting ready to begin another school year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Will you share your thoughts?
Peter -

It's nearly that time of year again - our kids and grandkids are heading back to school, marking the end of what has turned out to be an eventful summer for folks across the country.

As the son of two now-retired public school teachers and the father of two kids who attend public school, I know all about the mixed emotions this time of year holds for many of us: excitement, anxiety, pride, and more.

It seems that every year, our kids and their schools are facing new challenges - from the COVID-19 pandemic to gun violence, attacks on fundamental curriculum, and now monkeypox outbreaks. I understand the concerns folks have - and, as a dad and as your representative, I'm committed to working every day to fight for the safety of our students and teachers.

Peter: **I 'm reaching out today because I want to hear from _you_.** As we head into the new school year, I'm gathering your responses so I can get a better sense of what's most important to you and your family as our schools open their doors.
**What are your top priorities this school year?** Securing more federal government funding for public schools Keeping students and teachers safe from COVID-19 and monkeypox Investing in job training and apprenticeship programs Keeping our schools safe by passing common-sense gun-safety legislation Expanding food programs for students Ensuring students meet learning standards Providing mental health support for students and teachers Attaining support for after-school programs Funding for extracurricular sports and arts programming Other | [SUBMIT](https://act.myngp.com/el/QDkogOoi70pqznsZrWuCffq6Tny5OZP443ZOIF22yAY=/kZv35DJdJbfQlbhg01SrKwUuN7ifokpTjuw29dn9ISQ=?ms=em22_220820_bcksch_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em22_220820_bcksch_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em22_220820_bcksch_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220820_bcksch_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
---
I wish I could sit down with each and every one of you to talk with you about your priorities, but surveys like this are the next best way I can learn what's on your mind. Your responses are important to me, and I look forward to hearing from you.

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

name: New Hampshire Republican State Committee
subject: 🚨ONLY 80 DAYS LEFT🚨
body:
New Hampshire Republican State Committee

|
## It's Saturday August 20th and that means there are...
**And that means...**
## Republicans are only 80 days away from taking back the House and the Senate!
Republicans across New Hampshire are confident going into November elections, but we can't leave any room for complacency. We must fight with all we have until the very end! But, we are still in need of **YOUR** help to win that fight! Your contributions toward our Republican Party give us the resources we need to push back against Democratic attacks! We not only need to get New Hampshire back to how it used to be with Republican leadership, but we need to make it even better than ever before! The only way we can make that happen is by replacing our current Democrat _followers_ with Republican _leaders_. Can NH Republicans count on you? | [](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYn8iabWRI7KWXu5-Qd595Y_pa_VzKwtKo9cA-C_p_daK&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=80_days_until_nov_8&n=1 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYn8iabWRI7KWXu5-Qd595Y_pa_VzKwtKo9cA-C_p_daK&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=80_days_until_nov_8&n=1)

name: Melanie
subject: Let's return NY-03 back to the people.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists)
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49504460/362418375/598325089?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220820mel15months_m_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDgwZmM1Yi1hYjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFn1QtOwmYiInCDMpyu72x92KGaxL0Pr8VVkzDqhbP8=)
---
Hi Peter Willis,
We launched our campaign 15 months ago, and our momentum has never stopped building — and with just days until our primary, it has our opponents scared.
The last thing the establishment wants is a working-class mom backed by all of the grassroots organizations and dozens of trusted community leaders who is running to upend the status quo and fight like hell for our families. They are scared that this seat will go back to the people and away from the lobbyists and the politicians who care more about having a seat than creating change.
I do not come from wealth. I am not part of the political establishment. I have not spent decades trading favors with people of influence. I'm a mom of three, a healthcare advocate, non-profit co-founder and community organizer who is tired of seeing our country slip into facism, our rights rolled back and our communities sold out to lobbyists.
We have built the largest and broadest coalition in NY-03.
We have earned more endorsements than anyone else in this race.
We have knocked more doors and spoken to more voters than every other campaign — by far.
We are the only campaign that can win in November because we are the only campaign that has been putting in the work, building on-the-ground to bring in new voters and exciting our disenfranchised base. We are fighting to guarantee our rights, ensure people have healthcare, end gun violence, save our planet, lower costs for our families and protect our democracy — and we are doing it together with our communities and for our families.
Join us. Let's return NY-03 back to the people.

clean_body: | | = Hi Peter Willis, We launched our campaign 15 months ago, and our momentum has never stopped building — and with just days until our primary, it has our opponents scared. The last thing the establishment wants is a working-class mom backed by all of the grassroots organizations and dozens of trusted community leaders who is running to upend the status quo and fight like hell for our families. They are scared that this seat will go back to the people and away from the lobbyists and the politicians who care more about having a seat than creating change. I do not come from wealth. I am not part of the political establishment. I have not spent decades trading favors with people of influence. I'm a mom of three, a healthcare advocate, non-profit co-founder and community organizer who is tired of seeing our country slip into facism, our rights rolled back and our communities sold out to lobbyists. We have built the largest and broadest coalition in NY-03. We have earned more endorsements than anyone else in this race. We have knocked more doors and spoken to more voters than every other campaign — by far. We are the only campaign that can win in November because we are the only campaign that has been putting in the work, building on-the-ground to bring in new voters and exciting our disenfranchised base. We are fighting to guarantee our rights, ensure people have healthcare, end gun violence, save our planet, lower costs for our families and protect our democracy — and we are doing it together with our communities and for our families. Join us. Let's return NY-03 back to the people. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Melanie | Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd Congressional District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal.
