| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49504717/362419208/-420428835?refcode=20220820_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTgxZGJjYi1hYjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WON3ZjEjnXxmrT3P_KnOre8q9CV7iUNPNRZ47SAx29A=) I'll be honest: Things aren't looking good. **First** , Donald Trump came to Georgia and held huge rallies with my opponent, Herschel Walker – all to fire up the GOP base and flip this seat. **Then** , Walker received an outpouring of support from Republican donors across the country. He has raised over $20 MILLION to defeat me. **Now** , we're launching TV ads to fight back against the GOP and reach as many voters as possible with our people-powered message. **But we’re on track to miss our goal – which means we****risk having to cut back on our ads.** **Unlike Walker, I've made the decision to reject any and all corporate PAC money – meaning our campaign is 100% fueled by folks like you. That's why I'm coming to you, with this urgent ask:** [**Will you chip in $15 or more now – as much as you can spare before our crucial midnight deadline – between my campaign and Serve America to help us keep our ads on the air, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49504718/362419209/-392698372?refcode=20220820_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTgxZGJjYi1hYjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WON3ZjEjnXxmrT3P_KnOre8q9CV7iUNPNRZ47SAx29A=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49504719/362419210/-420428835?refcode=20220820_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTgxZGJjYi1hYjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WON3ZjEjnXxmrT3P_KnOre8q9CV7iUNPNRZ47SAx29A=)

body:
The Senate just announced a bipartisan bill to protect our elections

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49505110/362420201/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODcwYTE1OC1hZDIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6dPDVC5k9YW7hSCjlc713waIBWAXWeUXqyO-_lcJv_o=&emci=28217c00-371f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8870a158-ad20-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Late last month, Mark and a bipartisan group of Senators announced a breakthrough on legislation that would make our elections stronger. It’s two bills, actually, that together take important steps to prevent candidates from stealing elections in the future. And we want the Senate to know how important this effort is to people in Virginia. ****[_Sign Mark’s petition now — urge the Senate to protect our elections by passing the Electoral Count Reform and Presidential Transition Improvement Act and the Enhanced Election Security and Protection Act._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49505111/362420202/-1598113172?refcode=mw_em_220820_1&ms=mw_em_220820_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODcwYTE1OC1hZDIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6dPDVC5k9YW7hSCjlc713waIBWAXWeUXqyO-_lcJv_o=&emci=28217c00-371f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8870a158-ad20-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)**** Two years ago, we saw how fragile our federal elections can be if a single candidate and their supporters are willing to overturn the will of the people. We must prevent something like what we saw on January 6 from ever happening again. The first bill clarifies how Congress is meant to certify and count electoral votes for President and Vice President. It also makes it harder for members of Congress to object to the counting of votes, and limits the ability of states to send fake slates of electors to Congress. The second bill doubles the penalties for threatening or intimidating election officials, poll watchers, voters, or candidates. Mark’s goal is to move on these pieces of legislation as quickly as possible to ensure they are in place for the 2024 election. Let’s show him that Virginia is with him and his colleagues on protecting our elections. ****[_Sign Mark’s petition now in support of crucial efforts to prevent stolen elections._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49505112/362420203/-1598113172?refcode=mw_em_220820_1&ms=mw_em_220820_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODcwYTE1OC1hZDIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6dPDVC5k9YW7hSCjlc713waIBWAXWeUXqyO-_lcJv_o=&emci=28217c00-371f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8870a158-ad20-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)**** Thank you, Team Warner ** ** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49505113/362420204/-1598113172?refcode=mw_em_220820_1&ms=mw_em_220820_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODcwYTE1OC1hZDIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6dPDVC5k9YW7hSCjlc713waIBWAXWeUXqyO-_lcJv_o=&emci=28217c00-371f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8870a158-ad20-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)****

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: What a future without abortion rights looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
If my opponent has the opportunity to implement his extreme anti-choice agenda

**** Friends — I’ve said before that this campaign, here in Colorado’s 7th District, could determine whether or not abortion rights in this country are protected. It’s one of the biggest contrasts of the race: I am staunchly pro-choice, while my opponent applauded the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade, and even supports the cruel Texas abortion ban, which includes no exceptions for rape or incest. **So let me talk a bit about what this country will look like if my opponent has the opportunity to implement his extreme anti-choice agenda.** It looks like doctors being arrested for the act of performing abortion care. It looks like women being arrested for deciding that now is not the time to start a family. It looks like Colorado’s protections for the right to choose getting overturned. It looks like women who miscarry being forced to carry their babies to term. I’m not laying out these possibilities to scare you. I’m simply being candid that if an anti-choice governing majority gains power, the impact on women’s rights will be grave. **[As your Congresswoman, I will fight with everything I’ve got to protect and restore the right to choose. But I am up against over $4 million in spending from anti-choice special interests — and I can’t defeat them without your help. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: This is alarming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Don Bolduc, a far-right extremist running against me, is leading the polls in New Hampshire.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49505501/362421279/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1524-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzVmYWI3Ni1hZTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWFiQ-EHzZJq7AEGGCumQyFzJb4OeGZ6gpnAIdMkCbw=)

This is alarming, but I need you to read:
**Don Bolduc, a far-right extremist running against me, is leading the polls in New Hampshire.**
This isn't just bad news for our Senate majority – it's bad for our democracy.
Bolduc continues to push the Big Lie and baseless election fraud claims and even “promised to defy the presidential election results, should he be called upon to do so in 2024."
And that’s not all—Bolduc says he is open to abolishing the FBI and even recently called to repeal the 17th Amendment, which allows voters to elect their Senators directly.
Don Bolduc's dangerous rhetoric couldn't be more out of touch with Granite State values, and if elected, he would only drag New Hampshire backward.
With everything from reproductive rights (Bolduc said we should “rejoice” at Roe being overturned) to the fate of our planet (he said climate is “not a priority”) on the line, we cannot afford to have Don Bolduc in the United States Senate.
That's why I'm reaching out to you today, team. Defending this seat and our Senate majority is the only way we can stop Mitch McConnell and extreme Republicans like Bolduc from enacting their far-right agenda.

clean_body: Don Bolduc, a far-right extremist running against me, is leading the polls in New Hampshire. | | | = This is alarming, but I need you to read: Don Bolduc, a far-right extremist running against me, is leading the polls in New Hampshire. This isn't just bad news for our Senate majority – it's bad for our democracy. Bolduc continues to push the Big Lie and baseless election fraud claims and even “promised to defy the presidential election results, should he be called upon to do so in 2024." And that’s not all—Bolduc says he is open to abolishing the FBI and even recently called to repeal the 17th Amendment, which allows voters to elect their Senators directly. Don Bolduc's dangerous rhetoric couldn't be more out of touch with Granite State values, and if elected, he would only drag New Hampshire backward. With everything from reproductive rights (Bolduc said we should “rejoice” at Roe being overturned) to the fate of our planet (he said climate is “not a priority”) on the line, we cannot afford to have Don Bolduc in the United States Senate. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, team. Defending this seat and our Senate majority is the only way we can stop Mitch McConnell and extreme Republicans like Bolduc from enacting their far-right agenda. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = The stakes of this race have never been higher, so I need your support now more than ever. name: Carl Marlinga
subject: re: my team's message (2)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLINGA FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | Hey there Peter, Carl here. My finance team sent over an email yesterday regarding the dark money pouring into this district. I need your help to fight back against John James and his dark money-funded campaign. We need to fight back and help Carl combat this dark money with a strong, grassroots effort. **[Can you chip in any amount and help me keep pace?](http://links.marlinga4congress.com/u/click?_t=67a14e5cf5744cf5a340c02746c8071e&_m=5f83026c89254f1d8b60d61b17d66c69&_e=uMQ6bzRuxMHMaPU78I35cNCsx_ebhE6qlnSV1B_wO5o39XRclueMMT-Yr6DTyqkzm3kGxk0nc9HFaXQb6MC7AZSjzFbDU0nlr_NFKPWEr9jVd8uMocndjwPWsUIqT3Vp4HLJNJpu8fnuw2SBBAN-PyT13yGeBdJJRQcMJtVL05FNMFaghAMq9Nqx8gnVQjsz-STUdsf0k8jzFxpDsEZYG74yRo-HRzo7EN35f_deRQDUptEFm9TX_vwKKPkGxcu0rTpfegB98pyLXal5xGL1-5AAEOt-jTAmbuVfFUbFw9cwyzubaTOxcL2JypuojlHx6AJWvHXTpsLu8IotAvOFIztmpoWeyO6jPpziH6eqIncNlkKepBhQZ0LPzHxII2GYVdTBXm6-P6JrHY_xtkUA16Po1taT5yuu_8bmD7m977Ujv_Io75I2BLXel8o3W7DlZvuTsGu_rSZwCEq35LfJrXYABdraiX-h_1P4ISuBaSs%3D)** Thank you, Carl _\----- Forwarded Message -----_

From: Marlinga for Congress Finance Team
Date: Fri., August 19 2022 at 1:00 PM
Subject: Dark money again

name: Katie Hill
subject: I'm LIVID....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfUqoIGOIz7BwoNScdccIiD5MVLSwlGS0bY5tGeCTZI=/KmSV6YAINyupFkmwwJrgTyNumJQD0sw-LHgKKqTDAqU=)
---
A Florida judge ruled that a sixteen-year-old child isn't "sufficiently mature" for an abortion, but she IS sufficiently mature to carry a pregnancy to term and give birth.
I want to scream: MAKE THIS MAKE SENSE, but that's the thing -- you can't. It's nonsensical. The only way to justify it is by completely disregarding the humanity of women.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfUqoIGOIz7BwoNScdccIiD5MVLSwlGS0bY5tGeCTZI=/GD-KOc4oAWt70T3pLO72hSGWp0lTLxNRbRonToDACIE=?refcode=X_082022_FloridaAbortion)
---
**HER Time is trying to stop travesties like this from happening in two ways. **One, we've created an [Abortion Rights Resource Guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfUqoIGOIz7BwoNScdccIiD5MVLSwlGS0bY5tGeCTZI=/DylIlbvvThUAYYNIxWbq40TDt5e5gWG5YQrE9E308fc=) to help women find the services they need and to mobilize folks to take political action. Two, we're supporting unapologetically pro-choice women in vulnerable seats before the midterms, so they can keep fighting for our reproductive freedom.
**[Your generosity means our message can reach more people. That means more women know how to access safe abortions, more people know how to contact their elected officials, and more kickass, pro-choice candidates win their races. Will you chip in now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfUqoIGOIz7BwoNScdccIiD5MVLSwlGS0bY5tGeCTZI=/GD-KOc4oAWt70T3pLO72hSGWp0lTLxNRbRonToDACIE=?refcode=X_082022_FloridaAbortion)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfUqoIGOIz7BwoNScdccIiD5MVLSwlGS0bY5tGeCTZI=/Hqc250Wlw3Hz_1pF9a70NT5ru6cO5j5mxgCjszJucK4=?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_082022_FloridaAbortion)

Thank you!!
-- _Katie_

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time **[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfUqoIGOIz7BwoNScdccIiD5MVLSwlGS0bY5tGeCTZI=/fblK-rLP_gntH0K_qoYoHfvmrPmat7bKDnsk76qAWQc=?refcode=footer)**, and **[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BfUqoIGOIz7BwoNScdccIiD5MVLSwlGS0bY5tGeCTZI=/KmSV6YAINyupFkmwwJrgTyNumJQD0sw-LHgKKqTDAqU=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Mitch McConnell admitted yesterday that Republicans may not win back the Senate, because the quality of their candidates is so God-awful. Of course, we know this, but Mitch finally caught on.
body:
Tim Ryan for Ohio Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Mitch McConnell admitted yesterday that Republicans may not win back the Senate, because the quality of their candidates is so God-awful. Of course, we know this, but Mitch finally caught on. **The good news: The Republicans have almost completely given up on winning the Senate seats in Pennsylvania, Georgia & Arizona.** _**The bad news: Mitch cancelled $28 million in tv ad buys in those states and put it all into Ohio so he could try and steal that race from us.**_ That’s right, $28 million in attempt to prop up vile anti-Semite J.D. Vance, who commanded women abused by their husbands that it was their duty to stay with their abusers, at risk of their health and lives (and the lives of their kids). [**Can you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can to help Ryan counter the $28 million of dirty money Mitch McConnell just dumped on his head in his vain attempt to become aSenate Majority Leader? Ryan is such a great candidate. He’ll make an even better Senator!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ff1ef1e-d2cb-49f3-b46c-410fc581ba5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This week we saw even more how utterly contemptible Vance is. A few years back he started a supposed charity—really a sham—that he claimed would help opioid addiction in Ohio. We now know before shuttering the sham, he hired a man from Big Pharma as bud charity’s representative, to go speak to those suffering the scourge of addiction. That’s right: Ever the fraudulent and empathy-less scum, **Vance sent someone who profited from opioid addiction out to speak to communities ravaged by it.** Sure sounds like JD was sending a group known for giving large campaign contributions in to areas rife with addiction to find more customers while hiding behind a fake charity. There is no word in the English language for how evil this is. Perhaps, Republican.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: TIM RYAN FOR OHIO!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda5b1f8c-c63e-4b0f-b3d6-94235c7b516b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **Even with his $28 million gift from McConnell, Tim Ryan is beating Vance in every poll and has massively out-raised him. But the $28MM is gonna hurt. ** If we want Tim Ryan representing us in the Senate so he can kill the filibuster, add judges to rebalance the Supreme Court, codify Roe, pass universal voting rights and gun safety legislation —and to prevent a ghoul like Vance, who’d prey on his own community by sending Big Pharma in to profit from his neighbors’ addiction, we must dig deep and support Tim Ryan!! [**Can you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can to help Ryan counter the $28 million of dirty money Mitch McConnell just dumped on his head in his vain attempt to become aSenate Majority Leader? Ryan is such a great candidate. He’ll make an even better Senator!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64aa55ae-70a6-40fa-ad05-8253cc2a9dd4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for helping us stop Mitch McConnell from stealing this race and ever becoming Senate Majority Leader again!! Cliff

clean_body: | | | | | It's over... A new poll has Democrats up 5% on us. We've emailed. We've texted. We've done everything we can to garner the grassroots support our campaigns need to take back Congress \- but with devastating polling and record fundraising numbers released from the Democrats, it looks like we're done... Our team has reached out to 98% of the patriots on our list - which leads me to you, Peter. You're our LAST RESORT to turn things around. "Can I count on you to give a $5, $10, or $25 gift to keep our campaigns running?" WE 'RE BEGGING | | | | | | We 're running out of time to turn things around. If we can count on you, please act now. We'll check back in an hour and hope to see your name on the list of patriots who've answered this DIRE call to action. body:
I wanted to re-up this email from my team and remind you where the money goes when you step up to support our Keep Nevada Safe mission.
---
| | | | | | Peter,
I wanted to re-up this email from my team and remind you where the money goes when you step up to support our Keep Nevada Safe mission.
Don't worry - unlike what Steve Sisolak does with your tax dollars, we don't waste these funds...
Every dollar supports the path to VICTORY in what might be the closest gubernatorial race in the entire country this year!
Operations that are critical for campaigns - flyers, travel costs, [TV ads like this one](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CfvPpA29NeQraoAqZBA7Op5MG69BaJDz8NcAEXVMOKgv_3wtF1idsY7eggsVHYTBUxF-8r9EHIBD9en0BuFnmW8ZkqRYf-exe5r-caiwbo8vOz9AgRPvIv1tZi9tcGx8p-MIkNMaiRefxTFl3zuH07wVcsZ59PaV9uF4wYYQSBittZDs_Ub628rlC0gZdZrl&c=4UOmA2t1Pipksk7cXvR6lmqoY0SW899DTiqR6yqpip7nUfTgh-fPzQ==&ch=0LshxBjk-VIvwZFAUo4BV47pIImBF6Y5NHUPlyNtlPTmwjE67UVp6A==) - all get a boost when you send in your financial support to beat Steve Sisolak and take our state back.
So if you have the means, please support that mission directly:
[Chip in to the DEFEAT Steve Sisolak Fund here. ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CfvPpA29NeQraoAqZBA7Op5MG69BaJDz8NcAEXVMOKgv_3wtF1idsY7eggsVHYTBB3k0NaIFx4GnnUNKitKOtAjE-pug8EJ_jqA3i4V7gJQ89l6o0o4NWGtcVvTIYm5h2MFg59412miRIK0dCHkBTMLbCclSLKYA_s-7oHkfGmT9NpgxX-so3kGkWtPqWqXCcy2eVWP1-cGY7QH_OGHlLzE7scFc8qWhcJsYxXkYhx_o1tvshhhS2tn6PY2UpFz9A36dqxWVOuo=&c=4UOmA2t1Pipksk7cXvR6lmqoY0SW899DTiqR6yqpip7nUfTgh-fPzQ==&ch=0LshxBjk-VIvwZFAUo4BV47pIImBF6Y5NHUPlyNtlPTmwjE67UVp6A==)
If we pool enough resources into this fund to compete with Sisolak's powerful D.C. allies, we will win this race and save Nevada. It's as simple as that.

clean_body: I wanted to re-up this email from my team and remind you where the money goes when you step up to support our Keep Nevada Safe mission. | | | | | | Peter, I wanted to re-up this email from my team and remind you where the money goes when you step up to support our Keep Nevada Safe mission. Don't worry - unlike what Steve Sisolak does with your tax dollars, we don't waste these funds... Every dollar supports the path to VICTORY in what might be the closest gubernatorial race in the entire country this year! Operations that are critical for campaigns - flyers, travel costs, == - all get a boost when you send in your financial support to beat Steve Sisolak and take our state back. So if you have the means, please support that mission directly: == If we pool enough resources into this fund to compete with Sisolak's powerful D.C. allies, we will win this race and save Nevada. It's as simple as that. | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for your help, Sheriff Joe Lombardo | \---------Forwarded Message------- From: Team Lombardo Date: Thurs, August 13, 2022 at 1:45 PM Subject: Every $ from this email helps Defeat Steve Sisolak | == | Peter, ✉️ == to join the thousands of supporters across Nevada and America who have pitched in to Defeat Steve Sisolak! Whether you've given to that mission in the past - or whether this would be your first time stepping up - we hope you won't let this opportunity pass you by... Because remember: this Governor LOWERED penalties for drug dealers and burglars, made it EASIER for criminals to be released, and made it HARDER for Law Enforcement Leaders like Sheriff Joe Lombardo to even do their jobs! Every single dollar raised from contributions to this email will be used to put a stop to that. == At the rate we're going, it could be the difference between Keeping Nevada Safe... or watching public safety go out the window! | | | == | == | Our communities are suffering from crime, failing schools, and a broken economy. Yet Sisolak thinks the solution is to recklessly throw around taxpayer money in the middle of a Recession to try to boost his sagging approval ratings. It's shameful - and we need to defeat him before it's too late. Lend what you can to this effort -> == When the Worst Governor in America is in charge of your state, there isn't a second to waste! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for backing the mission, Team Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. Friend, [Check this out from the Vermont Political Observer: ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhjasnyaHy4p1ENcuX-JSWmpdNhQ6gL5TUyoSZWLN5MKVewEToKD7brBpjVham7EdWqOHLDczqMyYEyk4M0IqoPy0UTRWWCAFskJv5Md80QEmTOtDrNKKEpxlHSwhrti2_U2IXJRjuyVJZsw8m31dQGauZExh7NTaLCzlcL-wdoffcylh8WnkvwOIr-OEl8wI18FhdiPk29WksPhG2LRmdmCA4ZHPs2l7kW1LOKEeAZnEwVsMCRly6CO3cUotd1TDQfSTyFEv2S7LJ29vJdliUsI_UTaSza7uEPKvHvTvakLg/3or/xzZICbcOS0GwnQ-lvZWRrQ/h0/Q3Uj4pZA2yqXhDDlOMdvxobx85e1FpvdZnrJw6UU5zI) “Brenda Siegel has the moxie to pull off the David/Goliath upset, and should never be underestimated.” **** Throughout the campaign, we’ve had detractors tell us that we had no chance of succeeding. We’ve been told that we had no shot of winning the primary, and then that we couldn’t compete with Governor Scott. **** We already proved the naysayers wrong by making history and winning the Democratic nomination. Now, we’re getting closer and closer to the election. And we’re seeing a lot of good signs. **** We've engaged with community members across the state. We've been able to bring more people on board into the Democratic ticket, including folks that were on the fence in the past, and we'll be able to bring more throughout. We out-raised the Republican incumbent for two straight months. **** While we’ve had to forge our own path this campaign, it's not the first time Brenda’s had to do that. Brenda’s a fighter, and she’s gotten legislation passed that was said to have no chance of passing. This election, she’s been able to make real waves. **** Now, we have a fundraising deadline coming up, and we’re not near the total we need to be at. To get Brenda’s name out there before the election, we need to run ad campaigns and send mailers. We need money for these projects. [Can you donate $25 or more to fuel our efforts to tell Vermont voters about Brenda’s movement?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yx3cUQBGNTQ0X9M8L6qTDFP4Y71THXs03TaRmEi6PVOX4iLVswpe1xuORU75uKsAXfe8fkHl5YUP2m-GEUptWRrBA-fXf4SgWa65dxFqhrPNTV7pCk7D0SY3Gc-BIbk6apZXXCRe5l8YxaFTgq9mzq6UUgtwMmj7ksn6Y1Ui4um7c8SE7PWIzrzLpLjiBFA0FB9IM-WK-sUwtOD1FOiJ6gch4_NAtTr9vb8y8_3w2GjAYrgq0KWRN9eEvoqcJJTvuiCzb-DxCdkHQqoAr_stX6JsKhJL5XiQ5Co6_8vXlzzQ/3or/xzZICbcOS0GwnQ-lvZWRrQ/h1/yFyMJF__Q_TbCU0iwQhBoCuQei8LuFLV6C2pfwZeBoU)

clean_body: | | Friend, “Brenda Siegel has the moxie to pull off the David/Goliath upset, and should never be underestimated.” ** Throughout the campaign, we’ve had detractors tell us that we had no chance of succeeding. We’ve been told that we had no shot of winning the primary, and then that we couldn’t compete with Governor Scott. We already proved the naysayers wrong by making history and winning the Democratic nomination. Now, we’re getting closer and closer to the election. And we’re seeing a lot of good signs. We've engaged with community members across the state. We've been able to bring more people on board into the Democratic ticket, including folks that were on the fence in the past, and we'll be able to bring more throughout. We out-raised the Republican incumbent for two straight months. While we’ve had to forge our own path this campaign, it's not the first time Brenda’s had to do that. Brenda’s a fighter, and she’s gotten legislation passed that was said to have no chance of passing. This election, she’s been able to make real waves. ** Now, we have a fundraising deadline coming up, and we’re not near the total we need to be at. To get Brenda’s name out there before the election, we need to run ad campaigns and send mailers. We need money for these projects. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: This is a new Text block. Change the text. Thank you, Brenda Siegel | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Brenda for Vermont. All rights reserved.

subject: Wisconsin is Trump's top target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

There have been A LOT of new developments in
this race, so we want to catch you up:

1. A New Marquette University Law School poll shows Tony deadlocked in a
neck and neck race with Tim Michels.
2. Donald Trump handpicked Tim Michels because he wants to end fair
elections and abortion rights.
3. Now that polling shows the race so close, Trump and Michels will
attack Tony even harder.

Derek, Tim Michels
has already spent $12 million of his own money to try to beat Tony, and
Trump's PAC has nearly unlimited resources to attack Tony.

name: State Dems HQ
subject: re: Ohio
body:
It’s becoming more clear why state Democrats are the last defense in protecting some of our most fundamental freedoms | | |
---
| | _The New Yorker_ just did a deep-dive investigation of what state Democrats are up against: | _ **State Legislatures Are Torching Democracy** Even in moderate places like Ohio, gerrymandering has let unchecked Republicans pass extremist laws that could never make it through Congress. _ _****_
---
Since the Supreme Court decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , legislatures in states with structural Republican advantages, like Ohio are defying the will of the people by passing or implementing some of the most extremist anti-abortion laws.
And it’s not just in Ohio – across the country, some of our most basic rights are under attack by extremist Republicans. **We have to fight back.**
[It’s never been more important to support and elect pro-choice Democrats to state legislatures. We need to make sure that in November, we can ensure abortion rights are protected at the state level. Will you chip in $7 or anything you can to elect state Democrats across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZBD3kRTEYjFcAcryIttCCkc5BOnXXQo6S5J2RK5vFaoQAtNUCZjvaay1DWYPMAUf4FuKdITg-it6w2xtorSObyTYWiurXU0BblDcLhn9mLN_SVerzNGZUoVRxGQ3Sp1_m61MFUZ8wBn1ufzTZoMWkfNYem1iAUh3gMT3Wo0DZ83DMuXIVY0bTABY3RDcfc57_dGOE7FKdDlgxeLPCLbopB-KnYLJPnOVD8h-Xa2FxfSsU_zIpwCHcCP2vl8W7P7F7yCZ3QvNLy8ly4xVdyZN5hohfWnNaw0wsu_fjRkQh-SdNEZZScj9zaSrga-b30SoRpk3hErvc7ULJIVSH3MReCCzdoxNi1p49GI0CPthUAwbFqtfohWtHQSLiWmsp0wZnYpzmRAktymrA8XaWzdgUdA/3or/4A-rps6jQxO-wtNxiiszvg/h0/ikYfxh7lGSsPKazeoGegJNErHkM-NIwZPytVrQJOl5Y)

clean_body: It’s becoming more clear why state Democrats are the last defense in protecting some of our most fundamental freedoms | | | | | The New Yorker just did a deep-dive investigation of what state Democrats are up against: | State Legislatures Are Torching Democracy Even in moderate places like Ohio, gerrymandering has let unchecked Republicans pass extremist laws that could never make it through Congress. ** Since the Supreme Court decision overturning Roe v. Wade , legislatures in states with structural Republican advantages, like Ohio are defying the will of the people by passing or implementing some of the most extremist anti-abortion laws. And it’s not just in Ohio – across the country, some of our most basic rights are under attack by extremist Republicans. We have to fight back. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | This fall, we have to ensure Republicans don’t win in key battleground states legislatures. We have to show up for pro-abortion rights and pro-democracy Democrats. And that’s our plan at the DLCC. Here’s what we know: To protect reproductive rights across the country, we’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you who will continue investing in statewide races. With Election Day less than three months away, and campaigns making key budget decisions at this very moment, there’s no time to waste – we need your support now.** Thanks, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. subject: All out of luck ➡

body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'm sorry to tell you this but I have to be honest.

But this race isn't going the way I hoped. I'm behind in the polls and pundits in the media are already calling this race for my Democrat opponent.

So this is my last stand. If I don't raise **$482** from this email, I'm afraid I'm giving up for good. This is our last chance to keep Wisconsin red. _**[Can you please pitch in before midnight to keep me in the race?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054100:6gYsoYVfN:m:1:3331421248:A08E05DF7AB50E5406F7559234372469:r "Can you please pitch in before midnight to keep me in the race?")**_

---
I have an urgent update, friend:
**Ron DeSantis was JUST in Ohio to campaign for J.D. Vance and rally their right-wing base against us. **
[**We’re expecting a barrage of attacks to come our way. Rush a contribution of $25 or more to help us raise $100,000 toward our emergency Rapid Response Fund now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49506927/362425874/-1790534979?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3638-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTMxYWRhNS1iMjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MhlQtY9vr7BIMlKrQ5mUNf_Gejz0gRGZ9uEMWo1z008=)

After multiple polls showed me beating my ultra-conservative opponent, Republicans started panicking. National Republicans unleashed a $5 million ad campaign against me and now they’re sending in the calvary to save J.D.’s floundering campaign.
They know Senate control hinges on what happens here in Ohio, so they’ll do whatever it takes to win this race. This is the beginning of a new effort to tear down our campaign, so it's no surprise that they attacked us ruthlessly.
Now look, I’m not afraid of some schoolyard bullies — but Mitch McConnell has virtually unlimited resources to use against us and no shortage of right-wing puppets to fire up their extremist base.
**We have to fight back today.** The only way we can counter the GOP’s dirty tricks is by collecting as many grassroots donations as possible. So we’ve set an emergency goal of raising $100,000, and we need you to make a contribution of any amount to help us get there:
[**Can I count on you to make an urgent donation of $25 or more to my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49506929/362425888/-1790534979?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3638-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTMxYWRhNS1iMjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MhlQtY9vr7BIMlKrQ5mUNf_Gejz0gRGZ9uEMWo1z008=)

Now look, I’m not afraid of some schoolyard bullies — but Mitch McConnell has virtually unlimited resources to use against us and no shortage of right-wing puppets to fire up their extremist base. We have to fight back today. The only way we can counter the GOP’s dirty tricks is by collecting as many grassroots donations as possible. So we’ve set an emergency goal of raising $100,000, and we need you to make a contribution of any amount to help us get there: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Tim Ryan and Kirsten Gillibrand: | | | = | = | | = | = We can win this race, flip Ohio blue, and expand the Democratic Senate majority, but only if you’re with us. That’s why your donation is so important, especially today. —Tim | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to . GILLIBRAND FOR SENATE 126 C Street NW 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20001 United States © 2022 | Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate |

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Reaching out to Derek personally
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Hi, it’s Stacey Abrams.

I’m making phone calls again to
supporters like you to
say thank you. Whether you have supported me since 2018 or just last week,
I want to have the chance to say thank you, directly, for all that you do
for my campaign and in your communities.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220820_B1_SYACALL_S1_T1_SYA_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=1924%2E1862389%2Eu9Okdl ]I’m on a mission to raise $200,000 before the first Georgia voters
begin requesting absentee ballots on Monday, August 22. If you give a
donation right now to help us hit our goal, you might get a thank you call
from me. Can you donate $5 to my campaign?

[ Stacey ]Stacey Abrams making a phone call with the caption 'Hi, may I speak to
Peggy'

Derek — when
we hit our Monday deadline, we’ll be one step closer to creating One
Georgia:

One step closer to making Georgians’ voices heard at the polls.

One step closer to organizing and mobilizing voters across the state of
Georgia.

One step closer to getting our message out on TV, over the radio, online
and everywhere else we can.

Derek, our
goal to hit $200,000 before Monday may seem ambitious, but we have plans
for every cent to do everything we can to win in November and get to work
for Georgians.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220820_B1_SYACALL_S1_T1_SYA_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=1924%2E1862389%2Eu9Okdl ]Can you chip in $5, or whatever makes sense for your
budget today? Any amount — no matter how big or small — might give us a
chance to talk over the phone. I would love the chance to call and thank
you very soon.

Derek, I look
forward to seeing your name on my next call list.

Stacey

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220820_B1_SYACALL_S1_T1_SYA_SL&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=1924%2E1862389%2Eu9Okdl ]DONATE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=1924%2E1862389%2Eu9Okdl ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1924%2E1862389%2Eu9Okdl

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter – Our ads have gone dark.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---

Peter - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with less than 90 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Peter, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054063:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call.

[** Help Fund Our TV Ads
Chip in $25 Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054064:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r)
While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. **In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond.**

**[If you want us to flip the Georgia Senate seat from BLUE to RED and help Republicans win back the Senate majority, then I need you to give as generously as you can right this instant.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054063:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r)**

I'm asking you, Peter, please help us get back on the air ASAP. **[Chip in anything you can today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054063:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054063:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. **[I hope you'll consider my request by chipping in $25 RIGHT NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054063:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r)** We really could use your help.

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054063:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054065:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054066:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054067:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054068:6RsFoYV-N:m:1:3253819041:E9D80041A18975C07B2C1E5941AF1CCB:r)

Friend, did you catch Jennifer’s message?

Over the past few months, Jennifer has been working hard to deliver jobs, economic relief, healthcare reform, historic clean energy investments, and more for VA-10. And during this August congressional recess, she has been out traveling the district and meeting with constituents to hear about the issues Virginians still want to see addressed.

Jennifer knows that in spite of all of the recent progress Democrats have made, there is always more work to be done. [**Will you fill out our survey and let Jennifer know what you’d like to see Congress work on once it gets back in session?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49493572/362378229/-1375886241?ms=EM_PET_220820Surv_N_TW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_220820Surv_N_TW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTRmMTczNS05MzIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ViwLsUPm__qGszYnsMnUrv9H8dwskHxh8amSYwqGhc=&emci=645e1cf4-ea1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=854f1735-9320-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=32654120)

Thanks,

Team Wexton

_**— Begin Forwarded Message —**_
> Friend,
>
> This August recess, I'm traveling throughout VA-10 and meeting with constituents. It's the perfect time to hear directly from folks about the issues that matter most, and what Congress can do about them. [**Will you take our survey and tell us what you’d like Congress to work on most once it gets back in session?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49493576/362378232/-1375886241?ms=EM_PET_220820Surv_N_TW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_220820Surv_N_TW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTRmMTczNS05MzIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ViwLsUPm__qGszYnsMnUrv9H8dwskHxh8amSYwqGhc=&emci=645e1cf4-ea1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=854f1735-9320-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=32654120) [Take Our Survey ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49493579/362378235/-1375886241?ms=EM_PET_220820Surv_N_TW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_220820Surv_N_TW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTRmMTczNS05MzIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ViwLsUPm__qGszYnsMnUrv9H8dwskHxh8amSYwqGhc=&emci=645e1cf4-ea1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=854f1735-9320-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=32654120) Just over the last few weeks, I have had the privilege to vote for and help pass several pieces of substantial legislation that are now law. These include:
> * The PACT Act, providing benefits to veterans exposed to toxic burn pits
> * The CHIPS Act, which will boost domestic microchip production and increase our economic competitiveness with China
> * The Inflation Reduction Act, which helps us address climate change, allows Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices from pharmaceutical companies, and makes the wealthiest corporations pay their fair share of taxes
>
But there is _always_ more work to be done. So, I want to know what issues you would like to see Congress prioritize after the August recess. [**Click here to take our issues survey now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49493582/362378239/-1375886241?ms=EM_PET_220820Surv_N_TW_FULL_7_NG_N_L3&refcode=EM_PET_220820Surv_N_TW_FULL_7_NG_N_L3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTRmMTczNS05MzIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ViwLsUPm__qGszYnsMnUrv9H8dwskHxh8amSYwqGhc=&emci=645e1cf4-ea1f-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=854f1735-9320-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=32654120)
>
> Thanks,
>
> Jennifer
| **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49493586/362378242/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_220820Surv_N_TW_FULL_7_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTRmMTczNS05MzIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ViwLsUPm__qGszYnsMnUrv9H8dwskHxh8amSYwqGhc=)****

subject: These are my hopes and dreams
body:
What are yours? | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=60ce5861b1&e=4712f71bea)

| [Give Today!](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=e26d8a5925&e=4712f71bea "Give Today!")
---
| I am beyond lucky to be a mom to two beautiful daughters.

They are the lights of my life, and the ones who inspired me to step up and run for office.

Why?

I want to ensure my daughters live in a world where they can _breathe clean air, make their own choices about their own body, and flourish in an equitable workplace._

[Will you help me create this future by supporting my campaign with a $25, $50, or $100 donation today?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=6032854785&e=4712f71bea)
---
| [Donate to My Campaign Today](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=54ae8dd124&e=4712f71bea "Donate to My Campaign Today")
---
| [Create a Brighter Future of Texas’ 13th District](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=944bb40f4f&e=4712f71bea "Create a Brighter Future of Texas’ 13th District")
---
| Texas is not on track for this kind of future, especially with Ronny Jackson ignoring the real problems in our 13th District.

We need leaders who will invest in clean energy, protect reproductive rights, expand healthcare and mental health access, and create a thriving economy.

Clearly, there’s a lot to be done.

**Unlike Ronny, I am ready to tackle these issues and make sure Texas’ needs are heard in DC.**

[Will you help me get to DC so I can actually deliver results to Texas’ 13th District?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=d8c2e5228e&e=4712f71bea)

name: Herschel
subject: Not the news I wanted to share with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We don’t currently have the money to run TV ads. We’re being outraised and outspent by the Democrats. |
---

Fellow American - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with just 80 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Fellow American, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ff44a092ab6f4bc5bf59775c66996e42&_e=KSg8yHKt8N-K-o4z3Nk9x5UXjxEfaAPndN4yABSo5Z2-R3mq9BCRdopxLl2lac_cCjU7tBKSMr-_pryA1XD6tk0ApRpPEFMsg-VXPDjJT-WvfLVAoIZPobOf2zXAcGZysgktcEOvXGc1-CPXcdT7G1qzrdxE0Fk0Z0Qykjt6AlM4Dz-A3ZyzqDVXJDOuD7p33JxO6x5WziMJz5AlrMdf_AHHVPhBjTzcfvh7331cxt6Xwuo4vWzxg2Fc-u8SBoN1dvFRLjF_Wo9IDHgM24sb4kxUfVxMhVOoYPwLGbefePHDa3Z-J6zRzZaLFT3uXgeUtnKpaB0YXCEmVkjMVhcukrE9HovojOzyWyteQCOFw8PiCldya0CksGHMIPhKGX_9Kbs6kwSXDRGb1HPikWIjt-zynzjqHQqeNkhhGloJvVwqsuanatnWiyqXCxKA62xaRkSecqM_MqP1-An2dwnVlY1tf7RepppvpM8ryK1PLBKhE0PU6_Mq1HiLbxZW1zjg)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call.

[** Help Fund Our TV Ads

clean_body: We don’t currently have the money to run TV ads. We’re being outraised and outspent by the Democrats. | Fellow American - Our ads have gone dark. To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air. Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways EVERY DAY. This is a tremendous challenge with just 80 days left in the campaign. Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board! The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are. Fellow American, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling. The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV. This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call. While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond. I'm asking you, Fellow American, please help us get back on the air ASAP. Thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. We really could use your help. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Trish Gunby
subject: We need to protect Social Security from the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress [unsubscribe](https://secure
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49494958/362383895/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjU1YTliYy05NTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U9U2fdoY-d8UCW3tlJ2EeDqof-UUfumQF6szKVqAu88=&emci=a95f3fa2-0720-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=fb55a9bc-9520-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357) Peter, This month, Social Security turned 87. This past weekend, I was out knocking doors and celebrating this landmark Democratic legislation that protects seniors from slipping into poverty and homelessness to this day. **Nearly a century later, Republicans like my opponent Ann Wagner are still trying to get rid of it.** They have gone on record stating they’re in favor of gutting Social Security. They’ve tried, over and over again, to defund the program so that hard-working young people won’t have access to the same retirement security and dignity that people my mother’s age have been able to rely on: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49494959/362383896/1023722261?refcode=protectsocialsecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjU1YTliYy05NTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U9U2fdoY-d8UCW3tlJ2EeDqof-UUfumQF6szKVqAu88=) **_ALL people deserve to live with dignity. I’m running for Congress to make sure of it._** Ann Wagner has an alarming record when it comes to funding our critical social safety net and earned-benefit programs like Social Security. She also consistently votes with drug companies, and against lowering drug costs for seniors—exactly what big pharmaceutical companies have given her nearly a half million dollars to do. When I go to Washington, I won’t be working for massive corporate super PAC donors. **I’ll fight for all the seniors and working people in this district who deserve basic dignity even after we’re no longer able to work.** We know that a GOP-controlled House will immediately get to work gutting critical safety net programs.**[Can you contribute anything, even a small amount, to help kick Ann Wagner out of Congress, and ensure we have the strongest campaign going into November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49494961/362383897/1611632567?refcode=protectsocialsecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjU1YTliYy05NTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U9U2fdoY-d8UCW3tlJ2EeDqof-UUfumQF6szKVqAu88=)** clean_body: Peter, This month, Social Security turned 87. This past weekend, I was out knocking doors and celebrating this landmark Democratic legislation that protects seniors from slipping into poverty and homelessness to this day. Nearly a century later, Republicans like my opponent Ann Wagner are still trying to get rid of it. They have gone on record stating they’re in favor of gutting Social Security. They’ve tried, over and over again, to defund the program so that hard-working young people won’t have access to the same retirement security and dignity that people my mother’s age have been able to rely on: = ALL people deserve to live with dignity. I’m running for Congress to make sure of it. Ann Wagner has an alarming record when it comes to funding our critical social safety net and earned-benefit programs like Social Security. She also consistently votes with drug companies, and against lowering drug costs for seniors—exactly what big pharmaceutical companies have given her nearly a half million dollars to do. When I go to Washington, I won’t be working for massive corporate super PAC donors. I’ll fight for all the seniors and working people in this district who deserve basic dignity even after we’re no longer able to work. We know that a GOP-controlled House will immediately get to work gutting critical safety net programs.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you so much for your support! In Solidarity, = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

name: Brianna Mast
subject: Please, I’m asking you to help a war hero
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
For those I haven’t met, my name is Brianna Mast. My husband Brian — now a Republican Congressman in Florida
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zka8e737hk2fs1vvhcgaofgtb4fbjoni5fsbg3so_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1h60oj4cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkmhr71ppmcjge2c5k69or1cplcpo7adb4ekpr6ptjcthj8pjlc9gnfdhnmlj7fduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4sb66hgb6o37maomcc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| For those I haven’t met, my name is Brianna Mast. My husband Brian — [now a Republican Congressman in Florida](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfk68sv3d5dj2db8nbomr7ml7im55h96qa21871o_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1h60oj4cph2bs) — was blown up in Afghanistan and lost both of his legs when a Taliban IED detonated beneath him.

With last Monday being the one-year anniversary of Biden’s abandonment of that mission in Afghanistan, I was thinking back to the day that I first learned about Brian’s near-fatal injuries...

There was a knock on the door at seven o’clock in the morning, and I could see men in uniform outside the window. I feared the worst, and I didn’t know whether Brian was dead or alive. Our six month old son had just been born, and I began to fear that he would be growing up without a father in his life. It was the most nerve-wracking experience I can remember.

By the grace of God, my worst fear didn’t come true. I was told that Brian wasn’t dead, just badly hurt after an IED detonated beneath him in Afghanistan, taking both of his legs and a finger... _but not his life._
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1m2m8glfbaj52080rq1ec6miss7g324jct37n58_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1h60oj4cph2bs)
---
| Here’s the truth from a wife who has seen Brian process it all: this year has been perhaps the most painful for Brian since the moment he was blown up. It was hard for my husband and so many other Afghanistan veterans seeing the mission they sacrificed so much for end in such a heart-breaking manner.

**That’s why it’s so important to me that we support him on this anniversary. Can I count on you to help?**
---
| [SHOW BRIAN WE APPRECIATE HIS SERVICE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z93iguhag8rivlbeh6blao4g0ie4n9g7tbnsks08_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1h60oj4cph2bs "SHOW BRIAN WE APPRECIATE HIS SERVICE")
---
| When Kabul fell last year, my husband was understandably heart-broken. But quickly, he turned those feelings into action.

Just like he didn’t quit when he lost his legs, Brian kept pushing after Biden’s Afghanistan failure, and since then, he has been laser-focused on holding the Biden Administration accountable.

But, there’s no doubt that has taken his focus away from fundraising for his re-election. And now, that election is in less than a week. If we can’t make sure his re-election campaign stays on track while he focuses on the one-year anniversary, Brian’s service to his nation in Congress could come to an end.

**Here’s the bottom line:_Brian needs our help._ **

[**So, will you help the most determined, selfless, patriotic man I know continue doing what he loves most –**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqp8257sgh49uphtouuv5fcpsro1j5l47ekov9mg_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1h60oj4cph2bs)[** _serving his country_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6vgg4ojbcnit744jsmdq0c35u412mh5i7m3djfg_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1h60oj4cph2bs)[**– by helping me raise $2,000 toward his campaign’s get out the vote budget?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl279vr0jq0n2cml9p7utjs0rdo1j17rtmd2o85g_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1h60oj4cph2bs)
---
| [PLEASE SUPPORT MY HUSBAND BRIAN](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcq54gde85in60qmlk333q706qbb62cjcaic2ang_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1h60oj4cph2bs "PLEASE SUPPORT MY HUSBAND BRIAN")
---
| I want Brian to be able to have the time and space needed to process this anniversary – and get accountability. So, I told him I would take care of raising these urgently needed funds. Your help in ensuring I don’t let Brian down would be greatly appreciated.

Every bit of support makes a big difference!

Thank you in advance,
Brianna Mast
---
|
---
| | | | Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.
---
| | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq290275932clblph92goqd03o1e7doipo7u0vn8_rp22sh2s8i66or4c1h60oj4cph2bs)

---
| | PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
---
|

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter, this could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---

Peter - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with less than 90 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Peter, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054142:J35iVYVNH:m:1:3317145305:69500FD873B9FBE73CC20EFDDD787DBE:r)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call.

[** Help Fund Our TV Ads
Chip in $25 Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054143:J35iVYVNH:m:1:3317145305:69500FD873B9FBE73CC20EFDDD787DBE:r)
While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. **In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond.**

**[If you want us to flip the Georgia Senate seat from BLUE to RED and help Republicans win back the Senate majority, then I need you to give as generously as you can right this instant.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054142:J35iVYVNH:m:1:3317145305:69500FD873B9FBE73CC20EFDDD787DBE:r)**

I'm asking you, Peter, please help us get back on the air ASAP. **[Chip in anything you can today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054142:J35iVYVNH:m:1:3317145305:69500FD873B9FBE73CC20EFDDD787DBE:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054142:J35iVYVNH:m:1:3317145305:69500FD873B9FBE73CC20EFDDD787DBE:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. **[I hope you'll consider my request by chipping in $25 RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054142:J35iVYVNH:m:1:3317145305:69500FD873B9FBE73CC20EFDDD787DBE:r)** We really could use your help.

name: Val Demings
subject: For the first time ever in this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
this news is so exciting
| | |
---
Friend: Brand-new polling proves we are in a position to WIN in Florida (we're TIED with Marco Rubio) – but we're still being outspent in key areas of Florida that could decide this race.
**That's why this news is so exciting: A ****generous group of donors – for the first time EVER – is _matching every single donation_ up to our $250,000 goal to make sure I have the resources to pull ahead and WIN. **

[Will you please rush a $5 donation now, which will have TWICE THE IMPACT? body:

**Big Picture:** The future of the U.S. Senate is in the margin of error

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2347e4614dd1466caab46f9f5e429aba&_e=PKbr1oHMUt1tpO-B4Y2wkh_0iUcUNKXi-s6aKRBIJqxnExyXlnbsPNf3rv0fGY3oddc7esrsI5FTECngNRL0uO-7dpWuJD0z0Z6obV14Y3M_uz3NxQD97m9yn6tzLkqy9toR4ivEYC1SrbwDsDYfVeRxlEPRHufu4YxprNpU1ZyUadmpnXW-ofDM3ikEJxLt3Ao9lfSJ2YupRjzmvD6ADNbV2csiXc4EIIiV8v0iTMT-CkUIXcutpWAHB7bCxdeBYXkpO1oghkOVpyBDjAICUxrNb2xa7ryAikRPiEvSbjNMJAwNJlLhjDaapvfC2FMs51TavAms0to4fJtAYxnNu65PT8miIDuwtjOMXZtfgZf14qm2RcHI6sO6n3Ul5CV0JORRItWD7rCgdlKl42u1i9AVE2ZCtxLnHJGb6B-_JhZqHyvB7EC3A_yl9Yj9FJafg8VUrLUBJ8cqddf30kZ8vIzX4oHnlAdWVKSn7EsLdlw%3D)
Peter,

Here are three things you need to know:

|
1. **Warnock + Schumer + Liberal Super PACs** have spent more than $25 million attacking Herschel Walker in Georgia. They know if that if Warnock wins, odds are they keep the Senate.
2. **Their attacks have gotten more vicious by the day** - they've even attacked Herschel's record of working with our nation's veterans.
3. **Despite all of this, this race is _still_ within the margin of error.** But if Herschel is going to pull ahead, he needs all of us to step up. Right now, the goal is _489 more online donors before midnight_.

---
So, I'm reaching out to you personally, Peter. **[If you're able, will you make an EMERGENCY donation of whatever you can afford?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2347e4614dd1466caab46f9f5e429aba&_e=PKbr1oHMUt1tpO-B4Y2wkh_0iUcUNKXi-s6aKRBIJqxnExyXlnbsPNf3rv0fGY3oddc7esrsI5FTECngNRL0uO-7dpWuJD0z0Z6obV14Y3M_uz3NxQD97m9yn6tzLkqy9toR4ivEYC1SrbwDsDYfVeRxlEPRHufu4YxprNpU1ZyUadmpnXW-ofDM3ikEJxLt3Ao9lfSJ2YupRjzmvD6ADNbV2csiXc4EIIiV8v0iTMT-CkUIXcutpWAHB7bCxdeBYXkpO1oghkOVpyBDjAICU19IeghGFTH2xazAsDPiOT-hDSinYB3R_OMlmplwEwCmiKQP1MwGbQjK3EEuVEj5fi-qv4NewYTT39WZbe21Gt_A6LwBBopMJokPhc1kABnJ3RSBFughz9F7aSk88taY7t4vaHSWn7gsUF7UDI6XXM8-LYB9SvevHMsBsrT3XwrZoly-H3lqSPjpgaqw1WSBbZjZf1a9_8Xv8H2ReC6qQjs%3D)**

I don't like asking for money, but Herschel's opponent - Raphael Warnock - is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. So, it's now or never to make up ground.

**[Please help Herschel stay in the fight and take the momentum now. If we win Georgia, we can flip the Senate.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2347e4614dd1466caab46f9f5e429aba&_e=PKbr1oHMUt1tpO-B4Y2wkh_0iUcUNKXi-s6aKRBIJqxnExyXlnbsPNf3rv0fGY3oddc7esrsI5FTECngNRL0uO-7dpWuJD0z0Z6obV14Y3M_uz3NxQD97m9yn6tzLkqy9toR4ivEYC1SrbwDsDYfVeRxlEPRHufu4YxprNpU1ZyUadmpnXW-ofDM3ikEJxLt3Ao9lfSJ2YupRjzmvD6ADNbV2csiXc4EIIiV8v0iTMT-CkUIXcutpWAHB7bCxdeBYXkpO1oghkOVpyBDjAICUy9FsUaGcNz_nIAMSgUnsp_6TKHNvnryQa9tx1L7GS2H1nb0m5YXxACZBP1CW8YDV2_Rstd2ORvPLFWkLSomdRhK_yy5F-WMfgbm3ZMUD_YwRpKFtBLni6KCnDoQ17J5AVDnEe7yREoc0lNBDtta5MHF6MUkXq4cDMVem1sTrSewlNpdwGytk-_UCmGZ2k92QY96tIVfg9qa41w4IRglqtc%3D)**

subject: China is coming for America’s farmland. 😮
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I need your help to STOP this Communist takeover

|
---
| | | Hi there Peter, it's Iowa Congresswoman Ashley Hinson.

Corporations with ties to the Chinese Communist Party are buying up America's farms at an alarming pace.

Their plan is to buy up America's farmlands so they can control our natural resources, and ultimately, so they can control YOU.

_**So as an Iowa native, I 'm extremely concerned.**_

_**[I'm working overtime to put an end to this but I need your support. Can I count on you to sign my petition?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054137:J6yhGYVPN:m:1:3331421248:9A6CCF19B52F3FFAF34EB7C7768DADCC:r "I’m working overtime to put an end
to this but I need your support. Can I count on you to sign my petition?")**_

SIGN THE PETITION")
---

_**KEEP CHINA OUT OF AMERICA 'S FARMLAND**_
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054137:J6yhGYVPN:m:1:3331421248:9A6CCF19B52F3FFAF34EB7C7768DADCC:r "SIGN THE PETITION")
---
In Iowa, our farms are more than just plots of land. They provide millions of Americans with food and energy. Most importantly, they provide homes and livelihoods to countless generations of Iowans.

That's why Communist China is the biggest threat to our country. Not only are they seeking to control our natural resources, they aim to destroy our American way of life.

I won't let Communist China get away with this sinister plan.

_**[With your help, Republicans can put a stop to this very serious national security threat. But we need you to join us and have your voice be heard. Please sign the petition now>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054137:J6yhGYVPN:m:1:3331421248:9A6CCF19B52F3FFAF34EB7C7768DADCC:r "With your
help, Republicans can put a stop to this very serious national security threat. But we need you to join us and have your voice be heard. Please sign
the petition now >>>")**_

For America,

Ashley Hinson

Peter,

Tonight at midnight, we will have reached our **August Mid-Month Fundraising Deadline**. Because we only have a few hours remaining, we will make this brief.

As we report on our campaign finances, we set both **Mid-Month** and **End-of-Month** goals to ensure our campaign has the resources to win.

When we sat down this morning to go over our fundraising numbers we noticed that we were trailing behind. We are only off track by only $5,500.

Once we reported this, _Alexis stood up and said not to worry because we have Peter, on our team._

She knows that you are one of her TOP SUPPORTERS and because of how much you have done, Alexis wanted to do something special for you!

body:
This email is of the utmost importance. We're going to have to pull the plugs on our TV ads this Sunday unless we get an influx of donations that allo We’re spending money like drunken sailors. Our individual liberties have been trounced and continue to be under constant threat from authoritarians running the show in D.C. and President Biden and VP Harris clearly do NOT have a grip on the power they wield. . | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=64bfeaeedb324bf39ab866a67519aa46&_e=HarQLzObll2yYBTB8si6wFhkpVvl7gA0c6XU1DR0gattf-0QbM4DlVOZie9XiKC4727BqYRsrt4KQ7-AeDLsQnYxybz76W4T_nYszo3Uc4o-DivUtL6IG6vweGmVMigvGTW0Hg94uBhY-iYsxqaAHubpwO0XuOm18TWtGA74uAfkq93RebNl3hMIR1DbMlvSp7eJqgpRWhU4MugcBly713qj3i7CdAl7yg0FAG5h84V67P6bPJbfivlfugjYSw9gJfUP15FOoYNiLZStEjflWxeGkKvbJrm6PnK5ZxiPx9mKE1gWgh2EnErvrb_8ZHabvO7k2rHfpIrS1GFxkxcOWfB-4LVvjnl31kr7bzU315iOkNDFanj3sDKFX1yK71lBQ8y3B8yQ9J9HcOIUIlTt9-7qCOtNuv683YFO_3BeqDvDQgaKXt9H_gp0Y1EIliUb)

Peter,

It’s Saturday and no doubt you’ve got better things to do than read this morning, nevertheless, I hope you will read it all of the way through to the end. I’m forwarding the email I sent yesterday regarding my TV ADS. In order to keep my TV ADS on air next week, I need to raise $21,000 by tomorrow night. Payments to the TV stations need to be made ahead of time, resulting in our fundraising deadline tomorrow.

Yesterday, we raised the $7,000 we needed to raise. Today, we need to raise another $7,000. **[Are you able to help us out with a gift of $4, $8 or even $12 right now?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=64bfeaeedb324bf39ab866a67519aa46&_e=HarQLzObll2yYBTB8si6wFhkpVvl7gA0c6XU1DR0gattf-0QbM4DlVOZie9XiKC4727BqYRsrt4KQ7-AeDLsQnYxybz76W4T_nYszo3Uc4o-DivUtL6IG6vweGmVMigvGTW0Hg94uBhY-iYsxqaAHubpwO0XuOm18TWtGA74uAfkq93RebNl3hMIR1DbMlvSp7eJqgpRWhU4MugcBly713qj3i7CdAl7yg0FAG5h84UrLLNYi_EWLpzosqKWvS-8hG9Zv70NSFvcwPCBIo9Ie0XQI0Zmp2ELlLGhazKjSBcrxxPHHfUsHjhwoAf5q-7KZBrOZAM1vcW_BHAVIKgfV07V1-hGsdFOtkW6blXRW9o30e2_gPop1himzg3yGlsyeuPRT4Kd8dt2Zo51Py_yEC47MbuG493z_BINffWw2IgnooiqJQ4fCiROOyXkwj7j) **

The email below further explains why this request is of the ****utmost importance****.

Thanks,
Alek

\---------------------------------------

From: Alek Skarlatos
Date: Friday, August 19, 2022 at 2:08 PM
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: My TV ADS are coming down

Peter,

My ads are going to have to come off TV early next week unless something drastic changes over the weekend. Due to the downturn in fundraising over the past year, we have just not been able to raise enough money to keep our ads on the air from now through November 8th. **As it stands today, I need to raise $7,000 today and both days this weekend to ensure we can pay the TV stations to run our ADS next week**.

[** HELP ME KEEP MY ADS ON TV **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=64bfeaeedb324bf39ab866a67519aa46&_e=HarQLzObll2yYBTB8si6wFhkpVvl7gA0c6XU1DR0gattf-0QbM4DlVOZie9XiKC4727BqYRsrt4KQ7-AeDLsQnYxybz76W4T_nYszo3Uc4o-DivUtL6IG6vweGmVMigvGTW0Hg94uBhY-iYsxqaAHubpwO0XuOm18TWtGA74uAfkq93RebNl3hMIR1DbMlvSp7eJqgpRWhU4MugcBly713qj3i7CdAl7yg0FAG5h84URb7g-WycK8Fxp0gYWsDDvMNSuNb7pFmch4ZKCKpsE4U17OHiXchVBje3tz1R4tmXzUPtWF3cUJaBRLZdL0FfuN2cuBFZVYcoGr74cL-YfqWODQR3sohHlK1JVBw2JLwiRTHkhxiLqQn7W1sxSpLjP3ea5DRYW27CVH04J2TpUp2iDIprQGoykVy9nCW18tm9kouA2i52yQiApYDPhuLCA)
1. We’re down by 1 point in the most recent publicly available poll

2. Republicans are having a really hard time raising campaign cash, despite the fact that 85% of Americans think we’re on the wrong track as a country

3. I don’t have enough money to start airing my ads on TV and we have 80 days until Election Day

4. It costs $7k to air one of my ads on TV per day. Every day we’re not on TV, we will lose ground to my far-left opponent

With Republicans only needing 4 seats to capture the House, victory is within reach. But the fundraising gap between DEMS and REPUBS is bewildering.

**I’m asking you to help ensure my ADS don’t have to come down next week. Any gift you’re able to make today.**

[** HELP ME KEEP MY ADS ON TV **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=64bfeaeedb324bf39ab866a67519aa46&_e=HarQLzObll2yYBTB8si6wFhkpVvl7gA0c6XU1DR0gattf-0QbM4DlVOZie9XiKC4727BqYRsrt4KQ7-AeDLsQnYxybz76W4T_nYszo3Uc4o-DivUtL6IG6vweGmVMigvGTW0Hg94uBhY-iYsxqaAHubpwO0XuOm18TWtGA74uAfkq93RebNl3hMIR1DbMlvSp7eJqgpRWhU4MugcBly713qj3i7CdAl7yg0FAG5h84VbXaGJWwU5mi-SLGLqJ28ISePvCxmR6pZhPxcK6hUJOAr4dg1ctMpox6X_Nh-HZk_WsCMJ69i5qcxtiNMeoBDgENJYFigBhgF4mm-UCXRq3KpTWMc_MfYF_e5v8G50kFv1EpKsZfZaDCRRQljx8VmXiJ16L2qThnV7Vry1bT3ZNrNE3VcLcSbbIcfxBGdsvaitCzUnVAS5KqV7GYRyEb8o)
**Earlier this month, the Cook Political Report upgraded the race in Oregon’s 4th District from “Solid Democrat” to “Lean Democrat.” That means that all of the resources we’ve put into this race, both in 2021 and now this year, are having their intended effect.**

If we are forced to pull our ADS off TV for even one day, **we cede ground to the Democrats we may not get back.**

God Bless,
Alek Skarlatos
[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=64bfeaeedb324bf39ab866a67519aa46&_e=HarQLzObll2yYBTB8si6wFhkpVvl7gA0c6XU1DR0gattf-0QbM4DlVOZie9XiKC4727BqYRsrt4KQ7-AeDLsQnYxybz76W4T_nYszo3Uc4o-DivUtL6IG6vweGmVMigvGTW0Hg94uBhY-iYsxqaAHubpwO0XuOm18TWtGA74uAfkq93RebNl3hMIR1DbMlvSp7eJqgpRWhU4MugcBly713qj3i7CdAl7yg0FAG5h84VYrJO-N61gbo6iJzy8e77_gfTtN0YM3mBOlBzg2lbSt6-jFLLMdSA0ybFlvLpEK7LUlKRpsJ3UvMFoCrDBFp7IIMucIZecem4P03YpT-EldNkd5-_bUzpeBrHCbiEtywak2Bq-jkkp4IYe5SKEfbSf8QcZX4yHI6OQ1BbAIK63wAw5wGqy6WxjBwfYTCCNmSAo5XMSWBGRzW3kWmGonuRg)

clean_body: This email is of the utmost importance. We're going to have to pull the plugs on our TV ads this Sunday unless we get an influx of donations that allo We’re spending money like drunken sailors. Our individual liberties have been trounced and continue to be under constant threat from authoritarians running the show in D.C. and President Biden and VP Harris clearly do NOT have a grip on the power they wield. . | Peter, It’s Saturday and no doubt you’ve got better things to do than read this morning, nevertheless, I hope you will read it all of the way through to the end. I’m forwarding the email I sent yesterday regarding my TV ADS. In order to keep my TV ADS on air next week, I need to raise $21,000 by tomorrow night. Payments to the TV stations need to be made ahead of time, resulting in our fundraising deadline tomorrow. Yesterday, we raised the $7,000 we needed to raise. Today, we need to raise another $7,000. The email below further explains why this request is of the **utmost importance. Thanks, Alek \--------------------------------------- From: Alek Skarlatos Date: Friday, August 19, 2022 at 2:08 PM To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: My TV ADS are coming down Peter, My ads are going to have to come off TV early next week unless something drastic changes over the weekend. Due to the downturn in fundraising over the past year, we have just not been able to raise enough money to keep our ads on the air from now through November 8th. As it stands today, I need to raise $7,000 today and both days this weekend to ensure we can pay the TV stations to run our ADS next week. 1. We’re down by 1 point in the most recent publicly available poll 2. Republicans are having a really hard time raising campaign cash, despite the fact that 85% of Americans think we’re on the wrong track as a country 3. I don’t have enough money to start airing my ads on TV and we have 80 days until Election Day 4. It costs $7k to air one of my ads on TV per day. Every day we’re not on TV, we will lose ground to my far-left opponent With Republicans only needing 4 seats to capture the House, victory is within reach. But the fundraising gap between DEMS and REPUBS is bewildering. I’m asking you to help ensure my ADS don’t have to come down next week. Any gift you’re able to make today. Earlier this month, the Cook Political Report upgraded the race in Oregon’s 4th District from “Solid Democrat” to “Lean Democrat.” That means that all of the resources we’ve put into this race, both in 2021 and now this year, are having their intended effect. If we are forced to pull our ADS off TV for even one day, we cede ground to the Democrats we may not get back.** God Bless, Alek Skarlatos Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress P.S. | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. clean_body: 🚨🚨🚨 | Hi there, This week on Fox News, Senator Grassley asked a question American taxpayers want to know. What will the IRS do now that the Democrat-controlled Congress doubled the IRS budget? Unfortunately, we are actually asking ourselves this terrifying question. Just when we thought it couldn’t get worse, the Biden administration is shattering confidence in our institutions of government. From unleashing anti-terrorism surveillance tools on parents to raiding the home of a former U.S. president and now arming up the IRS, what’s Washington got in store next? The Biden administration is playing with fire here and undermining the public trust. The perception of partisan witch hunts and political bias create a crisis in confidence in our government institutions. Senator Grassley is working tirelessly alongside other conservative leaders to stop this overreach, but they can’t make real progress without your help. | Sincerely, Team Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Copyright © 2022 The Grassley Committee, All rights reserved.
