body:
[ ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWUwMSZzZXlpZD0xNzQxNyJ9/yu2wAsZxDasSImHbQxycjA) [](http://ir.freedomfirstproject.com/click/2/6113/188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb/237466?segment=237466) [ ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWUwMSZzZXlpZD0xNzQxNyJ9/yu2wAsZxDasSImHbQxycjA) **[The Army is Making Its First Uniform Bra](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWUwMSZzZXlpZD0xNzQxNyJ9/yu2wAsZxDasSImHbQxycjA)** Veterans say it is long overdue. When Sarah Hoyt arrived at Fort Jackson, S.C., for basic training in 2002, the Army confiscated all of her personal belongings. That included sports bras she had packed for the 10 weeks of strenuous physical activity that stretched ahead of her, she said. | | _**This is preposterous, Peter!**_

The Georgia GOP continues to nominate some of the most divisive candidates in the country. Their candidate for governor, Brian Kemp, signed one of the worst anti-abortion laws in the entire country, and has made it easier for criminals to carry guns on the streets of Georgia. Their candidate for Senate, Herschel Walker, supports a national abortion ban with NO exceptions, has repeatedly lied to Georgians about his record, and peddles bogus scams that target veterans and seniors. ([_**Pitch in to defeat Kemp and Walker.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49497460/362394006/710125701?refcode=20220820.1_GADems_8BM_A&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQ5ZTc1NS05YTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DxbY9UYEYpAC0FomZbwdqvOM1qMXoREKrC1Qy2B26w=))

Meanwhile, the GOP Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is cracking down on voting rights to tilt the scales toward Republicans. And Attorney General Chris Carr is doing everything he can to disenfranchise Black and Brown voters, defend Kemp’s extreme abortion ban, and put his special interest donors first. Even their Lt. Governor nominee, Burt Jones, tried to overturn Georgia’s election results! ([_**Help elect Democrats up and down the ballot.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49497461/362394007/710125701?refcode=20220820.1_GADems_8BM_A&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQ5ZTc1NS05YTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DxbY9UYEYpAC0FomZbwdqvOM1qMXoREKrC1Qy2B26w=))

_**And yet, Georgia is STILL a tossup, and all these extreme candidates might win. What???!?!?**_(_**[Fight back here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49497462/362394008/710125701?refcode=20220820.1_GADems_8BM_A&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQ5ZTc1NS05YTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DxbY9UYEYpAC0FomZbwdqvOM1qMXoREKrC1Qy2B26w=)**_)

You’d think the GOP wouldn’t have a chance with such an extreme slate of candidates. But Georgia is the most competitive swing state in 2022, and we expect every race to come down to just a couple points. That means _**any**_ Republican has a real chance at winning, no matter how ridiculous or extreme.

[__**It’s genuinely preposterous that any of these Republicans have a chance. But if grassroots supporters across the state and country pitch together, we can defeat Brian Kemp, Herschel Walker, and all these other horrible Republicans.**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49497463/362394009/710125701?refcode=20220820.1_GADems_8BM_A&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQ5ZTc1NS05YTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DxbY9UYEYpAC0FomZbwdqvOM1qMXoREKrC1Qy2B26w=)

clean_body: | | | This is preposterous, Peter! The Georgia GOP continues to nominate some of the most divisive candidates in the country. Their candidate for governor, Brian Kemp, signed one of the worst anti-abortion laws in the entire country, and has made it easier for criminals to carry guns on the streets of Georgia. Their candidate for Senate, Herschel Walker, supports a national abortion ban with NO exceptions, has repeatedly lied to Georgians about his record, and peddles bogus scams that target veterans and seniors. (=) Meanwhile, the GOP Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is cracking down on voting rights to tilt the scales toward Republicans. And Attorney General Chris Carr is doing everything he can to disenfranchise Black and Brown voters, defend Kemp’s extreme abortion ban, and put his special interest donors first. Even their Lt. Governor nominee, Burt Jones, tried to overturn Georgia’s election results! (=) And yet, Georgia is STILL a tossup, and all these extreme candidates might win. What???!?!?(=) You’d think the GOP wouldn’t have a chance with such an extreme slate of candidates. But Georgia is the most competitive swing state in 2022, and we expect every race to come down to just a couple points. That means any Republican has a real chance at winning, no matter how ridiculous or extreme. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let’s elect Stacey Abrams, Rev. Warnock, and our full slate of incredible Democratic candidates. We can do this. –GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. body:
Mitch McConnell is trying to save JD’s campaign
#
This is not a drill, Peter. National Republicans are swooping in with a MASSIVE TV ad buy to try and buoy JD Vance’s floundering campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49516651/362434219/1156869117?refcode=pm_em_220820_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDUxMGJlMC1iYjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N4PXnGCFUdTuWO0oAo4mBk5DYJvArxhuU0tNLz6nMaA=)
It’s Vance’s first ad buy of the general election, and these guys are dropping half a million dollars at the drop of a hat.
**This race is unbelievably close, so we only have two choices: we either step up our own ad buys to push back, or risk being completely drowned out on the airwaves.**
**[Every second counts, Peter. We urgently need to raise $100,000 TODAY in order to ramp up our ad spending, otherwise we’ll fall into too deep a hole to dig ourselves out. Can I count on you to rush a donation to our campaign and Patty Murray $5 ASAP?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49516652/362434220/1156869117?refcode=pm_em_220820_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDUxMGJlMC1iYjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N4PXnGCFUdTuWO0oAo4mBk5DYJvArxhuU0tNLz6nMaA=)**
JD’s campaign is barely treading water, and we always knew national Republicans and billionaire-funded super PACs would try to buy this Senate seat with dark money and misleading ads.
This brand new ad talks about how JD “will give back to Ohio.” 🙄
_Give me a break._
This guy BAILED on Ohio to make millions in Silicon Valley, so the idea of him “giving back” is both laughable and infuriating — **Ohioans deserve better, Peter.**
**If we get drowned out on the airwaves, we won’t be able to respond to JD’s lies and manipulations, and we’ve got to reach every single voter in the Buckeye State if we’re going to expand our Senate majority.[So what do you say—will you step up and chip in right now to my campaign and Patty Murray so we can defeat JD Vance and flip Ohio blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49516653/362434221/1156869117?refcode=pm_em_220820_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDUxMGJlMC1iYjIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N4PXnGCFUdTuWO0oAo4mBk5DYJvArxhuU0tNLz6nMaA=)**
Thanks,
Tim Ryan

The New Pennsylvania Project is working hard to engage, empower and mobilize the communities we center throughout Pennsylvania to expand our democracy so it reflects our demographically changing population. We are purposely centering communities that have historically been disenfranchised and ignored from the democratic process to EXPAND democracy. name: Josh Harder
subject: (no subject)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
Peter --
It's been a tough week over here in the Valley. The breaking poll showing us tied was a real gut punch. As you know, our team on the ground has been working incredibly hard the past year organizing volunteers, registering voters and even dealing with vandalized yard signs.
I told my team today that this poll wasn't a reflection of their work, but instead a reminder of how _important_ the work they are doing really is. Every single vote is going to matter in this race.
This has been a galvanizing moment for us, and my team and I have been going back and forth all week about how we're going to respond effectively. So here's the plan:
_First,_ we're hiring brand new organizers to ramp up our efforts to contact undecided voters.
_Second,_ we're launching a brand new round of digital ads to tell voters just how extreme my opponent Tom Patti really is.
_Third,_ we decided to launch our TV ads a week earlier than expected.
All of this has led to a large budget crunch because we're spending our resources quicker than we thought we'd need to, and now we're falling short of our next fundraising goal. I need your help to make sure we can fund all of these new expenses and match Republicans dollar for dollar in fundraising.
**Will you step up here, Peter? I 'm dropping a custom ActBlue link below so I can be sure to thank everyone who helps us out during this critical moment.**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Aug2022-FR-August?refcode2=Peter](https://act.myngp.com/el/m8YsHrG106MRowskTlg_OINOKjBDTuOOdQYyY0lpzVc=/HY7x-Ei5bTeYN6uh-9mvrV82CMQ5NdbDaMLpLP8fzJc=?refcode=E17858-20220820-JoshPersonal-SL-CampaignNews-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=22)**
Thank you so much for your support,
-- Josh

name: Herschel
subject: We’ve pulled our ads to save money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We don’t currently have the money to run TV ads. We’re being outraised and outspent by the Democrats. |
---

Fellow American - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with just 80 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Fellow American, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air. Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways EVERY DAY. This is a tremendous challenge with just 80 days left in the campaign. Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board! The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are. Fellow American, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling. The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV. This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call. While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond. I'm asking you, Fellow American, please help us get back on the air ASAP. Thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. I’m a working class community organizer who’s spent decades delivering change for my community. I don’t shy away from tough fights. I’ve got my game face on, and I’m ready to win this. Peter, every dollar you donate to our campaign goes toward getting MAGA Republican Mark Green — the most hateful, transphobic member of Congress — OUT 👏🏾 OF 👏🏾 OFFICE 👏🏾 The GOP is out here trying to take away our rights, go after gay and trans kids, keep people from getting healthcare, and push their hateful ideology. They have GOT to GO. From the hood to the hollers, I hope the race we are running here in TN-07 is making you proud. 💯 Have a great weekend, Odessa | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Adam Schiff
subject: $9 billion spent on elections is a policy failure
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I introduced a Constitutional Amendment to overturn the Supreme Court’s ruling in Citizens United, to protect our elections from unrestrained spending by wealthy donors and corporations, and to allow for public financing of elections.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=702%2E5257348%2EGKxBzE)
Derek —
This year’s midterm elections will be the most expensive in U.S. history — even more expensive than the 2020 presidential election.
With total ad spending in excess of $9 billion, much of that money will be funneled through dark money Super PACs with no contribution limits whatsoever, and without any transparency. Since the presidential ballot is not at the top of the ticket, that record spending will be entirely concentrated on control of Congress and many other important down ballot races. **_That’s alarming, and a real policy failure._**
Corporations and billionaires can spend untold amounts of money for their preferred candidates — or just as often to tear down those they dislike with a deluge of nasty, negative, and often false advertising.
Now more than ever, we need to protect the voice of the American voter and combat the corrupting influence of dark money over our elections. That’s why earlier this year, I introduced a Constitutional Amendment to overturn the Supreme Court’s ruling in _Citizens United_ , to protect our elections from unrestrained spending by wealthy donors and corporations, and to allow for public financing of elections. **_It’s past time._**
[**Derek, as a matter of principle, will you add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of my Constitutional Amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ as we enter this period of unprecedented midterm election spending?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220820-citizens-united-email-petition.E6tDuk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220820_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=702%2E5257348%2EGKxBzE)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220820-citizens-united-email-petition.E6tDuk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220820_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=702%2E5257348%2EGKxBzE)
---
The Supreme Court’s decision in the landmark _Citizens United v. FEC_ case overturned decades of precedent, deregulated corporate campaign spending, and allowed billions of dollars in dark money to flow into our elections.
This terrible decision resulted in an endless deluge of sensationalized and misinformed political ads which have divided and disillusioned our country. Dark money has weakened the voices of our people and opened the door for anti-democratic interests to sway the tides of public opinion.
Individuals and corporations routinely try to buy elections at the local, state, and federal levels. Too often, they seem to succeed.
This is not how our democracy should function. One person, one vote. Drowning out or diminishing a voter’s voice with the power of large corporate spending is at odds with how our system is supposed to work.
I know that this Constitutional Amendment is a tall task to accomplish with the filibuster and the present divisions in Congress and the country. But it’s the right thing to do — and putting emphasis on it now as billions of dollars are spent over the next several weeks is an important way to highlight the predicament we find ourselves in as a country and a democracy.
[**Derek, add your name and become a citizen co-sponsor of my Constitutional Amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ and reject the corrupting influence of dark money that will be flooding our airwaves in the weeks to come.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220820-citizens-united-email-petition.E6tDuk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220820_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=702%2E5257348%2EGKxBzE)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220820-citizens-united-email-petition.E6tDuk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220820_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=702%2E5257348%2EGKxBzE)
---
We must not accept a status quo where the power of wealthy donors and corporations is magnified while the strength of voices like yours is minimized.
That’s why I’m so proud of the way our campaign is funded, through small grassroots donors like you. And it’s time we close this dangerous _Citizens United_ loophole and make it a requirement of ALL campaigns to ensure that individual Americans have the most say in our elections.
Thank you for your support.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=702%2E5257348%2EGKxBzE) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=702%2E5257348%2EGKxBzE)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=702%2E5257348%2EGKxBzE)

And it’s time we close this dangerous Citizens United loophole and make it a requirement of ALL campaigns to ensure that individual Americans have the most say in our elections. Thank you for your support. — Adam 150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter, please help us get back on the air ASAP.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---

Peter - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with less than 90 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Peter, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054160:69vfwYVNJ:m:1:3331421248:73CDD8F736A3C9C3F25D6749ACF59F24:r)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call.

[** Help Fund Our TV Ads
Chip in $25 Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054161:69vfwYVNJ:m:1:3331421248:73CDD8F736A3C9C3F25D6749ACF59F24:r)
While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. **In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond.**

**[If you want us to flip the Georgia Senate seat from BLUE to RED and help Republicans win back the Senate majority, then I need you to give as generously as you can right this instant.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054160:69vfwYVNJ:m:1:3331421248:73CDD8F736A3C9C3F25D6749ACF59F24:r)**

I'm asking you, Peter, please help us get back on the air ASAP. **[Chip in anything you can today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054160:69vfwYVNJ:m:1:3331421248:73CDD8F736A3C9C3F25D6749ACF59F24:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. **[I hope you'll consider my request by chipping in $25 RIGHT NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61054160:69vfwYVNJ:m:1:3331421248:73CDD8F736A3C9C3F25D6749ACF59F24:r)** We really could use your help.

I’ve dedicated my life to putting America first. clean_body: | | | Friend, I’ve dedicated my life to putting America first. That’s what I did as South Carolina’s governor, it’s what I did protecting America on the national stage at the United Nations — and it’s what I’m doing right now working to elect as many conservatives as possible in this year’s elections. My team is already laying the groundwork for conservative victories in 2022 by endorsing, advising, and financially supporting more than 50 conservatives who understand what’s at stake and who believe America is inherently good — just like you and I do. Conservatives who know that the Democrats’ far-left policies aren’t just bad ideas, but undermine our basic freedoms and American values. My very best, Nikki Haley | DON’T MISS THIS UPDATE Did you know Nikki Haley recently endorsed a new slate of candidates for the upcoming midterm elections? name: Team Biaggi
subject: Writing to ask for $3 to help us fully fund our ambitious GOTV plan ahead of Tuesday's primary
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
As we speak, our Get Out the Vote operation is in full swing across the district
#

It's finally here, team: the last weekend of this primary.
As we speak, our Get Out the Vote operation is in full swing across the 17th district, and we're not touching the brakes until every single ballot is cast and counted.
The truth is that a $3 contribution will go a long way toward fully funding our ambitious GOTV plans for this weekend and through Tuesday. [**Can you donate right now to stand with Alessandra here in the final stretch?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?refcode=em220820-1-t1&refcode2=1034_59515_HI29OX&akid=1034%2E59515%2EHI29OX)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220820-1-t1&refcode2=1034.59515.HI29OX&akid=1034%2E59515%2EHI29OX)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220820-1-t1&refcode2=1034.59515.HI29OX&akid=1034%2E59515%2EHI29OX)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220820-1-t1&refcode2=1034.59515.HI29OX&akid=1034%2E59515%2EHI29OX)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220820-1-t1&refcode2=1034.59515.HI29OX&akid=1034%2E59515%2EHI29OX)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220820-1-t1&refcode2=1034.59515.HI29OX&akid=1034%2E59515%2EHI29OX)**
---
****
| **[Or another amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&refcode=em220820-1-t1&refcode2=1034.59515.HI29OX&akid=1034%2E59515%2EHI29OX)**
---
****
Since day one of this race, we knew this would not be an easy campaign.
We knew that our path to victory relied on our progressive movement organizing and mobilizing as many people as possible to be a part of this team. And we knew that our opponent and the establishment's super PACs would do and spend whatever it took to stop us.
Now, with just three days to go in the primary and one final weekend to talk to voters, we need to ask for your support once again:
[**Can you make your first online $3 contribution today so we can fully fund our GOTV plan through primary day? We need to mobilize as many voters as we can before polls close, and the only way we do that is with your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?refcode=em220820-1-t1&refcode2=1034_59515_HI29OX&akid=1034%2E59515%2EHI29OX)
In 2018, when Alessandra was outspent 10-to-1 by her establishment opponent, we won by inspiring and mobilizing a grassroots movement of people, and getting them to the polls.
Thanks for being a part of our fight to do it again.
\- Team Biaggi

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?refcode=em220820-1-t1&refcode2=1034.59515.HI29OX&akid=1034%2E59515%2EHI29OX)**

3. **Despite all of this, this race is _still_ within the margin of error.** But if Herschel is going to pull ahead, he needs all of us to step up. Right now, the goal is _489 more online donors before midnight_.

body:

Unfortunately, I don't have good news, Peter.

| **FIRST:** Our ads have "gone dark." Because we're behind our fundraising budget, we had to pull our TV ads off the air. _Georgians are no longer hearing from our campaign._

**THEN:** This story came out ⬇️⬇️⬇️

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carl=20Paladino?=
subject: Tele-Rally with Congresswoman Elise Stefanik and Carl Paladino
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=7e49f828ab&u=3bf22d0f57d54fb47b0038eb8&id=172aef0128)
---
| | Dear friend,

**I wanted to invite you to a very important tele-rally on Monday, August 22nd at 7:00PM.** I am very excited to announce that Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, the House Republican Conference Chair will be on the call campaigning for me. Congresswoman Elise Stefanik is one of President Trump’s closest allies in Congress, you might remember her from helping defeat the sham impeachments, and beating Pro-impeachment RINO lunatic Liz Cheney as Conference Chair for the House Republicans. **You can join the tele-rally by dialing 833-305-1685 on August 22nd at 7PM.** Early in-person voting is still underway, you have until Sunday, August 21st if you want to participate in early in-person voting. You can find your early in-person voting location by clicking [here](https://CarlPaladino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf22d0f57d54fb47b0038eb8&id=1e4481ac16&e=7e49f828ab). Election Day is this Tuesday, August 23rd. We need all Republican patriots to flood the polls so we can send a message to the corrupt DC establishment.

Please join our tele-rally, as we work to get out the vote for Election Day on August 23rd. President Trump also uses these rallies to energize his voters and drive them to the polls on Election Day. Voters will have a chance to talk to Congresswoman Elise Stefanik and me. This Election is a clear contrast, the DC swamp is funding my opponent with Never Trump donors, to who he will be beholden. I am self-funding my campaign and only care about the approval of the great people of Western New York and the Southern Tier. I have stood with President Trump since day one, and have created thousands of jobs right here in the area. I hope you will join us and that I can earn your vote on August 23rd. It would be the honor of my life to be the Congressman for New York’s 23rd Congressional District. Let’s win this thing! Best,
Carl Paladino
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://CarlPaladino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf22d0f57d54fb47b0038eb8&id=75b91b4f92&e=7e49f828ab)
---
| | [](https://CarlPaladino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf22d0f57d54fb47b0038eb8&id=bdb51d432d&e=7e49f828ab)

Peter -

I’m reaching out today about my friend, and our U.S. Senate nominee in Connecticut, [**Leora Levy.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e8c8f0e25b844f459a9c2b15a0e0a14f&_e=Htk0Q2MbVSJQoNYHCqgWk76uLw6u1-XaU1Dk1E5cROnm0h1loyrWZxzFdATPyskckYxFZl7ooLmzSDcDmFPRSSP-Que6G8Ud92Pjk940KePSKeLqbeuBerNa5Uc9TTTOHyT1zmDujtjTpeSezaCjF0RbT-cztj_anK0343a55FkS9LHKFr1ObR6_7bbTHaevVhi7GuKOOAnwHRRasiZHtn9T5qPoVCkl4wfUK8hDjLKotveMI8rzVFiW6nO9e4rGYZjPdPHNl9ACo9I8PUjNYCI6Ky5GT38FLkn6f_Qb7wjvY95yCNqxHWm5I2Ju_b1bjlI5A2S8fyqGlNlJGoHUtbMW9Vw2EOcjNKkoC6qX4jTfXj3_XBalnhPMqetdLfsBOg_Gk1vzUe2nFrnbMeGVw459YrVBlJfj9ymfmq9KqAH49ewXz6tl8irlYDUPAAHR83LXG4Egj8uAZXlRXkkpOA%3D%3D)

Leora and her family escaped Castro’s Communist Revolution in Cuba. She’s lived the American Dream, and she’s running for Senate to preserve it for future generations — and to stop Democrats from transforming our country.

Leora won big in a tough primary, but now she’s up against Dick Blumenthal, who has the full support of the Democrat machine behind him. **But polling shows this is a competitive race — which means we can win** [**if conservatives rally around Leora.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e8c8f0e25b844f459a9c2b15a0e0a14f&_e=Htk0Q2MbVSJQoNYHCqgWk76uLw6u1-XaU1Dk1E5cROnm0h1loyrWZxzFdATPyskckYxFZl7ooLmzSDcDmFPRSSP-Que6G8Ud92Pjk940KePSKeLqbeuBerNa5Uc9TTTOHyT1zmDujtjTpeSezaCjF0RbT-cztj_anK0343a55FkS9LHKFr1ObR6_7bbTHaevVhi7GuKOOAnwHRRasiZHtn9T5qPoVCkl4wfUK8hDjLKotveMI8rzVFiW6nO9e4rGHBl_QdLPI5dKptnj0dO9Mbhzkk3iPnizIYJrnM_fvPp-MIJpPSL8GdfRTJCNESQV_Zp5hl1YDiRAjYShjPORP68Hp8TFjuq5Zj24CzUho-fmMEw2Q8Dp-0W-Jaw5ajS1X4KjTKpnWbWDHGakZlHtsTDf2_j5X7M45YWpy0cxWO1uHrAocoCPnVucoheCtv1CsAx3dYZQ-ZOBbdIT8pBWzg%3D%3D)

[**Will you join me by supporting Leora with a difference-making donation today? She can’t win without you.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e8c8f0e25b844f459a9c2b15a0e0a14f&_e=Htk0Q2MbVSJQoNYHCqgWk76uLw6u1-XaU1Dk1E5cROnm0h1loyrWZxzFdATPyskckYxFZl7ooLmzSDcDmFPRSSP-Que6G8Ud92Pjk940KePSKeLqbeuBerNa5Uc9TTTOHyT1zmDujtjTpeSezaCjF0RbT-cztj_anK0343a55FkS9LHKFr1ObR6_7bbTHaevVhi7GuKOOAnwHRRasiZHtn9T5qPoVCkl4wfUK8hDjLKotveMI8rzVFiW6nO9e4rG0joQq3KSOtZDsclQYi3ovW4Ff_3CF7o0_PAe6Y1XF6aqSz2bUntSrVuWkdRI9EKprpnXeLOrJ3cY3QAW7Dpmgl81OZbp12NehAFQIW75AqEdDTUbsYDXojXjTdcMiepjBgQLwrYlk2xSUwBXruY-FlplqCfNG6bNQeNOt0or_bE-L_2VMgtZ1MdHh7yvSdWmol7jcrsfL-l4jWj9YZrJsQ%3D%3D)

name: R. Warnock
subject: Hi Derek!
body:
Hi Derek!
I have a few minutes between campaign meetings, so I wanted to use this time to reach out.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220820_CGVA_Warnock [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220820_CGVA_Warnock]
By now, I'm sure you've heard all about my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker.
Donald Trump has come to Georgia multiple times to rally with Walker, Mitch McConnell's super PAC is launching TV ads to help flip this seat, and GOP donors are flooding his campaign with over $20 million to defeat me. Now, polls show him 1 point ahead.
With experts saying Senate control could once again come down to Georgia, we're running out of time to make the critical investments that will decide this race. But unlike Walker, I refuse to accept any big checks from corporate PACs; my campaign is 100% people-powered.
That's why I'm coming to you with an important ask:
Will you please split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood today to help me defeat Herschel Walker, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220820_CGVA_Warnock]
[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220820_CGVA_Warnock]

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220820_CGVA_Warnock&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220820_CGVA_Warnock&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220820_CGVA_Warnock&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220820_CGVA_Warnock]
Thank you so much for all you do. I'm grateful for every bit of grassroots support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

Far-right Republicans will stop at nothing to tear down our campaign, and are spending over $25 million trying to defeat me.

So I’ll ask you again, everyone: **[Will you please make an urgently needed donation to my campaign right now? name: Maggie Hassan
subject: How I got my start 📎
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to [**split a donation between my campaign and Cheri Beasley's U.S. Senate campaign in North Carolina.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-mh-split.V0dJDh&refcode=em220820-2-ma&t=1&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW) But first, I wanted to give you a little background on how I became the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and Senator.
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-mh-split.V0dJDh&refcode=em220820-2-ma&t=2&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW)
My dad was a WWII veteran who survived the Battle of the Bulge. He used to look over the corner of his newspaper at the breakfast table and ask my siblings and me, “What are you doing for freedom today?”
That’s a big question for three kids who are just trying to finish their cereal before the school bus arrives, but it’s one I think about to this day – and make a point to answer.
I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like my son Ben, who has cerebral palsy, would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children.
Serving the people of New Hampshire as State Senator, Governor, and now U.S. Senator has been the honor of my life. And I'm committed to delivering on the issues that matter most to Granite Staters.
But Republicans know that if they flip this seat, they’ll take back the Senate majority. That's why extreme GOP groups are spending over $25 million attacking me — just like they’re attacking Cheri.
I'm writing today because I won my last race by just 1,017 votes in one of the closest Senate races in history, and this year the stakes are even higher.
When you win by less than half a percentage point, your campaign has to be as strong as possible in every aspect, and this year, Cheri Beasley and I are in two of the most competitive races in the entire country.
That's where you come in: [**Will you please split a donation between my campaign and Cheri Beasley's so that Democrats can hold control of the Senate? Any amount helps and is greatly appreciated.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-mh-split.V0dJDh&refcode=em220820-2-ma&t=3&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Cheri Beasley and Maggie Hassan instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/3792?c0=cb-em-mh-split.j0zr57&refcode=em220820-2-ma&refcode2=1499.357359.p7yFWW&t=22&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2575?c0=cb-em-mh-split.nzANl9&refcode=em220820-2-ma&refcode2=1499.357359.p7yFWW&t=23&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2576?c0=cb-em-mh-split.U-NWqb&refcode=em220820-2-ma&refcode2=1499.357359.p7yFWW&t=24&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2569?c0=cb-em-mh-split.Ol2BlH&refcode=em220820-2-ma&refcode2=1499.357359.p7yFWW&t=25&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2570?c0=cb-em-mh-split.zmAYSn&refcode=em220820-2-ma&refcode2=1499.357359.p7yFWW&t=26&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2573?c0=cb-em-mh-split.QgHtHb&refcode=em220820-2-ma&refcode2=1499.357359.p7yFWW&t=27&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW)**
---
****
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=1499%2E357359%2Ep7yFWW). name: Herschel Walker
subject: I am worried.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We don’t currently have the money to run TV ads. We’re being outraised and outspent by the Democrats. |
---

Fellow American - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with just 80 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Fellow American, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=143680afccaf4bdfb85001b32766f551&_e=LRY_FkD4WwamqmFnSBWW84v45SSl-8664gTKmgcKAkhc_UzWuIYgWwSItmA76_JivPktj_Vf-Z_Y5o21_wzvhsom_XpUeaXQ_s3ppJGLct6E4oGVLME3AzL9HoveopVvj2nk-Q9skqNXRyWj2kcwKNw9In9LjeuDZbK2fjTUdSUqtXAan1LRTnExJWTncS-efNIrSxMpnH4eUGSMkRBxbjGAJLDvdXKTGa2xIy4dE8bdsOl7rtBLW_TArrA3kTw8KXyTdijnXiBGemuh6kRCAcNzyGgkuExS3bo977-JNeAveq6DNxyWIWPwj_qavGmL7XhQaVi1r-Vw-v8SwBMuSleRddik6nEnyFlFd8YyZVEjbORqTby3iYUcqovf4ZFpttziwfgF3dS6N9is85l68IFXBceI-F7TC4HykgoDyo1A9kKJDsSThRu08IB76urXZN90JIDNCiqq-V_nastYC0WT1SPOoHfhOarKTWCB7V66vi93UKIVTFrRREe1xM5a)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call.

While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. **In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond.**

clean_body: We don’t currently have the money to run TV ads. We’re being outraised and outspent by the Democrats. | Fellow American - Our ads have gone dark. To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air. Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways EVERY DAY. This is a tremendous challenge with just 80 days left in the campaign. Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board! The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are. Fellow American, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling. The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV. This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call. While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond. I'm asking you, Fellow American, please help us get back on the air ASAP. Thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. We really could use your help. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Hello,
This week at the Iowa State Fair, the world was introduced to Albert, an Angus bull weighing in at 3,042 pounds. Big Al won the highly-coveted “Super Bull” title by eating almost 100 pounds of feed every single day.
But do you know what weighs _even more_ than Albert, at 3,086 pounds? $1.4 million in one-dollar bills, which is the amount of money that Chuck Grassley has taken from the pharmaceutical industry.
I bet it’s pretty hard to stand up to Big Pharma with the weight of a 3,000 pound bull in your wallet. So maybe that’s why Chuck Grassley voted _against_ lowering the cost of insulin to $35 a month and _against_ allowing Medicare to negotiate drug prices so seniors can stop having to cut pills in half just to survive.
But the fact that this week Grassley then misled voters by telling them that he actually DOES support it? That’s what I’d call _a lot of bull_ ...
I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because, like the rest of Iowa, I’ve grown weary of watching him do the bidding of corporations and special interests, instead of hardworking Iowans – and then dodging questions about it with DC doublespeak.
I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I won’t owe anyone any favors in Washington.
**But with control of the Senate on the line, Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs and Fox “News” are coming after me with every mistruth they’ve got. The way to fight back and win is if grassroots donors like you chip in now.**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our midnight fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49520188/362442885/-42398318?refcode=em20220820pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2ZhYTEwMS1jOTIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gdnLVGA6jDVjAUpgUGlmFWuU995IJAXHziPTLyVJHc8=)

It’s John Fetterman — Lieutenant Governor of PA + Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate. Mmmm 😋 crudité! | = Just kidding. This is NOT a photo of me holding Crudité. We've emailed. We've texted. We've done everything we can to garner the grassroots support our campaigns need to take back Congress - but with devastating polling and record fundraising numbers released from the Democrats, it looks like we're done...

Our team has reached out to 98% of the patriots on our list - which leads me to you, Patriot. You're our LAST RESORT to turn things around. **[Can we count on you to give a $5, $10, or $25 gift to keep our campaigns running?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61053902:JmlK-YVNH:m:1:3299561967:BB347E8CEFEF283AF768340C8EE7E04C:r "Can I count on you
to give a $5, $10, or $25 gift to keep our campaigns running?")**

body:
Scott Baugh is running for Congress in California’s 47th District. Baugh is running against liberal darling Katie Porter. |
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=113de2bf4f&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, There are less than 3 months left to go before Election Day, and our campaign has momentum...

**FIRST,** national leaders like Ted Cruz, Ronny Jackson and Kevin McCarthy endorsed my campaign to defeat liberal darling Katie Porter.

**THEN** , Fox News named Katie Porter one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the entire country.

**NOW,** the OC Register is reporting that national Democrats are getting desperate to help Katie Porter stay in Congress.

But...the one area where we still need even more momentum is in fundraising numbers. You see, Katie Porter is maintaining a 10x cash advantage over our campaign.

Now, Peter, there’s no doubt that these funds have come from liberal elitists in Hollywood and Washington, D.C., but their dollars count just the same when we go to purchase advertising.

So, no matter the source of the funds, we need to do more to take fundraising momentum away from Katie Porter.

I was told I could count on you to help fund my campaign. So, I’m imploring you to please rush in a contribution of [$5](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=289d02981d&e=8a657725d1), [$15 ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=1eb332306b&e=8a657725d1)or [$47](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=8a8f9e1f14&e=8a657725d1) to flip California’s 47th District.
---

---
| Republicans everywhere are counting on us (and you!).

Thank you,
Scott Baugh

Friend,
---
In 1973, nearly 3 in every 4 members of Congress had served in the military.
---
Today, we have the lowest number of veterans in Congress since at least World War II.
---
But in less than 90 days, we have the chance not only to FIRE Pelosi, but to reclaim the People’s House with conservative **veterans** who will _always_ put America FIRST.
---
_That’s why I’m asking every grassroots patriot I know to step up and help my good friend and fellow Iraq War veteran, Tom Barrett, FLIP one of the must-win seats needed to end Pelosi’s majority._

body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc05caf816474b7b9469cbb6fab0e4fa&_e=25_VUJrmENx9E4_TNOUH0E6jIM2A2KyUWe_to7LflkautZmQeTlkBcQ3G4nh8GMYrdpYTWnHvyd2zxFJKrfyKr2u5DKpIOTHrWTMkbOr5NLPID-8X1suYo_KqmaKDH1iREY6s4wPl5u3SLNZBAZ0xp1wF10snSQaf337JapytnuonXrDPQWNYwMtBZYKq_zOHkISwpGDG1Md7nfu61wc1LRplr87CKFSSw8K-hrMjZ5Xpm58mkXpTBx7O4q_yXWuWuxj2cZcQ4J2QlDjsDlLkyk6F7RZN3LCWkuJ5NZL8FaaH2Xr6XxbWSUzkMTaZ9_IDRezNKqU1NhL6ndJzlCjIhnKah0qjSHCDqyJOHqEsdRw10i0RrMM_ZeziXbQcZYzBQIOgUzgzpgV3y1_MkJLuxBO2x4cEPbZ84kOVjN20poI52EwJQmvDKlV1C7avVvr)
---
| | Dear Friend,
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc05caf816474b7b9469cbb6fab0e4fa&_e=25_VUJrmENx9E4_TNOUH0E6jIM2A2KyUWe_to7LflkautZmQeTlkBcQ3G4nh8GMYrdpYTWnHvyd2zxFJKrfyKr2u5DKpIOTHrWTMkbOr5NLPID-8X1suYo_KqmaKDH1iREY6s4wPl5u3SLNZBAZ0xp1wF10snSQaf337JapytnuonXrDPQWNYwMtBZYKq_zOHkISwpGDG1Md7nfu61wc1LRplr87CKFSSw8K-hrMjZ7Wbem4WnfFwjXMJsJackZi-fo_A3M_4pGV9DVIicJ-aE0m8v5jvdhIGefevKNDter010GwiR7Mc1F_85IGnXRODQ_OaFrnu3Yl6eZQuahCrLUTEyczuspKogD5v3qyPhpMq5cLO2x8HJtuddCuUS_-qof4j0qhcBOC2d2Pccxwl_lKMDN6X1jICI1wp7nh0UE5wpHsY-2UbtJGAOMkTuOk)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**

body:

|

A shady Radical Left organization bankrolled by dark money tried to kick me off the ballot this year.

It was a sinister plot to REMOVE me from Congress. But they failed and now my #1 priority for the next 3 months is defeating the godless communists who tried to take me down and restoring an America First Majority in Congress.

name: VADEMS
subject: Youngkin Headlining Michigan GOP Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Glenn Youngkin is out of state (again) to campaign some more with election deniers

|
---
Derek, Glenn Youngkin is leaving Virginia again. This time it isn’t only to meet with dark money Republican donors for his 2024 Presidential run. He’s headlining the Michigan GOP’s convention — stumping for their gubernatorial nominee, Tudor Dixon. Dixon notably threw her support behind a 1931 ban on abortion, which would criminalize abortion in Michigan, and has loudly claimed that the 2020 election was stolen – so it’s no wonder that Glenn Youngkin is so eager to support her. While Glenn Youngkin is out of town, trying to unseat Governor Whitmer by cozying up to election deniers, Democrats continue to work on behalf of Virginians. clean_body: Glenn Youngkin is out of state (again) to campaign some more with election deniers | Derek, Glenn Youngkin is leaving Virginia again. This time it isn’t only to meet with dark money Republican donors for his 2024 Presidential run. He’s headlining the Michigan GOP’s convention — stumping for their gubernatorial nominee, Tudor Dixon. Dixon notably threw her support behind a 1931 ban on abortion, which would criminalize abortion in Michigan, and has loudly claimed that the 2020 election was stolen – so it’s no wonder that Glenn Youngkin is so eager to support her. While Glenn Youngkin is out of town, trying to unseat Governor Whitmer by cozying up to election deniers, Democrats continue to work on behalf of Virginians. body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19427?t=1009&amount=25&akid=5129%2E3611125%2EdeQgVp ][IMG]

Look, being a campaign manager isn’t easy. You’ve got to manage budgets,
review media markets, plan campaign stops, place TV ads, the list goes on
and on. But JD Vance is running without a doubt the worst campaign I’ve
ever seen, folks.

He’s saddled with debt and beholden to an out-of-state billionaire named
Peter Thiel—so in the spirit of healthy competition, I’ve got a little
advice for him. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19427?t=1010&amount=25&akid=5129%2E3611125%2EdeQgVp ]But first, can you pitch in a quick $25 to flip Ohio
blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19427?t=1011&amount=25&akid=5129%2E3611125%2EdeQgVp ]Donate

My first piece of advice? Pay your staff what you owe them, when you owe
them. Sounds pretty obvious, but after taking a look at JD’s financials,
it looks like someone missed the memo—he owes his campaign manager $20k.

Second, one billionaire donor won’t cut it. Instead of building up
grassroots support, JD has hitched his wagon to one out-of-state,
power-hungry Silicon Valley billionaire. As a result, we outraised him 9
to 1 last quarter.

Bottom line: JD is a terrible candidate backed by terrible people, so it’s
no wonder he’s running a terrible campaign—despite that, this race is
neck-and-neck. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19427?t=1012&amount=25&akid=5129%2E3611125%2EdeQgVp ]So can you chip in $25 to Tim Ryan to show JD what a
real campaign looks like?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19427?t=1013&amount=25&akid=5129%2E3611125%2EdeQgVp ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19427?t=1014&amount=50&akid=5129%2E3611125%2EdeQgVp ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19427?t=1007&amount=250&akid=5129%2E3611125%2EdeQgVp ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19427?t=1008&amount=30&akid=5129%2E3611125%2EdeQgVp ]Other Amount

I’d tell JD not to worry about paying for the advice, but from the looks
of his campaign, it’s unlikely he’d pay up anyway.

LFG!

Dave Chase
Campaign Manager
Tim Ryan for Ohio

This goal is our final chance to ensure that we have the final resources we need to turn out supporters across our massive district, from Ulster and Columbia counties in the east, all the way out to Broome and Tompkins counties in the west, and everything in between! But, here’s the bad news: We’re still $9,847 short of this goal, and the truth is that at least 95% of the people reading this email won’t contribute today. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | | = | = | = | = Let’s get it done, Coby Eiss Campaign Manager Josh Riley for Congress * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 6806 213 Tioga St Ithaca, NY 14851 United States | | ---|--- = = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 6806, 213 Tioga St, Ithaca, NY 14851. **_[We cannot let that happen. name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Progressives stand up to Manchin, student debt fight ramps up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Manchin’s New Dirty Deal - [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6271?t=1011&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Take Action | Crunchtime for
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6763?t=1012&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Worker Bill | Student Debt Fight Ramps Up | Jasmine Crockett Talks
Strategy | New Endorsements! | NY Voter Guide - Vote Tues! | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1013&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]NEW BERNIE STICKER!

Bernie never gives up and neither do we. Our Revolution and our
progressive movement is shifting the window of what’s possible. Let’s keep
building on our hard-fought gains.

As Bernie always says: “Despair is not an option.”

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1014&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]GET YOUR VINYL STICKER

★ ★ ★

Mark your calendars for our LIVE National Organizing Call this Monday at
8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT - with US Rep. Ayanna Pressley on the progressive
project in Congress. Other guests will include: Corey Jones, candidate for
City Council in Providence, RI (Ward 3).

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6872?t=1015&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

MANCHIN’S DIRTY DEAL TO FAST-TRACK FOSSIL FUELS

Our Revolution and progressives in Congress are organizing to stop Joe
Manchin’s newest dirty deal — which was written and leaked by The American
Petroleum Institute (API) — to fast-track fossil fuels and undo climate
steps in the Inflation Reduction Act.

“Why would Democrats reverse this momentum by enacting an API wish list
that will make it even harder for frontline communities to protect
themselves?” asked US Rep. Raúl Grijalva (AZ-7) in his op-ed in
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6765?t=1016&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Newsweek Wednesday. “The answer is, we should not.”

Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are ready to give Manchin and API more
pipelines and drilling, fewer regulations and fewer safeguards for
impacted communities — all packaged in a *must-pass* resolution to fund
the government.

Rashida Tlaib commented: “We don’t owe Joe Manchin anything.”

“If API tries to force passage of its proposal through the House, we will
fight against it,” wrote Grijalva, who chairs the House Committee on
Natural Resources.

Based on the API leak, the deal would curtail public input, environmental
review, and government accountability; require fossil fuel taking priority
for federal support; undermine the Clean Water Act; and more.

It’s insanity for our leaders to even consider this while hailing a
historic climate bill. Don’t hesitate to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6271?t=1017&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]contact your House Rep now to
make these demands —

* Don’t fast-track new gas or oil projects
* Don’t fast-track carbon pipelines
* Don’t cut environmental safeguards in fossil fuel projects
* Separate the fast-track vote from the must-pass resolution to fund the
government

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6271?t=1018&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Stop Manchin - MAKE THE CALL

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Jasmine Crockett joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6766?t=1019&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]National Organizing Call on Monday to
discuss the path to building progressive power in Congress.

Jasmine urged our members to volunteer and support candidates across the
country, highlighting some of our huge primary wins with candidates like
Summer Lee (PA-12), Greg Casar (TX-35), and many others.

“The Congressional Progressive Caucus is already the largest caucus,” she
said, noting our growing numbers will help overcome the generational
divide in Washington. “Our policies are people-centered policies, and the
data shows it’s what the majority wants.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5967?t=1020&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Become a recurring donor TODAY to get more progressives over the
finish line. Let’s grow our power together!

★ ★ ★

Quentin Palfrey has a life of experience fighting for the underdog and the
full support of Our Revolution Massachusetts in his race for Attorney
General.

“With attacks on democracy, abortion rights, workers rights, racial
justice, a lot of challenges are falling to the states,” Quentin told us
on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6766?t=1021&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]live broadcast Monday. “I’ll use the AG office to push for
Medicare for All, transportation, education, and an economy that works for
everyone.”

For 20 years, Palfrey has worked as an election protection attorney — he
founded Voter Protection Corps in 2019 and led efforts to stop voter
suppression ahead of the 2020 election.

Election Day in Massachusetts is Sept. 6.

Quentin took the People’s Pledge to renounce independent expenditures, and
he’s relying on all of us to get the word out for this primary election!

Join our phonebank crew for an evening of calls, finding like-minded folks
ready to put progressives like Quentin in office.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6333?t=1022&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]PHONEBANK FOR QUENTIN

★ ★ ★

And, we’re proud to endorse Megan Green - a 2016 Bernie delegate we
supported for St. Louis Board of Aldermen last time around, now running
for President of the Board!

Megan is running to replace the former Board President who resigned after
being indicted under federal bribery charges. “Years ago I called out this
corruption, and now we have a lot of work to do to restore trust,” she
said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6766?t=1023&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Monday Call.

Already in office, Megan has fought for a higher minimum wage, civilian
oversight of police, reproductive rights, domestic violence protections,
legal marijuana, and more.

If you’re in St. Louis, vote for Megan in the special election Sept. 13.

Help us call voters for Megan as she runs against big money to join the
progressives representing St. Louis - folks like US Rep. Cori Bush - to
move our agenda forward!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6242?t=1024&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]CALL FOR MEGAN IN ST. LOUIS

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution supports the re-election bid of NY State Senator Robert
Jackson in District 31, who has decades of experience fighting for
education equality, affordable housing, and a prosperous multicultural
NYC.

“I’m up against big money from hedge funds, charter schools, and real
estate trying to unseat me, but we’re fighting all the way,” Robert told
us on our Monday [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6766?t=1025&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Organizing Call.

From his time as School Board President to his 12 years on the New York
City Council, and now in the State Senate, Robert Jackson takes on the
tough fights for New Yorkers again and again - and never backs down.

Early voting is open through Sunday and Election Day is Tuesday (Aug. 23).
If you’re in NY, find where to vote [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/926?t=1026&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]HERE.

Our Revolution NYPAN has been on the ground canvassing with Sen. Jackson
in Washington Heights. You can help from anywhere by joining our phone
bank for Robert!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6282?t=1027&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]MAKE CALLS

★ ★ ★

VOTE TUESDAY IN NY

NY State Sen. Robert Jackson is one of our many great candidates on the
ballot Tuesday in New York’s 2nd Primary of the year. Our Revolution also
endorses Sarah Blas (D-23) and Gustavo Rivera (D-33) for NY State Senate.

“Our lived experience matters, it’s time we say no to elected officials
raising money from corporations,” Sarah [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6275?t=1028&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]told us last month. “We need
folks who will show up where it counts.”

As chair of the Senate Health Committee, Gustavo is a main sponsor of the
New York Health Act — which would create a system of universal,
single-payer healthcare in the state.

Our Revolution is also working to get out the vote for two candidates for
US Congress in New York: Brittany Ramos DeBarros (NY-11) and Melanie
D’Arrigo (NY-3).

Brittany is an Afro-Latina Staten Islander, former Army captain, and
anti-war activist running against a conservative Democrat who already lost
this seat once to a Republican in 2020.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6874?t=1029&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]MAKE CALLS FOR BRITTANY

Melanie is an active member of Our Revolution’s Long Island chapter, LI
Activists. She’s also a leader on Medicare for All with National Nurses
United and helped found the Sunrise Movement in Nassau County.

Shout-out to Our Revolution organizers with NYPAN and LI Activists - Joe
Sackman, Jenny Almanzar, and many others - who joined Melanie D’Arrigo to
knock doors at the Rock the Vote Rally this week!

Even if you’re not in NY, you can affect this race, which is in a
statistical tie! Sign up for a phone bank shift - it’s easy and every
single vote counts!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6134?t=1030&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]MAKE CALLS FOR MELANIE

★ ★ ★

This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more
than 500,000 calls to voters across the country. Right now, we have shifts
for incredible candidates for Congress like Brittany Ramos-DeBarros
(NY-11), David Segal (RI-2), Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3), and many others!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=1031&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]COMMIT TO A CALL SHIFT

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

TAKING DARK MONEY OUT OF PRIMARIES

Last month, we asked Our Revolution members what you would change about
the Democratic Party.

Over 80% of you agree that dark money corrupts should be banned from
Democratic primaries. We heard you loud and clear, and Our Revolution
introduced a resolution this week to do just that!

We’ve already built a strong coalition of 33 DNC members, but to outweigh
the lobbyists in the party, we must demonstrate the power of this
grassroots demand every day up through the Sept. 10th voting deadline.

We’ve seen what dark money has done to progressive candidates like Jessica
Cisneros, Nina Turner, even incumbent US Rep. Andy Levin. It’s
outrageously anti-democratic and this one change would go a long way to
making it a fair fight.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1032&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]The primaries are strategically critical for progressives to take
power and replace corporate politicians. Chip-in now to help us BAN dark
money.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★
PRESSURE RISES TO CANCEL STUDENT DEBT

The student debt fight is ramping up NOW as the moratorium is set to
expire Aug. 31st. Joe Biden has just two months to fulfill his promise
ahead of midterms.

The progressive movement is leveraging the power of this moment to urge
the president to use his power and cancel student debt. We’re joined by
Progressives in Congress like Cori Bush, Ro Khanna, and many more who
declared that “the clock is ticking.”

“‘Medical debt’ is simply not a phrase you should hear in a functioning
society,” Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese was quoted
in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6870?t=1033&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Common Dreams. “Same goes for ‘student loan debt.’”

★ ★ ★

WORKER BILL ADVANCES IN CA

GREAT NEWS! AB 257 - the FAST Recovery Act to give California fast food
workers a seat at the table - passed through the Appropriations Committee
Thursday and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6763?t=1034&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]you can help it pass the full State Senate this week.

Our Revolution activists and allies have worked for years for historic
legislation like this, and if we win in California - we can use this bill
as a model for workers to have a say in states across the country.

Angelica Hernandez, who’s worked at McDonald’s in Los Angeles for 18
years, told us on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6279?t=1035&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Organizing Call last week of an industry rife
with wage theft, sexual harassment, discrimination, violence, and health
and safety issues.

“I’ve faced retaliation because I raise my voice, but it’s worth it to
fight for my coworkers,” she said. “We want to live, work and retire with
dignity.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6763?t=1036&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]CALIFORNIA: CALL YOUR STATE SENATORS NOW

Half a million California fast food workers are on the cusp of victory,
but they need our solidarity and activism! We need to ramp up the pressure
THIS WEEK.

If you’re in California, call your state senators NOW to demand AB 257.
It’s a quick action for a big impact — don’t worry, it’s easy and there’s
a script!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6763?t=1037&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]CALL FOR WORKERS

★ ★ ★

As you know, Bernie Sanders founded Our Revolution six years ago to wage
the fight for our progressive policy solutions and elect allies to partner
with our movement for change.

Our Revolution is the largest progressive grassroots-funded organization
in the country — [ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1038&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]but we need to maximize our power to beat back the
big money dominating politics. Become a sustaining member TODAY.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Dem leadership is set to give Manchin and API more pipelines and drilling,
fewer regulations and fewer safeguards for impacted communities — all
packaged in a *must-pass* resolution to fund the government.

It’s insanity for our leaders to even consider this while hailing a
historic climate bill. Don’t hesitate to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6271?t=1039&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]contact your House Rep now to
make these demands —

* Don’t fast-track new gas or oil projects
* Don’t fast-track carbon pipelines
* Don’t cut environmental safeguards in fossil fuel projects
* Separate the fast-track vote from the must-pass resolution to fund the
government

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6271?t=1040&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]Stop Manchin - MAKE THE CALL

A SEAT AT THE TABLE FOR CA FAST FOOD WORKERS

We need YOU to stand up with fast-food workers and Our Revolution to
demand the CA State Senate pass AB-257 - The FAST Recovery Act. This bill
would give these essential workers a say in setting health, safety, and
employment standards while holding major food corporations accountable.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6871?t=1041&akid=3261%2E5885482%2EPSHL1j ]TAKE ACTION - add your voice in solidarity with worker activists -
tell your state senator to pass AB 257!

be a key ally in the fight to rein in corporate power and corruption. Join
us to make an impact on one of the most critical primaries of 2022.

HEADLINES: Manchin’s New Dirty Deal - [ ]Take Action | Crunchtime for [ ]Worker Bill | Student Debt Fight Ramps Up | Jasmine Crockett Talks Strategy | New Endorsements! | NY Voter Guide - Vote Tues! | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ]NEW BERNIE STICKER! Bernie never gives up and neither do we. Our Revolution and our progressive movement is shifting the window of what’s possible. Let’s keep building on our hard-fought gains. As Bernie always says: “Despair is not an option.” [ ]GET YOUR VINYL STICKER ★ ★ ★ Mark your calendars for our LIVE National Organizing Call this Monday at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT - with US Rep. Ayanna Pressley on the progressive project in Congress. Other guests will include: Corey Jones, candidate for City Council in Providence, RI (Ward 3). [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ MANCHIN’S DIRTY DEAL TO FAST-TRACK FOSSIL FUELS Our Revolution and progressives in Congress are organizing to stop Joe Manchin’s newest dirty deal — which was written and leaked by The American Petroleum Institute (API) — to fast-track fossil fuels and undo climate steps in the Inflation Reduction Act. “Why would Democrats reverse this momentum by enacting an API wish list that will make it even harder for frontline communities to protect themselves?” asked US Rep. Raúl Grijalva (AZ-7) in his op-ed in [ ]Newsweek Wednesday. “The answer is, we should not.” Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are ready to give Manchin and API more pipelines and drilling, fewer regulations and fewer safeguards for impacted communities — all packaged in a must-pass resolution to fund the government. Rashida Tlaib commented: “We don’t owe Joe Manchin anything.” “If API tries to force passage of its proposal through the House, we will fight against it,” wrote Grijalva, who chairs the House Committee on Natural Resources. Based on the API leak, the deal would curtail public input, environmental review, and government accountability; require fossil fuel taking priority for federal support; undermine the Clean Water Act; and more. It’s insanity for our leaders to even consider this while hailing a historic climate bill. Don’t hesitate to [ ]contact your House Rep now to make these demands — Don’t fast-track new gas or oil projects Don’t fast-track carbon pipelines Don’t cut environmental safeguards in fossil fuel projects Separate the fast-track vote from the must-pass resolution to fund the government [ ]Stop Manchin - MAKE THE CALL ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Jasmine Crockett joined our [ ]National Organizing Call on Monday to discuss the path to building progressive power in Congress. Jasmine urged our members to volunteer and support candidates across the country, highlighting some of our huge primary wins with candidates like Summer Lee (PA-12), Greg Casar (TX-35), and many others. “The Congressional Progressive Caucus is already the largest caucus,” she said, noting our growing numbers will help overcome the generational divide in Washington. “Our policies are people-centered policies, and the data shows it’s what the majority wants.” [ ]Become a recurring donor TODAY to get more progressives over the finish line. Let’s grow our power together! ★ ★ ★ Quentin Palfrey has a life of experience fighting for the underdog and the full support of Our Revolution Massachusetts in his race for Attorney General. “With attacks on democracy, abortion rights, workers rights, racial justice, a lot of challenges are falling to the states,” Quentin told us on our [ ]live broadcast Monday. “I’ll use the AG office to push for Medicare for All, transportation, education, and an economy that works for everyone.” For 20 years, Palfrey has worked as an election protection attorney — he founded Voter Protection Corps in 2019 and led efforts to stop voter suppression ahead of the 2020 election. Election Day in Massachusetts is Sept. 6. Quentin took the People’s Pledge to renounce independent expenditures, and he’s relying on all of us to get the word out for this primary election! Join our phonebank crew for an evening of calls, finding like-minded folks ready to put progressives like Quentin in office. [ ]PHONEBANK FOR QUENTIN ★ ★ ★ And, we’re proud to endorse Megan Green - a 2016 Bernie delegate we supported for St. Louis Board of Aldermen last time around, now running for President of the Board! Megan is running to replace the former Board President who resigned after being indicted under federal bribery charges. “Years ago I called out this corruption, and now we have a lot of work to do to restore trust,” she said on our [ ]Monday Call. Already in office, Megan has fought for a higher minimum wage, civilian oversight of police, reproductive rights, domestic violence protections, legal marijuana, and more. If you’re in St. Louis, vote for Megan in the special election Sept. 13. Help us call voters for Megan as she runs against big money to join the progressives representing St. Louis - folks like US Rep. Cori Bush - to move our agenda forward! [ ]CALL FOR MEGAN IN ST. LOUIS ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution supports the re-election bid of NY State Senator Robert Jackson in District 31, who has decades of experience fighting for education equality, affordable housing, and a prosperous multicultural NYC. “I’m up against big money from hedge funds, charter schools, and real estate trying to unseat me, but we’re fighting all the way,” Robert told us on our Monday [ ]Organizing Call. From his time as School Board President to his 12 years on the New York City Council, and now in the State Senate, Robert Jackson takes on the tough fights for New Yorkers again and again - and never backs down. Early voting is open through Sunday and Election Day is Tuesday (Aug. 23). If you’re in NY, find where to vote [ ]HERE. Our Revolution NYPAN has been on the ground canvassing with Sen. Jackson in Washington Heights. You can help from anywhere by joining our phone bank for Robert! [ ]MAKE CALLS ★ ★ ★ VOTE TUESDAY IN NY NY State Sen. Robert Jackson is one of our many great candidates on the ballot Tuesday in New York’s 2nd Primary of the year. Our Revolution also endorses Sarah Blas (D-23) and Gustavo Rivera (D-33) for NY State Senate. “Our lived experience matters, it’s time we say no to elected officials raising money from corporations,” Sarah [ ]told us last month. “We need folks who will show up where it counts.” As chair of the Senate Health Committee, Gustavo is a main sponsor of the New York Health Act — which would create a system of universal, single-payer healthcare in the state. Our Revolution is also working to get out the vote for two candidates for US Congress in New York: Brittany Ramos DeBarros (NY-11) and Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3). Brittany is an Afro-Latina Staten Islander, former Army captain, and anti-war activist running against a conservative Democrat who already lost this seat once to a Republican in 2020. [ ]MAKE CALLS FOR BRITTANY Melanie is an active member of Our Revolution’s Long Island chapter, LI Activists. She’s also a leader on Medicare for All with National Nurses United and helped found the Sunrise Movement in Nassau County. Shout-out to Our Revolution organizers with NYPAN and LI Activists - Joe Sackman, Jenny Almanzar, and many others - who joined Melanie D’Arrigo to knock doors at the Rock the Vote Rally this week! Even if you’re not in NY, you can affect this race, which is in a statistical tie! Sign up for a phone bank shift - it’s easy and every single vote counts! Over 80% of you agree that dark money corrupts should be banned from Democratic primaries. We heard you loud and clear, and Our Revolution introduced a resolution this week to do just that! subject: Trump's handpicked candidate is nearly tied with Tony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

Did you see Cassi's message?

New polling shows Tony is now deadlocked with Trump-backed extremist Tim
Michels — who's already spent $12 million of his own money to beat Tony.

Michels was handpicked by Donald Trump because he is willing to end fair
elections and hand the 2024 presidential race to Trump — even if he loses.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1238?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20220820_2_4&t=1001&akid=4083%2E1827488%2EVRrpA5 ]That's why we're mobilizing to respond. Can we count on you to chip in
to help us close our $34,120 rapid response budget gap before our deadline
tomorrow at midnight?

Thank you for all that you do,

Team Evers

—Begin Forwarded Message—

Derek,

There have been A LOT of new developments
in this race, so we want to catch you up:

1. A New Marquette University Law School poll shows Tony deadlocked in a
neck and neck race with Tim Michels.
2. Donald Trump handpicked Tim Michels because he wants to end fair
elections and abortion rights.
3. Now that polling shows the race so close, Trump and Michels will
attack Tony even harder.

Derek, Tim
Michels has already spent $12 million of his own money to try to beat
Tony, and Trump's PAC has nearly unlimited resources to attack Tony.
