name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter, our ads have gone dark
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---

Peter - Our ads have gone dark.

**To conserve our limited resources, we had to pull our TV ads off the air.** Meanwhile, Senator Raphael Warnock and far-Left Super PACs are flooding the airways _**EVERY DAY.**_

This is a tremendous challenge with less than 90 days left in the campaign.

**Here's the crazy part: our campaign is #2 among Republican Senate campaigns in fundraising in the country, but the Democrats are far outraising all Republicans across the board!** The Democrat base is fired up and putting their money where their mouths are.

**Peter, I'm worried that if we don't pick up the fundraising pace in the next 24 hours, our lack of advertising could quickly impact our polling.** The more money we raise today, the sooner we'll be able to get our ads back on TV.

_**[Can I count on your help right now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048669:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r)**_ This is not fake news or a fundraising gimmick. We simply don't have enough money to run our ads right now, so we had to make a tough call.

[** Help Fund Our TV Ads
Chip in $25 Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048670:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r)
While we are unable to spend any money on TV ads this week, Raphael Warnock is spending $1.3 MILLION. **In total, our opponent has spent nearly $2.5 MILLION attacking me all over the state in the last 14 days. And now, our campaign can't respond.**

**[If you want us to flip the Georgia Senate seat from BLUE to RED and help Republicans win back the Senate majority, then I need you to give as generously as you can right this instant.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048669:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r)**

I'm asking you, Peter, please help us get back on the air ASAP. **[Chip in anything you can today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048669:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048669:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. This could be one of the most critical moments of our campaign. **[I hope you'll consider my request by chipping in $25 RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048669:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r)** We really could use your help.

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048669:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048671:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048672:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048673:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61048674:6OI9KYVNF:m:1:3334294963:7CD8B6FFA9948C7D77529472BF93AF18:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Breaking News
subject: These FOUR Dems need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Your donation will be TRIPLED >>
| | | **BREAKING:** These four Democratic senators voted against ALL of Trump’s anti-_Roe_ Supreme Court nominees -- _and now Republicans are trying to unseat them!_ If just one loses, Mitch McConnell will regain Senate control, **so we need your help to re-elect these Democrats and defend our majority!**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8802?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5961%2E9716520%2ENatUtf)**$17,662** RAISED OF **$25,000** GOAL
**OUR TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH IS NOW ACTIVE, SO YOUR GIFT WILL GO 3X AS FAR TO DEFEND OUR SENATE MAJORITY!**
**[Pitch in $5 now _(becomes $15)_ to save President Biden's Senate majority, defeat anti-choice Republicans, and defend these Democrats who stood against Trump's far-right judges >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8802?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5961%2E9716520%2ENatUtf)**
| | [DONATE $5 (BECOMES $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/8802?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5961%2E9716520%2ENatUtf)
---

We'll be blunt: Mitch McConnell only needs ONE more seat to retake the Senate, but **FOUR of the Democrats who voted against Trump’s anti-choice Supreme Court nominees are now facing _EXTREMELY tight races!_**

If just one of them loses, Mitch McConnell could take control of the Senate and try to BAN all abortion nationwide.

We MUST hit tonight's **$25,000 fundraising goal** to defend our most vulnerable Democrats and our majority, but right now we're on pace to fall short! **We're calling on President Biden's top supporters in Pennsylvania to take action immediately:**

**[Will you donate $5 _(becomes $15)_ or more right now to defend pro-choice Democrats and save our Senate majority? The deadline is at midnight, and we're running WAY behind our must-hit goal >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8802?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5961%2E9716520%2ENatUtf)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first $10,000 received from this email will be TRIPLED:
| [Donate $5 (Becomes $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/8802?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220820-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5961%2E9716520%2ENatUtf)

Friend, I know we’ve already reached out about Rep. Chabot’s vote _against_ the Inflation Reduction Act, but I’m still upset about it. | **Chabot never misses an opportunity to speak against inflation,** so why did he vote _against_ a bill that will: ✅ Reduce costs for prescription drugs and healthcare,

✅ And reduce energy costs for families?

name: Team Booker
subject: We're rallying with DNC Chair Jaime Harrison
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

In May, our campaign made history when Charles became the first Black
Democratic nominee for Senate in Kentucky. There's something big happening
here.

This week, we're so excited that DNC Chair Jaime Harrison will be joining
our fight and rallying with us here on the ground in Kentucky! Jaime
understands the stakes of this campaign and he knows we have what it takes
to go all the way.

We're running a different kind of campaign, engaging people all over the
commonwealth so we can make history once again this November. But that
takes major resources, and it's donations from folks like you that fuel
this movement.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220820.gKxe6G&refcode=em20220820-2383&t=1020&akid=2383%2E346206%2EYCPm11 ]Will you join Jaime Harrison and show your support with a
$5 donation as we mobilize the next stage of our campaign?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220820.gKxe6G&refcode=em20220820-2383&t=1021&akid=2383%2E346206%2EYCPm11 ]Contribute $5

When Charles wins in November, his election will transform Kentucky and
prove the power of progressive leadership. That's why it's so important
that we don't let up in this fight for a single second.

Kentucky is worth the fight, and we have to be willing to go all in to
secure this victory. Jaime Harrison knows that, and we're hoping you do,
too.

Our campaign runs on people power. We don't accept a dime of corporate
contributions, just donations from regular folks like you. And our average
is just $20.29.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18481?t=1022&akid=2383%2E346206%2EYCPm11 ]Will you go all in for Charles and donate $20.29 today?

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220820-2383-footer&t=1023&refcode2=2383_346206_YCPm11&akid=2383%2E346206%2EYCPm11

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2383%2E346206%2EYCPm11

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

[ ]Contribute $5 When Charles wins in November, his election will transform Kentucky and prove the power of progressive leadership. That's why it's so important that we don't let up in this fight for a single second. Kentucky is worth the fight, and we have to be willing to go all in to secure this victory. Jaime Harrison knows that, and we're hoping you do, too. Our campaign runs on people power. We don't accept a dime of corporate contributions, just donations from regular folks like you. And our average is just $20.29. [ ]Will you go all in for Charles and donate $20.29 today? Together, Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

body:
BREAKING: Governor DeSantis is boosting insurrectionist candidates who deny that Joe Biden won the 2020 election ↙↙

Politico Headline about DeSantis
Donate to fight against DeSantis’s extremism

This is disturbing news, folks.

Politico is reporting that DeSantis is boosting Donald Trump's 'Big Lie' about the 2020 election:
"Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis is using his rising clout among conservatives to help candidates who have openly questioned President Joe Biden's win."

These attacks on our democracy cannot continue. Floridians must firmly reject the dangerous agenda of election deniers like Ron DeSantis and Donald Trump.

We've said it before and we'll say it again: Joe Biden won the 2020 election with more than 81 million votes — a historical margin.

Ron DeSantis continues to spread Donald Trump's lies about the 2020 election because he thinks Floridians won't notice his dangerous rhetoric. But now that POLITICO has blown the lid on his dishonesty, we need to show him that he's made a HUGE mistake.

A SURGE of donations will terrify DeSantis and prove that Floridians reject his anti-democracy agenda. Would you consider donating any amount to defend our democracy and reject the agenda of Big Lie conspiracy theorists?

Thank you for defending our democracy against these lies.

In Maryland, we’ve turned our economy around from 49th out of 50 states to number six by cutting taxes eight years in a row by $4.7 billion. Peter, my friend George Logan needs your help.

George is running to flip Connecticut's 5th Congressional District that hasn’t been **RED** in over **16 YEARS** , and recent polling shows he has a real shot!

[**The only thing he needs now is the resources to tell his story to voters.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=99ef8d981d134c059376aa5b54bd3cc8&_e=wgsbTgIfIJRZUe-VuanpQYezYWxUAI2nIRVEGizWpEr7XOGawLbo07dkL2nzIIQ8TNXqsvP4Grrq9VAHdWJMg1upZNdQS4jf4tbmx3QJ2Gf4OjXZMkSMNn9KXpiUSFnIsujM9PFDMYpNwBjAsrycrZceq9j3zWUae5kVI7axOMUrAOwQjllGl06V1_CktEMPK3-c_buTDGRrgM4b2DQCmvfm-tIvDB2Wy9ZE0uPrslN80qjazOHlW-yajwflGRYm62-a5lloYQ6qZ8snh2tN5_WeQVPvgTEkVOXTKdeiJJVnSoUUrtSEeJeyyznpRoSfJ178AS6mMRh3YB7gA_XFcJ16PhdCXnMG4IJZWijg1Kyk8OTwMwS5z-tayzmmXqkcrH7128lT-NiPpCahC9dc24p1sprn7DjuTSFu_rdP7hUAr6uSywHA1LnAQq_9s5uErLdBxW7qo-bXbyFUWHaeBxDNSqnizkzB2p75r-znTC8cQ9eKB0K82XKVdKNnCq9eaKpFuu0gqCIRCf1BQ0kVkw%3D%3D)

You see - George is a a family man, an engineer, a community leader, and a small business owner. Above all, he's a regular guy! On top of the craziness of running a campaign, he works a normal full-time job to provide for his family.

As a first-generation American, George knows that this country provides freedom and opportunity unlike any other. I know it pains him to see our nation going down the wrong path, especially for future generations, **_all because of the lack of leadership from Far-Left Democrats._**

[**That is why he is running for Congress**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=99ef8d981d134c059376aa5b54bd3cc8&_e=wgsbTgIfIJRZUe-VuanpQYezYWxUAI2nIRVEGizWpEr7XOGawLbo07dkL2nzIIQ8TNXqsvP4Grrq9VAHdWJMg1upZNdQS4jf4tbmx3QJ2Gf4OjXZMkSMNn9KXpiUSFnIsujM9PFDMYpNwBjAsrycrZceq9j3zWUae5kVI7axOMUrAOwQjllGl06V1_CktEMPK3-c_buTDGRrgM4b2DQCmvfm-tIvDB2Wy9ZE0uPrslN80qjazOHlW-yajwflGRYm62-a5lloYQ6qZ8snh2tN5_WeQVPvgTEkVOXTKdeiJJVnSoUUrtSEeJeyyznpRoSfG9-isSIjnDQlZeaYVJPxz4HK2tLSeq2Z_6dwRczKcwkHeE0876CCpHGRYkHti18lyMd9SOlFBphyxt9Qu-u9Js6B-sKZOM5F1F8nKrqd6c6YjXC0nnxkeKDpc1_hwi7ffR1gaL6KZlBJNPux7h6D-uclqhhV_3etNPbcYrLMDIKAIgoUCBE4N9tIs8X3w46f_hG2ySSxRM5CTFuPo-nP4w%3D%3D): to break Nancy Pelosi’s Democrat monopoly and help those the Far-Left has turned their backs on, _which is the majority of Americans!_

[**SEND GEORGE TO CONGRESS!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=99ef8d981d134c059376aa5b54bd3cc8&_e=wgsbTgIfIJRZUe-VuanpQYezYWxUAI2nIRVEGizWpEr7XOGawLbo07dkL2nzIIQ8TNXqsvP4Grrq9VAHdWJMg1upZNdQS4jf4tbmx3QJ2Gf4OjXZMkSMNn9KXpiUSFnIsujM9PFDMYpNwBjAsrycrZceq9j3zWUae5kVI7axOMUrAOwQjllGl06V1_CktEMPK3-c_buTDGRrgM4b2DQCmvfm-tIvDB2Wy9ZE0uPrslN80qjazOHlW-yajwflGRYm62-a5lloYQ6qZ8snh2tN5_WeQVPvgTEkVOXTKdeiJJVnSoUUrtSEeJeyyznpRoSfllBtMQ_naSzZ1LR6VZuTicxk0WKPNCbr8ZvTdn6mXCotQv__foNybn9Fcp5KDHcpEjzb2Pv1llpJhPcfmZFAhVEE2Yf9mOMPEX9TQmk7Nf75wIe8oTMsUsJJPHhlC5yZ9fC4LPrd5govVvBe4jMgaPiU90IeF_ERyZkCGBc83DaQuvQ0Syi3pgYzcsCWVE44DugjgSKyEuDmZ_O_DzUNYQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: | Peter, my friend George Logan needs your help. George is running to flip Connecticut's 5th Congressional District that hasn’t been RED in over 16 YEARS , and recent polling shows he has a real shot! | You see - George is a a family man, an engineer, a community leader, and a small business owner. Above all, he's a regular guy! On top of the craziness of running a campaign, he works a normal full-time job to provide for his family. As a first-generation American, George knows that this country provides freedom and opportunity unlike any other. I know it pains him to see our nation going down the wrong path, especially for future generations, all because of the lack of leadership from Far-Left Democrats. : to break Nancy Pelosi’s Democrat monopoly and help those the Far-Left has turned their backs on, which is the majority of Americans! I cannot express how much I need George by my side in Congress. He is a born leader who will make Americans across the nation proud. Sincerely, Elise Stefanik (NY-21) House Republican Conference Chairwoman | | PAID FOR BY GEORGE LOGAN FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Penny=20Ronning?=
subject: Matt Rosendale is trying to privatize the hunt
body:
Of course, real-estate developer Rep. Matt Rosendale is a co-sponsor of a bill that would remove all funding for the Pittman-Robertson Act, | |
---
| | | [ ](https://pennyronning.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05c2d51066158a4f5219d9967&id=28b52e8667&e=2f4ec52c5e)
---
| | | Peter Willis, Of course, real-estate developer Rep. Matt Rosendale is a co-sponsor of a bill that would [remove all funding for the Pittman-Robertson Act](https://pennyronning.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05c2d51066158a4f5219d9967&id=02037ecbe7&e=2f4ec52c5e), which generates revenue our state relies on for conservation efforts and to protect access to our public lands. This isn't about expanding the second amendment, it's about privatizing the hunt and stripping regular Montanans of our access to the outdoors.

_**This will only make Matt and his rich friends richer.**_

[Chip in today to help STOP Matt from destroying what we value most as Montanans. ](https://pennyronning.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05c2d51066158a4f5219d9967&id=f3f17b0e15&e=2f4ec52c5e)
---
| [ ](https://pennyronning.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05c2d51066158a4f5219d9967&id=20d89e98c1&e=2f4ec52c5e)
---
| We have to stand with everyday Montanans when it comes to access to what makes Montana great: our public lands. And we should be outraged that the wealthy are trying to take away access from the working class.

[__**Will you chip in $25 today to prevent Matt from privatizing the hunt?**__](https://pennyronning.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05c2d51066158a4f5219d9967&id=94eefd2a12&e=2f4ec52c5e)

Thank you and together we rise!

Peter, we’ve got good news and bad news about Wisconsin’s Senate race. **The good news:** A new Marquette poll shows our endorsed candidate Mandela Barnes widening his lead over Republican incumbent Ron Johnson! **The bad news:** It’s still early in the race, and now that Mandela is gaining ground, Republican dark money groups are going to ramp up their spending in Wisconsin. **_[The only way to fight back is coming together. Join your fellow grassroots donors and split a donation between Mandela + the Save the Senate Project to help him defeat Ron Johnson.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uMzOdfqHDMW4NjQGCsxm6di89HrlH567AmYTvxLxEcaOqoIzAYyiNjsnu20D_BppBq5zFG6Kl4osAV5XVLKL7J4f7Dvm1oCOra1Fr10Ls-kwjQ-a-Y1-s5TMGvkh-6q1yslgYZ8auOcELb8t0n8-UwT4lLjyK5v1jb0Ap_ZRaF1tELOscBahrhhrsHktQX03Ju6ltIRHdCay5a-XMcg5bedDxOmmatRfz3MP-UBL75dvYvAbWZ2PKdocQDl4yRR8UdyVYVX4WO_HG5UPbkf9p1R6GCom_wteQy9nYhG0e4eds/3or/phNVi8vqT2K8CAys1qvxsg/h1/az-06txGh9mVUm9R8LcO2tTNl3BRxF2EaZAM2r-OzVA)_** **[Contribute $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uMzOdfqHDMW4NjQGCsxm6di89HrlH567AmYTvxLxEcaOp5oy_UbppVWBRSNV4LZa3iTLwzb45Cu1MGAz6KVqwBxodijjbIZMBvXxaynyDSetiRM10lVsquiUqBQOK3sgkFnb8MnVUKF3xbDQsVIGsp7O8e--5HfalQ1LMKYXR0lx4-qdwcuIye7hRZHW8zRVRL1gT5FryCp4kRJ0eUDbISW9pPJ2U6eolko9Di20uIRE3__d7wmw2QLpTHQikm1ILMeaDVU7ijKTsqgUzafUAH7EYDv0Q91vSzRDjRD7iSE_A/3or/phNVi8vqT2K8CAys1qvxsg/h2/9Rmre1oBiwL3qnfHtNKivoFXS45BVy6dLOmMVW7IKKw)** Wisconsin's Senate race is one of the most important races in the entire country this year — **saving and expanding the Democratic Senate majority depends on what happens in Wisconsin.** We can’t afford to let extreme Republicans like Ron Johnson stay in the Senate, let alone take the majority. Especially not now that the Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and cleared the way for a national abortion ban. **_[We’re counting you to help Mandela defeat Ron Johnson and flip this seat. Split a donation between Mandela Barnes’ Wisconsin Senate campaign and the Save the Senate Project today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uMzOdfqHDMW4NjQGCsxm6di89HrlH567AmYTvxLxEcaOoZ_ooC4QD1sct05Vd-qKCRnUEPsyarSlk00Lnn2rPJT2ZEuZYcEOIma67FZsvaIL5ZrM8Z9rjm1DUf6JiVvr7mT5xzj4cjF1aw1PSkn3IIVRm_V8w86OVcRNL8dR0flz6I5OzPh4vs9OSlxoBgDzIhlb8dDpgZK4OYo2bQRJiAx-3imADKaZPoQcVqIbEwafYKf0qujwu821j3H9ALsbnovpWYtVu_rzXfn5ui8oBNnawEjIDYagUKk8nEpx67xp4/3or/phNVi8vqT2K8CAys1qvxsg/h3/Ja3jo2-KXwGswCA7W07fc8wFvRBP1AM0HHCpxJbh_fY)_** Mandela can’t win this race alone, so we’re grateful for your support. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: When someone’s under investigation for trafficking a girl, should they maybe avoid visiting high schools? Matt Gaetz though, right now under investigation for trafficking, couldn’t come up with the right answer to that question. How much longer do we have to put up with him in government?
body:
Thousands of Florida women are boiling mad at him
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, this is ridiculous and disturbing. **Matt Gaetz, alleged sex trafficker of underage women, under investigation for this offense by the Department of Justice, is visiting a high school. No, really.** **This repulsive, right wing traitor who backed Donald Trump's coup, and, yes, WHO IS BEING INVESTIGATED BY THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT FOR TRAFFICKING UNDERAGE WOMEN, is set to visit Niceville High School in Northwest Florida.** As you can imagine many are horrified by this fact, so a group called "Women Against Matt Gaetz" has formed and now has over 10,000 members, to: **"...write letters to the Office of Congressional Ethics asking the body to suspend Gaetz from congressional duties related to minors while being investigated for allegedly having sex with a 17-year-old girl."** Thankfully, they're not the only women standing up to this self-centered pig. [**Can you join Blue Amp Action in giving $2, $5, $10, or whatever you can afford, to hero Rebekah Jones to remove disgusting lout Matt Gaetz from Congress?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb05532f6-7718-4956-852d-50bcc2efb1c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Rebekah Jones, who stood up to another Trump-backing, right wing treason-weasel, Governor Ron DeSantis of Florida, is also taking on Gaetz. You may remember that Jones ignored the dictatorial directorate of Ron DeSantis to not accurately keep track of COVID infections and deaths in Florida, so he fired her from her job at the Florida Department of Health. **
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: REBEKAH JONES FOR FLORIDA!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26572201-584c-4929-8220-db3ff32a9ca5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Jones continued to keep track of the COVID numbers on her own as a dedicated data scientist, so DeSantis used the pretext of her having accessed a state communications system "illegally" to raid her home, point a gun at her and her children and confiscate her hardware, threatening to prosecute her. Because this is all that small, insecure men like DeSantis and Gaetz know how to do, threaten and bully. **But it didn't work with Jones, as it usually doesn't with heroes. She kept tracking COVID, and got involved in "Florida Covid Action" offering Floridians information about free testing options and COVID Monitor, focussing on keeping kids healthy and COVID-free in Florida Schools.** **Now she is running against the alleged underage sex trafficker, Matt Gaetz, for Congress**. He tried to get her kicked off the ballot on a technicality, but a higher Court just overturned the lower Court's decision, and she's on the ballot as a Democrat. **_She is where she is because she cared about Flordians' health care enough to try and use data to fight DeSantis' easing of restrictions, a disaster that ended up unnecessarily killing an untold number of Floridians. And she cared enough about kids being safe in school to risk arrest. _** Now, she cares enough about our health and our kids to take on Gaetz, the alleged underage sex trafficker, and with the blue wave that is developing, her name recognition and the this cloud hanging over Gaetz--the chance he may even be indicted soon--she has an incredible chance to win this seat!! [**Can you join Blue Amp Action in giving $2, $5, $10, or whatever you can afford, to hero Rebekah Jones to remove disgusting lout Matt Gaetz from Congress?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99b16335-19c9-4104-980d-18aacaefe2ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you so much for standing up for what's right. Cliff

Matt Gaetz, alleged sex trafficker of underage women, under investigation for this offense by the Department of Justice, is visiting a high school. No, really. This repulsive, right wing traitor who backed Donald Trump's coup, and, yes, WHO IS BEING INVESTIGATED BY THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT FOR TRAFFICKING UNDERAGE WOMEN, is set to visit Niceville High School in Northwest Florida. As you can imagine many are horrified by this fact, so a group called "Women Against Matt Gaetz" has formed and now has over 10,000 members, to: "...write letters to the Office of Congressional Ethics asking the body to suspend Gaetz from congressional duties related to minors while being investigated for allegedly having sex with a 17-year-old girl." Thankfully, they're not the only women standing up to this self-centered pig. Rebekah Jones, who stood up to another Trump-backing, right wing treason-weasel, Governor Ron DeSantis of Florida, is also taking on Gaetz. You may remember that Jones ignored the dictatorial directorate of Ron DeSantis to not accurately keep track of COVID infections and deaths in Florida, so he fired her from her job at the Florida Department of Health. | | | | | | Jones continued to keep track of the COVID numbers on her own as a dedicated data scientist, so DeSantis used the pretext of her having accessed a state communications system "illegally" to raid her home, point a gun at her and her children and confiscate her hardware, threatening to prosecute her. Because this is all that small, insecure men like DeSantis and Gaetz know how to do, threaten and bully. But it didn't work with Jones, as it usually doesn't with heroes. She kept tracking COVID, and got involved in "Florida Covid Action" offering Floridians information about free testing options and COVID Monitor, focussing on keeping kids healthy and COVID-free in Florida Schools. Now she is running against the alleged underage sex trafficker, Matt Gaetz, for Congress. He tried to get her kicked off the ballot on a technicality, but a higher Court just overturned the lower Court's decision, and she's on the ballot as a Democrat. She is where she is because she cared about Flordians' health care enough to try and use data to fight DeSantis' easing of restrictions, a disaster that ended up unnecessarily killing an untold number of Floridians. And she cared enough about kids being safe in school to risk arrest. Now, she cares enough about our health and our kids to take on Gaetz, the alleged underage sex trafficker, and with the blue wave that is developing, her name recognition and the this cloud hanging over Gaetz--the chance he may even be indicted soon--she has an incredible chance to win this seat!! Thank you so much for standing up for what's right. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

subject: Help Needed - Fundraising Deadline Approaching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Judge for Congress
body:
The fundraising deadline for my primary election cycle is almost here. Please consider maxing out, as new limits apply after Tuesday! | | | Good afternoon, I know and am truly sorry that you are constantly berated with requests for money from every other candidate out there. I appreciate your support already, and absolutely hate having to ask, but I cannot do this without more help. I also know the cost of everything has increased under this administration, and that times are certainly tougher than they were under President Trump, but I need every little bit of financial help I can get going into this Tuesday’s primary election. After Tuesday, you are further limited in the donation you can make to help my campaign. It goes from a max contribution of $5,800 per person, to $2,900 per person for the remainder of the election. Advertising is exceedingly expensive, and the Democrats have done everything they can to stop me from being able to run, without success. My opponent and Nancy Pelosi’s best friend, Kathy Castor, is absolutely terrified, and we have a genuine chance to remove her from office. I promise we’ll try to run the most cost effective campaign we can, but I do genuinely need your help. I’m the only candidate born and raised here in the Tampa Bay area, and once I win on Tuesday, **I will be the only Congressional candidate fighting to take out a far-left, radical incumbent Democrat in west-central Florida**. [Please contribute as much as you can before Tuesday to help me win this campaign and help fire Kathy Castor and Nancy Pelosi. ](https://judgepr.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=26e27dacce&e=00028e5542)
God Bless!\- James JudgeCandidate for U.S. Congress
**Endorsed by Law Enforcement** – Tampa Police Benevolent Association & Sheriff Bob Gualtieri
Tampa Bay Area Native
Small Business Owner
Coast Guard Veteran
Operation Iraqi Freedom & Operation Enduring Freedom
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://judgepr.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=cd69cdfabd&e=00028e5542)

subject: A systemic threat requires a systemic response

|

Friend -- As the January 6 investigations have made clear, the threat to our democracy is grave, and it will require a systemic response to fight off future attacks.
That’s why I’m proud to announce that All On The Line is launching new initiatives to strengthen our democracy and safeguard our elections.
[**To give our efforts an extra boost, we’re aiming to reach a $50,000 goal before the end of the month. Can you make a contribution today?** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49522957/362455639/-1345174050?refcode=20220819_AOTL_P_EHH_A1_actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGU3OTNmLWU0MjAtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=f-aqY2VRSIPhZm5nRN7WyxTwWI4fMHOhXzQJLGxSZN0=)
[DONATE NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49522958/362455640/-1345174050?refcode=20220819_AOTL_P_EHH_A1_actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGU3OTNmLWU0MjAtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=f-aqY2VRSIPhZm5nRN7WyxTwWI4fMHOhXzQJLGxSZN0=)
---
We’ve made significant progress on fair maps -- but that is just one piece of the puzzle as we strive toward a stronger, resilient democracy.
We know that if we don’t have free and fair elections, we can’t fully realize the impact of those fair maps. And that’s where our multi-pronged strategy comes into play. It looks like this:
**We’re working to preserve and expand access to voting.** As state legislatures try to curtail voting rights, we’re on the ground in communities to help protect and get out the vote. And in the courts, our affiliate is involved in two critical Supreme Court cases that have the potential to protect or threaten free and fair federal elections. Democracy is literally on the docket.
**We are protecting election infrastructure.** We know that some are actively recruiting election deniers to serve as poll workers, and we need to do everything we can to defend our democracy against this effort. Poll workers must share the same mission: to conduct free and fair elections, no matter the outcome. That’s why we are partnering with Power the Polls to support nonpartisan efforts to recruit more citizens to sign up to do their civic duty and give back to their communities.
**We are going to the polls.** We’ll be encouraging our vast grassroots network to engage in the 2022 election, by organizing and supporting citizens getting to the polls. We fought for and won fair maps in many places, now it’s time to have our voices heard at the ballot box.
**In order to _protect_ democracy, we have to _do_ democracy. **
This work is vital, and it will affect not only ourselves, but also our children and our children’s children. _Democracy is fragile, and it cannot defend itself -- that’s where we need your help._
[**Chip in $15, $35, $50, or whatever makes sense for you, and help us strengthen American democracy in the upcoming midterms.** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49522959/362455641/-1345174050?refcode=20220819_AOTL_P_EHH_A1_actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGU3OTNmLWU0MjAtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=f-aqY2VRSIPhZm5nRN7WyxTwWI4fMHOhXzQJLGxSZN0=)

name: Team Beto
subject: It’s your choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
You’re part of this campaign.
#
People who donate to our emails — people like you — are powering this movement to defeat Greg Abbott and his extreme agenda.
You’re part of this campaign team, which means we’ll never send emails that try to scare you, trick you, or mislead you into donating your hard-earned money.
Instead, we’ll simply tell you why your $3 matters, and respectfully ask for your generous support. [You might choose to donate today to our goal of raising $1,485,000 to air our first TV ads this week](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220820-2.fq9mTb&refcode=ema20220820-204007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=204007%2E444211%2ERPlF2Z) — or you might not! Either way, we’re so grateful that you’re with us in supporting Beto and winning this election.
So...why do we send emails asking for donations?
We know that we have the grassroots power to win this election in November. With more than 83,000 volunteers out working in their communities, and with Beto drawing big crowds in even the deepest red counties, our momentum has never been stronger.
But we also need the financial resources to run our brand-new TV ads across Texas, and prepare for the $100,000,000 that Greg Abbott has pledged to spend against us.
Unlike Abbott, we don’t have corporate special interests ready to foot the bill. In fact, Beto doesn’t take a single cent from corporate PACs.
Instead, we rely on grassroots donors like you, pitching into emails like this.
While one single donation of $3 might sound like a drop in the bucket on its own compared to Abbott’s mega donors, our power is in hundreds of thousands of donations. When you chip in, someone else reading this email might decide to as well, and soon your contributions start to add up in a big way.
[So, we’ll just ask: Will you please add your first donation to help us fund $1,485,000 in new TV ads and defeat Greg Abbott in November? ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220820-2.fq9mTb&refcode=ema20220820-204007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=204007%2E444211%2ERPlF2Z)

Winning won’t be easy, but together, we can make it happen for the people of Texas.
Thanks for your support,
Team Beto

Hello,
Watching Fox “News” these days is like watching something from another dimension...
_The 2020 election was rigged. The FBI is being run by “the Deep State.” Donald Trump is some king, subject to no law. And that pillow guy has some new slippers to sell you for $139.99. Nice slippers, no doubt._
_Stay tuned, because after the break, Democrat Mike Franken, a 36-year Navy veteran and retired Vice Admiral, is running for US Senate against Chuck Grassley in Iowa. Surely, Franken must be a radical socialist who actually wants to protect our democracy. The horror! The nerve of those Democrats._
“Up is down” and “right is wrong” with these people. There’s no trying to make sense of propaganda, but the effects of it are very real – and they’re dangerous. There is a whole contingent of Americans living in a false reality manufactured by right-wing media for political purposes. And they’re already turning that propaganda machine loose against me.
There’s only one way to combat their bizarro tales, and that’s with telling the truth. But I can’t take on Faux News, McConnell’s Super PACs, and all of Chucks Grassley’s attack ads without your help.
**If I’m going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, we need to raise $125,000 before our midnight deadline – and right now, we’re still $4,105 short. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I need you to chip in right now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our critical midnight fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49523324/362466389/-42398318?refcode=em20220820pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzBhY2M4Zi1lODIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lssu68DbTDhNHJsd6lndqknz7PKHqV3i5RE_5QcA-lE=)

name: Dan Farough
subject: Our most important weekend thus far
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend,

This Sunday, Jocelyn will formally receive the Michigan Democratic Party’s nomination for secretary of state. It’ll be an exciting occasion, and an opportunity for Jocelyn to speak directly to her supporters about the importance of the upcoming election.

Without giving away too much, Jocelyn will focus on reminding voters about her success in overseeing the most transparent and secure election in Michigan history. And she’ll be focusing their attention on the general election when she will be on the ballot against an opponent that is an election denier who embodies the growing election conspiracy movement in our state and across the country.

This will be a real turning point in our campaign, friend. A moment where Jocelyn will have a chance to consolidate support and ensure that our pro-democracy movement shows out in force in November. There’s no question: when we’re celebrating Jocelyn’s victory we’ll look back on this Sunday as a pivotal moment.

There’s a reason there has been so much national attention placed on this campaign. A reason why the Washington Post recently listed Michigan as one of the key Big Lie races in the country. Jocelyn’s campaign is the battleground for democracy. This Sunday, we will hear her vision for how she plans to win this fight, but I can tell you now that it will rely on grassroots pro-democracy defenders like you, friend.
We’re expecting Karamo to get a significant fundraising boost from this event. We need all the support possible to ensure that Jocelyn wins this fight for democracy. So pitch in today, and make sure you tune in this Sunday for Jocelyn’s speech!

[secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=082022]

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: The NRSC admitted the Senate majority hinges on our race.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Politico just reported that the National Republican Senatorial Committee is saying the Senate majority hinges on North Carolina.
#

Politico reported that the National Republican Senatorial Committee is saying the Senate majority hinges on North Carolina.
According to their reporting, NRSC officials are telling their corporate donors that “the path to capturing the Senate” requires them to hold North Carolina.
Even Republicans know that if they lose here, it’s game over for them.
That’s why Cheri Beasley was the VERY FIRST challenger the NRSC attacked this cycle. They pumped millions into misleading smear attacks, and one was so outrageously false that TV stations across North Carolina forced them to take it down.
The bottom line is they are willing to spend and say ANYTHING to cling onto this seat.
[**If you want to make sure McConnell isn’t majority leader again, rush a $3 donation to Cheri Beasley’s campaign today to flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat. This is urgent.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220820-3-ma&t=1&akid=1504%2E357359%2EQF9ej3)

| | | Our team is preparing for more spending, attacks, and lies from the other side. | Here’s what’s on the line in November, folks.

The right to a safe, legal abortion.

The future of our democracy.

The future of Arizona.

**None of this is an exaggeration. If my far-right opponent, Kari Lake, becomes Arizona’s next governor, she’s vowed to criminalize abortion. She could work alongside our state’s Republicans to dismantle our state’s election laws. Her focus would not be on making Arizona the best place to live, work, or raise a family. She’ll only make things worse.**

**[Here’s the truth: We need to do everything we can to stop Kari Lake from reaching the governor’s office. And that’s why I’m asking for your support. Will you pitch in now and split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xE-yb4eSzWNQYu7eqLJY4Vm3XABRcsdYkSWk6JvkIc-6Veat-1s_bG0Ig9eckw7reYvcsa4gR6YIJjt1nVIQvMIkfloqxnGiBAJp-nnH77utJST6OwRnBXlZ-eWhn6y8R8LZ2DkHsPlIEeoLQTwoYbXabqhGrMYx1W9H6b5zXintKmMsjDVPN4WM7pQSrxSGAh9O9Vwy4UQrWYOX_rDnudTfKrt34G3E8VTI5swF1g7w07SR9Do9F3qayfd31BdtJNsiiRharLr4DRHkR73-fUbsP3GUO1vtUHZn0qOBQswpDl3pX6d_9Qwu_y-COApsMLCVQ_eHCwwfWJ7WiG6EmUIqD3SmM40PLe7f0xIDCfKGMcSVqQL0Cp8jo3NQa2CQI/3or/FCXeYOcVSfiQhcA-tLEcrw/h1/QDAfgFmVGhKg76jQS-CmwoMbn_MUJcsQo2hEnC29TX8)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Katie Hobbs and the Arizona Democratic Party and go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xE-yb4eSzWNQYu7eqLJY4VUBlzKyl15W_6NfJSTHMYo7870ZLf8-1hUoxMYO6VckFE0-qto5CAcNYO92fHvRivje_T_GNQGLDMBK4-ysT_vXfA6z8Rz2yM0c-abwD-YxET1pq3Oj8q8guqUFFYzcn6aUjLcNozVRWp81cwY9TSNzW2crgV-EWQ_E98WubC1i10qM3Y-GII5UYqyroEB1x5vO5jbqQQbKAxXSpdRdYRjG_rViNDa2gvuTbbiJ8C5AgA1FOTO_EjU0Q3TVHFTO-WIm5zr6bbaX-B8d8S5k_vsMc_RfWlQTyBHWrzttcuuhlv24yaCm7u-7ZekR1LiH5mew7r7nmtOSy_5A2aSDkiVgU7BienEIj-TjG_X50xxt1UeyyKb5LQsVx2AgU0rOv8/3or/FCXeYOcVSfiQhcA-tLEcrw/h2/rfiUZfs79MaKGkE2urni2Q7Z5b7deLa0yEyNEleRRNA)

name: American Firebrand
subject: The Roundup: This Week's Heat from American Firebrand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FIREBRAND PAC
body:
We fight to win.

# _The voice of the people. We fight to win._
[Donate Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nciutt-ihhjkhtyud-r/)
# **_NEW EPISODE! _**
# **The Matthew Peterson Podcast**
[LISTEN NOW ON APPLE](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nciutt-ihhjkhtyud-y/) [LISTEN NOW ON SPOTIFY](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nciutt-ihhjkhtyud-j/) In this episode, Matthew gives his thoughts on the raid of the Mar-a-Lago home of former President Donald Trump and how we should be thinking about it.
# **_THE MEDIA PLAYBOOK AGAINST POPULISM _**
# **THIS IS YOUR COUNTRY with Paige Willey**
[LISTEN NOW ON APPLE](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nciutt-ihhjkhtyud-t/) [LISTEN NOW ON SPOTIFY](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nciutt-ihhjkhtyud-i/) Ruling institutions work to discredit and ultimately silence candidates who are disruptive to the status quo.This episode explores several case studies of the media running a predictable playbook against populist GOP candidates. In targeting these candidates and their causes, their true aim is to deprive many American voters of representation in Washington.
# **_NEW VIDEO! _**
# "The Democrats' Favorite Line: People Will Die"
Having giving up on persuading and appealing to voters, the Left now has one catch-all strategy: fear. This supercut shows their greatest hits. [](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nciutt-ihhjkhtyud-d/) [WATCH NOW](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nciutt-ihhjkhtyud-h/)
# **_NEW VIDEO! _**
# "Liz, You're Fired!"
President Trump's movement has discredited a long line of neocons, and Liz Cheney's resounding defeat in Wyoming is the latest nail in the coffin for the RINO establishment. subject: re: a FOURTH stimulus check for seniors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
| | |

clean_body: Our TV ads have “gone dark,” and we’re being outspent. Don’t let Dems buy this race with liberal dollars. | Unfortunately, I don't have good news, Peter. | FIRST: Our ads have "gone dark." Because we're behind our fundraising budget, we had to pull our TV ads off the air. Georgians are no longer hearing from our campaign. THEN: This story came out ⬇️⬇️⬇️ NOW: I am asking for your help, Peter. Right now, we don't know when we'll be able to restart our advertising. The sooner we hit our fundraising goals, the sooner we can go back up. It's that simple. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: Here's what we're up against: Raphael Warnock is the #1 fundraiser AND spender when it comes to campaign dollars. He's already filled up the bank with millions, but he asks for more EVERY DAY. I wish I didn't have to continue to ask for your financial help, but our reality is that we're going to continue to be outspent unless something changes NOW. Raphael Warnock has already outraised us 3:1 in this campaign, but we don't have to match him dollar for dollar to win on November 8th. Even though Senator Warnock and his far-Left allies have spent $25 million attacking me, this race is STILL TIED. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: We're working around the clock to make sure we have the funds to get back on the air, but we can't do it without you. We have our next ad ready to go, but we need the money to purchase the airtime with the TV stations. Timing is critical, and every dollar counts! Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

This election is going to make or break our House Majority, and I need you to understand exactly what’s at stake so I can earn your support. I know I already messaged you today, but will you read until the very end and then chip in $15 to confirm your 2022 Democratic Senate Membership? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49521730/362449110/1694517773?refcode=20220820_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODU3MjI3Yy1kMzIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jp4ap1H57acEdcuVC39bhNf6-_APep8-BTqipysm0g8=) I want to pull back the curtain and explain why my 2022 Democratic Senate Founding Members are so important. [**3.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49521733/362449113/1694517773?refcode=20220820_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODU3MjI3Yy1kMzIwLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jp4ap1H57acEdcuVC39bhNf6-_APep8-BTqipysm0g8=) Mitch McConnell’s cronies just lined up $173 MILLION to give Republicans the edge. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: GOP leader walks up to me in a coffee shop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220819_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220819_2]
Team,
Not long after our districts were redrawn, I was told that the St. Johns Mint Festival in Clinton County was a can’t-miss summer event. And after attending, it certainly did not disappoint.
The parade was packed (one of the best I’ve ever been in) and the crowd was energetic – it’s definitely a staple in mid-Michigan’s summer tradition of local festivals. There was a parade, a mascot, and I even learned the right way for Mint Festival Princesses to Wave (see here) [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220819_2] . But there was one specific interaction from that day that I wanted to share with you, that reflects my belief that politics doesn't need to be personal.
During a tour of the downtown, I popped into a local coffee shop (a necessity on the campaign trail). In true mid-Michigan fashion, it was located in a refurbished industrial property that used to be home to a grist saw mill.
I happened to be there at the same time as a former Republican elected official in the area. He walked up to me, introduced himself, and asked if he could shake my hand. We got to chatting and he told me that while he’d never vote for me, he respected me and my work, and that we need to get back to a place where people of different parties can work together on real issues. He then introduced me to his family, all of which shared his political views. They were all incredibly kind, and we talked for quite awhile. Later, his family staffed the booth next to ours at the festival, and while we certainly didn't agree on the issues, everyone was respectful neighbors.
It was an interaction that happens more than you’d think in my district. And it’s how it was forever in Michigan politics. Even growing up, our arguments were almost always about things like sports, not politics. In that moment our very different beliefs didn’t matter – we were all just people at a community event, grabbing coffee from a great local business.
I keep these kinds of stories in mind whenever I get frustrated by the political fights in D.C. It’s nice to know that when I come home, this kind of civility is waiting for me. I refuse to believe that we can’t be civil to each other even when we disagree. And while national politics seems very far from normal right now, I will never accept it as normal. I don’t believe in that, and neither do the people of mid-Michigan.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220819_2]
Elissa

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Mitch McConnell cancelled $28 million in tv ad buys in Arizona, Georgia, and Pennsylvania, and put it all into Ohio so he could try and steal that race from us.
body:
Republicans are all-in to win Ohio’s Senate seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Mitch McConnell admitted yesterday that Republicans may not win back the Senate, because the quality of their candidates is so God-awful. Of course, we know this, but Mitch finally caught on. **The good news: The Republicans have almost completely given up on winning the Senate seats in Pennsylvania, Georgia & Arizona.** _**The bad news: Mitch cancelled $28 million in tv ad buys in those states and put it all into Ohio so he could try and steal that race from us.**_ That’s right, $28 million in attempt to prop up vile anti-Semite J.D. Vance, who commanded women abused by their husbands that it was their duty to stay with their abusers, at risk of their health and lives (and the lives of their kids). [**Can you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can to help Ryan counter the $28 million of dirty money Mitch McConnell just dumped on his head in his vain attempt to become aSenate Majority Leader? Ryan is such a great candidate. He’ll make an even better Senator!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb708544-9f7b-42cb-97f2-5bc33d4b1501/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This week we saw even more how utterly contemptible Vance is. A few years back he started a supposed charity—really a sham—that he claimed would help opioid addiction in Ohio. We now know before shuttering the sham, he hired a man from Big Pharma as bud charity’s representative, to go speak to those suffering the scourge of addiction. That’s right: Ever the fraudulent and empathy-less scum, **Vance sent someone who profited from opioid addiction out to speak to communities ravaged by it.** Sure sounds like JD was sending a group known for giving large campaign contributions in to areas rife with addiction to find more customers while hiding behind a fake charity. There is no word in the English language for how evil this is. Perhaps, Republican.
---

clean_body: Republicans are all-in to win Ohio’s Senate seat | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, Mitch McConnell admitted yesterday that Republicans may not win back the Senate, because the quality of their candidates is so God-awful. Of course, we know this, but Mitch finally caught on. The good news: The Republicans have almost completely given up on winning the Senate seats in Pennsylvania, Georgia & Arizona. The bad news: Mitch cancelled $28 million in tv ad buys in those states and put it all into Ohio so he could try and steal that race from us. That’s right, $28 million in attempt to prop up vile anti-Semite J.D. Vance, who commanded women abused by their husbands that it was their duty to stay with their abusers, at risk of their health and lives (and the lives of their kids). This week we saw even more how utterly contemptible Vance is. A few years back he started a supposed charity—really a sham—that he claimed would help opioid addiction in Ohio. We now know before shuttering the sham, he hired a man from Big Pharma as bud charity’s representative, to go speak to those suffering the scourge of addiction. That’s right: Ever the fraudulent and empathy-less scum, Vance sent someone who profited from opioid addiction out to speak to communities ravaged by it. Sure sounds like JD was sending a group known for giving large campaign contributions in to areas rife with addiction to find more customers while hiding behind a fake charity. There is no word in the English language for how evil this is. Perhaps, Republican. | | | | | | Even with his $28 million gift from McConnell, Tim Ryan is beating Vance in every poll and has massively out-raised him. But the $28MM is gonna hurt. If we want Tim Ryan representing us in the Senate so he can kill the filibuster, add judges to rebalance the Supreme Court, codify Roe, pass universal voting rights and gun safety legislation —and to prevent a ghoul like Vance, who’d prey on his own community by sending Big Pharma in to profit from his neighbors’ addiction, we must dig deep and support Tim Ryan!! Thank you for helping us stop Mitch McConnell from stealing this race and ever becoming Senate Majority Leader again!! Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

name: Daria Grastara, NRSC Digital Director
subject: Losing steam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
|
---
We’ve sent non-stop emails and texts, but it isn’t making a difference.

We are losing steam and frankly, we’re not sure how to make it up if Americans don’t care about retaking the Senate Majority anymore.

Like we’ve said, in critical states that will determine the Senate majority, Democrats are **OUTRAISING Republicans** and because of it, Republicans are **polling BEHIND** or virtually tied with their Democrat challengers.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=38502fbb03a9414f84a335dfdb9535d0&_e=LQGnswsnV8EQO1w21vwNXAl-aGT2AZ1oSPXKJZ0XS1JtM9U3doelDW8-1ydPl9sHQsg8V_IC37yz7P88S8cgGL5dWP8SCmK8FUr7oGgf7bXBpLX1l5IfBm3Gredb5XY8pQqtszOd7M8jULOA4Iq5vflWw10-Qs9qNserxyAMEwruRIgxjpEXcIArs2qFrzA1XuqYOEmwb1SIWuXU9xqTQVJ1KqCFObAPqd24Dk8yVh3zUhGDRI0KN2aie5GVfnLimxmyE5E_AcFqCldVSiULZ4hmW5DqqLTeXSmutfHjkzSTp8TBTGzNv2v1AHWLHaGHi-wYWyK3FH8dZVxfjhaJReD6RycbKX23mY6dMhyGLFKgVZwYHIieU1k6iuqhcJLcuef9XwWnzNx5IUyxsIu0iCg2X-US8_iKz2R1v-tqlFZIC-eMIp6d-3aLCqItkTjaeVB34RGLtr1a9Wyw4Ey6UktcVdTytSO1yUsr8NFuX84%3D)
We’re behind because the Democrats have a fired-up base of donors who want to see the Democrats hang on in November and keep control to push their ludicrous and radical policies.

**So, this is our last Hail Mary attempt and cry for help.** [**If you want to help restore Republican victories, then please chip in $22 right now to our fight to take back the Senate.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=38502fbb03a9414f84a335dfdb9535d0&_e=LQGnswsnV8EQO1w21vwNXAl-aGT2AZ1oSPXKJZ0XS1JtM9U3doelDW8-1ydPl9sHQsg8V_IC37yz7P88S8cgGL5dWP8SCmK8FUr7oGgf7bXBpLX1l5IfBm3Gredb5XY8pQqtszOd7M8jULOA4Iq5vflWw10-Qs9qNserxyAMEwruRIgxjpEXcIArs2qFrzA1XuqYOEmwb1SIWuXU9xqTQVJ1KqCFObAPqd24Dk8yVh3zUhGDRI0KN2aie5GVfnLimxmyE5E_AcFqCldVSiULZ9idc2REjlYawlLgVk29bjtJvhXgAEh2ITcpR2wg_pD8E3HNDbi7LJeGEHqThfU9bnyDIF3mo2moIkkrOynR4Mj63SZn-WgKUPY9_suypzsZFsE0azDueikujgEqF7R98vqYp7z0ZX61N_TXX2Kr4YEzLTNJKtJAhq_b7z5oVVhCpr_1T-ERzfbuszOhprks_RbB3X5o5xc1a-WTRVZEwBA%3D)

[**JOIN THE FIGHT -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=38502fbb03a9414f84a335dfdb9535d0&_e=LQGnswsnV8EQO1w21vwNXAl-aGT2AZ1oSPXKJZ0XS1JtM9U3doelDW8-1ydPl9sHQsg8V_IC37yz7P88S8cgGL5dWP8SCmK8FUr7oGgf7bXBpLX1l5IfBm3Gredb5XY8pQqtszOd7M8jULOA4Iq5vflWw10-Qs9qNserxyAMEwruRIgxjpEXcIArs2qFrzA1XuqYOEmwb1SIWuXU9xqTQVJ1KqCFObAPqd24Dk8yVh3zUhGDRI0KN2aie5GVfnLimxmyE5E_AcFqCldVSiULZzsFw5ll9p1BiahhiacakCEAgpzDcNUUuHhGxRAIVi35unmuLFHoK-YpzYkRWp6lCPp3D3LjFOMCvUibHCpTjLlKamyJa4SRyWF4usjtZQmQBCp1xAuBPwSPZyNt98wUL38ZO9KItCkIfefS4fPRPHeJPiOW0kcXdzpagV24FLVvsNvLnoMi97HtcZCUfsceMV5UVT0FTq0MAHidnaUvgRM%3D)
We want to do everything and anything we can to support our Republican Senate candidates and ensure they have what they need to win. The future of America is on the line, and it doesn’t get any more serious than that.

We know you want to see America thriving and back on track as much as we do, so please, [**if you can, chip in right now to join our fight to take back the Senate.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=38502fbb03a9414f84a335dfdb9535d0&_e=LQGnswsnV8EQO1w21vwNXAl-aGT2AZ1oSPXKJZ0XS1JtM9U3doelDW8-1ydPl9sHQsg8V_IC37yz7P88S8cgGL5dWP8SCmK8FUr7oGgf7bXBpLX1l5IfBm3Gredb5XY8pQqtszOd7M8jULOA4Iq5vflWw10-Qs9qNserxyAMEwruRIgxjpEXcIArs2qFrzA1XuqYOEmwb1SIWuXU9xqTQVJ1KqCFObAPqd24Dk8yVh3zUhGDRI0KN2aie5GVfnLimxmyE5E_AcFqCldVSiULZ89WUlRX5N0YzYwkxf8CEhqMDfYxjzk56n_ooXfuxZJbM2jtGvFNdxyQzSs3RKd2qVfqfnOEgbYhVCQCKU2r7vmTtQNH9WAdz9h3OUlWEufkdl86phxOA4kiCptkPLBDy-xBT_CP-6C_TOTq3l_mqWpf983xgSokWvQZad5CwvF_ECERxLQT3g69xiM7-hIqvH3uPUqZHggKaSP9Zd5n0FA%3D)

Right now, some of these key battle races are too close for comfort, and we need to pull ahead. [**Can we count on you to help?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=38502fbb03a9414f84a335dfdb9535d0&_e=LQGnswsnV8EQO1w21vwNXAl-aGT2AZ1oSPXKJZ0XS1JtM9U3doelDW8-1ydPl9sHQsg8V_IC37yz7P88S8cgGL5dWP8SCmK8FUr7oGgf7bXBpLX1l5IfBm3Gredb5XY8pQqtszOd7M8jULOA4Iq5vflWw10-Qs9qNserxyAMEwruRIgxjpEXcIArs2qFrzA1XuqYOEmwb1SIWuXU9xqTQVJ1KqCFObAPqd24Dk8yVh3zUhGDRI0KN2aie5GVfnLimxmyE5E_AcFqCldVSiULZ2JKwRC4YnYdcxtJITxqBYzfqefjbBr-S4qBRk9l1I_aF6VDJ-CoYYATYwFV35Uzp7xAQhK7z7vXJ3C9ZgrF99e1eIEWcOH0qwYBstgtDgwI5c4GU2OxbkG4C6rGW_3vZupneLUnUjh_OBtQ5wr1htkguNVg09kmrrHv2HcugyAQr33RQK5HUEel3UIYCFSt4KoXAKCvGnVg6_jEB8XmAGo%3D)

Thanks,

Daria Grastara
NRSC Digital Director

name: Izzi Levy
subject: while JD profits, Ohio falls further behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19428?t=1007&amount=25&akid=5118%2E3611125%2Eu-4No- ][IMG]

JD has profited off of the struggles of Ohio’s working families,
team—he made more than $475,000 in royalties last year alone.

Here’s some quick math for you: the median household income in Ohio is
about $58,000 per year. JD made more than 8x that amount by using those
same struggling families as a cash cow.

Working class hero? Not even close.

JD is a Silicon Valley hack who bailed on Ohio, wrote a book blaming
working families for their problems, and now wants to represent them in
the Senate. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/19428?t=1008&amount=25&akid=5118%2E3611125%2Eu-4No- ]Can you chip in $25 ASAP to make sure this out-of-touch
millionaire never sees the Senate chambers without a visitor’s pass?

name: Team DLCC
subject: The GOP’s long game
body:
Republicans are targeting legislatures in battleground states to try and reclaim their power and make whatever decisions they wish regarding election outcomes. | | |
---
| | In a recent Congressional hearing, Rep. Jamie Raskin addressed the Constitution’s independent state legislature theory and its detrimental impact on the future of our democracy as we know it. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZBD3kRTEYjFcAcryIttCCkTSTsIg6-R-Ela3PRfxRWUUTTj_cZGsaC1Z2pXG1yXads7P7_AEyevPB4nHgdMxVFL-RoooaByxpr6-lDj0lubTofgEa9BtkHfz1-le-IsI0dhR7cqtzJDIOrX1ZiflflONnR_a7fS4DbARCkMQ-KZBLYxO13u9AcA38dBNiWRIrzhY5x4TpH-p4f-7VbgPrHn58ATWa2bH4iUsLwUZHKEZrxkgSNAqQpExQ9cNssOVfuzy2773wSamCXE8ljnDOL1jQMF3BgugmOSpYsOp6oWZTxIjThEhoftgyaw4bWO3HwO0MBe0zLy331INNY8ZYOjWpEcQfJtaflLPZnToaCoyjZ0lTaOLMUwBeSCAc2W_Eyw7ZRMYlje4rKGc8Oh1tIw/3or/Yf3EsOHZT-e7i2GeaVufZQ/h0/VjlxwGEjs7Rc3rS7KVTXp74hRv1t93yrrJC6B_ITuwA) **This would grant state legislatures complete power to control our federal elections and nullify hundreds of established election laws.** Extremist Republicans are willing to go to whatever lengths to win elections and reclaim power, even if it means rewriting the rules of our democracy. We’re seeing the GOP across the nation work tirelessly to target state legislatures in battleground states in order to oversee future elections and harm the integrity of our democracy. [How can we fight back? By making sure that pro-democracy Democrats hold the power in statehouses across the country. Can you chip in $7 or whatever you can right now to support the DLCC’s efforts to elect state Democrats, combat right-wing extremism, and protect our democracy?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZBD3kRTEYjFcAcryIttCCkTSTsIg6-R-Ela3PRfxRWUUTTj_cZGsaC1Z2pXG1yXads7P7_AEyevPB4nHgdMxVFL-RoooaByxpr6-lDj0lubTofgEa9BtkHfz1-le-IsI0dhR7cqtzJDIOrX1ZiflflPOMlzi4SfOshZitcvqIO_jMw_OZDTph90TbNAJlk_cJHq_xLqZxBvKOnkG8NBmCkyIr4dVaZsXue0op5TlUBFPgDPovM-3gYdDmoT8xUrkbRP-tBuFO-9QGuBJJAgaMuYumSzPu8L6SdfVP1F3wnKOqI1jtJpIQukP0FRn3VlT_ReDncVqQ5GVfryXaCp8u_uLMPqE-mOiZWTLOJLe8id3Z8K-CYPttb7U7FFnwp9aZOHKTbdy27MQHij7y62_KqA/3or/Yf3EsOHZT-e7i2GeaVufZQ/h1/ExDK7_xv8B9mZGyL_WeVEbpGLotW8oWndtEMxU17EaI) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: Republicans are targeting legislatures in battleground states to try and reclaim their power and make whatever decisions they wish regarding election outcomes. | | | | | In a recent Congressional hearing, Rep. Jamie Raskin addressed the Constitution’s independent state legislature theory and its detrimental impact on the future of our democracy as we know it. This would grant state legislatures complete power to control our federal elections and nullify hundreds of established election laws. Extremist Republicans are willing to go to whatever lengths to win elections and reclaim power, even if it means rewriting the rules of our democracy. We’re seeing the GOP across the nation work tirelessly to target state legislatures in battleground states in order to oversee future elections and harm the integrity of our democracy. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Abrams for Governor
subject: before midnight tomorrow:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Hi Derek,

Starting Monday, August 22, Georgians will officially be able to request
vote-by-mail ballots. That’s why we’re counting on a surge of donations to
spread our message before the first set of ballots hit mailboxes just
weeks later — and to raise $200,000 from grassroots donors by tomorrow
night.

We can’t afford to slow down now — we are in a fight to keep our momentum
alive against an extremist, incumbent governor who has proven time and
again he will do anything to hold on to his power.

We can overcome his attacks, but we’re going to need all hands on deck
before voters begin to request their ballots on Monday.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220820_B3_CountingOnYou_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1945%2E1862389%2EISc5Pj ]We hope we can count on you,
Derek. We need a surge of
donations to spread our message and block Kemp’s attacks before Georgians
begin requesting their ballots on Monday. If everyone reading this —
including you — chips in now, we’ll spread our message to every corner of
Georgia.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220820_B3_CountingOnYou_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1945%2E1862389%2EISc5Pj ]DONATE

It is going to take a lot of effort and a surge of donations to get to the
finish line.

You’ll hear more from us as we get closer to next week. But for now, we
want to leave you with this, a reminder of the people we are fighting for:

We’re fighting for a single parent in Commerce
A woman seeking an abortion in Dublin
A small business owner in Decatur
A health care provider in Macon
A teacher in Quitman
And you.

Derek, Stacey
is in this race to create a stronger Georgia for everyone. And we’re
counting on grassroots
supporters like you
to make clear that we have what it takes to win, with just 80 days left to
go.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220820_B3_CountingOnYou_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1945%2E1862389%2EISc5Pj ]Your support sustains our mission. Please donate $5 now
and help us hit our $200,000 goal before tomorrow night.

We can’t say thank you enough,

Abrams for Governor

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=1945%2E1862389%2EISc5Pj ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1945%2E1862389%2EISc5Pj

His policies are hurting to a degree that is only comparable to the blow delivered by Will Smith on Chris Rock at the Oscars. This is not the time to kick back & chuckle. Tim Ryan votes with Biden 100% of the time and is now solidifying his gains. Thank you, Team Vance HQ Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance.
